name: Aggression
description: At the start of your turn, put a random Attack from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.

translations.tha: ความก้าวร้าว

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, put a random Attack from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
translations.zhs: 在你的回合开始时，将你[gold]弃牌堆[/gold]的一张随机攻击牌放入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]并将其[gold]升级[/gold]。
translations.deu: Nimm zu Beginn deines Zuges einen zufälligen Angriff aus deinem [gold]Abwurfstapel[/gold] auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold] und [gold]Verbessere[/gold] ihn.
translations.esp: Al comienzo del turno, colocas una carta de ataque de la [gold]pila de descarte[/gold] al azar en tu [gold]mano[/gold] y la [gold]mejoras[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, placez une Attaque aléatoire de votre [gold]Défausse[/gold] dans votre [gold]Main[/gold] et [gold]Améliorez[/gold]-la.
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni tuo turno, metti una carta Attacco casuale dalla tua [gold]pila degli scarti[/gold] alla tua [gold]mano[/gold] in forma [gold]potenziata[/gold].
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、[gold]捨て札[/gold]にあるランダムなアタックを1枚[gold]手札[/gold]に加え、それを[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。
translations.kor:
내 턴 시작 시,
[gold]버린 카드 더미[/gold]에서 무작위
공격 카드를 1장 [gold]손[/gold]으로
가져오고 [gold]강화[/gold]합니다.
translations.pol: Na początku tury przełóż losowy Atak ze [gold]stosu kart odrzuconych[/gold] do [gold]ręki[/gold] i [gold]Ulepsz[/gold] go.
translations.ptb: No início do seu turno, coloque um Ataque aleatório da sua [gold]Pilha de Descarte[/gold] na sua [gold]Mão[/gold] e o [gold]Aprimore[/gold].
translations.rus: Вы берете и [gold]улучшаете[/gold] случайную Атаку из [gold]стопки сброса[/gold] в начале хода.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu turno, coloca un Ataque aleatorio de tu [gold]Pila de descarte[/gold] en tu [gold]Mano[/gold] y [gold]Mejóralo[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น สุ่มนำการ์ดโจมตี 1 ใบจาก[gold]กองทิ้ง[/gold]ขึ้น[gold]มือ[/gold]และ[gold]พัฒนา[/gold]มัน
translations.tur: Turunun başında [gold]Atık Destesi[/gold]'nden rastgele bir Saldırı kartını [gold]El[/gold]'ine koy ve [gold]Geliştir[/gold].

name: Anger
description:
Deal 6 damage.
Add a copy of this card into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].

translations.tha: ความโกรธ

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a copy of this card into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
将一张此牌的复制品加入你的[gold]弃牌堆[/gold]。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Nimm eine Kopie dieser Karte in deinen [gold]Abwurfstapel[/gold].
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Agregas una copia de esta carta a tu [gold]pila de descarte[/gold].
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Ajoutez une copie de cette carte à votre [gold]Défausse[/gold].
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Aggiungi una copia di questa carta nella tua [gold]pila degli scarti[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
このカードのコピーを1枚[gold]捨て札[/gold]に加える。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
이 카드의 복사본을 1장
[gold]버린 카드 더미[/gold]에
추가합니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Dodaj kopię tej karty do [gold]stosu kart odrzuconych[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
Adicione uma cópia desta carta na sua [gold]Pilha de Descarte[/gold].
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Добавляет копию в [gold]стопку сброса[/gold].
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Añade una copia de esta carta a tu [gold]Pila de descarte[/gold].
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
เพิ่มสำเนาของการ์ดนี้ 1 ใบใส่[gold]กองทิ้ง[/gold]
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
Bu kartın bir kopyasını [gold]Atık Destesi[/gold]'ne ekle.

name: Armaments
description:
Gain 5 [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Upgrade[/gold] a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].

translations.tha: ยุทโธปกรณ์

translations.zhs:
获得{Block:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
[gold]升级[/gold]你[gold]手牌[/gold]中的{IfUpgraded:show:所有牌|一张牌}。
translations.esp:
Obtienes {Block:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
[gold]Mejoras[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:TODAS las cartas|una carta} de tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra:
Gagnez {Block:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
[gold]Améliorez[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:TOUTES les cartes|une carte} dans votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita:
Ottieni {Block:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
[gold]Potenzi[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:TUTTE le carte|una carta} che hai in [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{Block:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
[gold]手札[/gold]のカードを{IfUpgraded:show:すべて|1枚}[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。
translations.ptb:
Receba {Block:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
[gold]Aprimore[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:TODAS as cartas|uma carta} na sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.spa:
Gana {Block:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
[gold]Mejora[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:TODAS las cartas|una carta} de tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
translations.tha:
ได้รับ {Block:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
[gold]พัฒนา[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:การ์ดทั้งหมด|1 การ์ด}ใน[gold]มือ[/gold]

name: Armaments+
description:

name: Ashen Strike
description:
Deal 6 damage.
Deals 3 additional damage for each card in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].

translations.tha: จู่โจมเถ้าถ่าน

translations.eng:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each card in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
translations.zhs:
造成{CalculatedDamage:diff()}点伤害。
你的[gold]消耗牌堆[/gold]中每有一张牌，伤害增加{ExtraDamage:diff()}。
translations.deu:
Füge {CalculatedDamage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Fügt {ExtraDamage:diff()} Schaden mehr zu pro Karte in deinem [gold]Erschöpfungsstapel[/gold].
translations.esp:
Infliges {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de daño.
Infliges {ExtraDamage:diff()} de daño adicional por cada carta en tu [gold]pila de agotamiento[/gold].
translations.fra:
Infligez {CalculatedDamage:diff()} dégâts.
Inflige {ExtraDamage:diff()} dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque carte [gold]Épuisée[/gold].
translations.ita:
Infliggi {CalculatedDamage:diff()} di danno.
Infliggi {ExtraDamage:diff()} di danno extra per ogni carta nella tua [gold]pila delle carte esaurite[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{CalculatedDamage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
[gold]廃棄札[/gold]にあるカード1枚につき、追加で{ExtraDamage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
피해를 {CalculatedDamage:diff()} 줍니다.
[gold]소멸된 카드 더미[/gold]에 있는
카드 1장당 피해량이
{ExtraDamage:diff()} 증가합니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {CalculatedDamage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Zadaje dodatkowo {ExtraDamage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń za każdą kartę w [gold]stosie kart wyczerpanych[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Cause {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de dano.
Causa {ExtraDamage:diff()} de dano adicional por cada carta na sua pilha de [gold]Cartas Exauridas[/gold].
translations.rus:
Наносит {CalculatedDamage:diff()} урона.
Наносит на {ExtraDamage:diff()} урона больше за каждую карту в [gold]стопке пепла[/gold].
translations.spa:
Inflige {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de daño.
Inflige {ExtraDamage:diff()} de daño adicional por cada carta en tu [gold]Pila de agotamiento[/gold].
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {CalculatedDamage:diff()}
สร้างความเสียหายเพิ่ม {ExtraDamage:diff()} ต่อการ์ดใน[gold]กองสลาย[/gold]
translations.tur:
{CalculatedDamage:diff()} hasar ver.
[gold]Tüketim Destesi[/gold]'ndeki her kart için fazladan {ExtraDamage:diff()} hasar verir.

name: Barricade
description: [gold]Block[/gold] is not removed at the start of your turn.

translations.tha: ตรึงกำลัง

translations.eng: [gold]Block[/gold] is not removed at the start of your turn.
translations.zhs: [gold]格挡[/gold]不再在你的回合开始时消失。
translations.deu: [gold]Block[/gold] wird zu Beginn deines Zuges nicht entfernt.
translations.esp: No pierdes los puntos de [gold]bloqueo[/gold] al inicio de tu turno.
translations.fra: Vous ne perdez plus votre [gold]Armure[/gold] au début de votre tour.
translations.ita: Il [gold]Blocco[/gold] non viene rimosso all'inizio del tuo turno.
translations.jpn: ターン開始時に[gold]ブロック[/gold]を失わない。
translations.kor:
내 턴 시작 시 [gold]방어도[/gold]가
사라지지 않습니다.
translations.pol: [gold]Blok[/gold] nie zostaje usunięty na początku tury.
translations.ptb: [gold]Proteção[/gold] não é removida no início do seu turno.
translations.spa: El [gold]Bloqueo[/gold] no se pierde al comienzo de tu turno.
translations.tha: [gold]บล็อก[/gold]จะไม่หายไปตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น

name: Bash
description:
Deal 8 damage.
Apply 2 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].

translations.tha: ทุบตี

translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
给予{VulnerablePower:diff()}层[gold]易伤[/gold]。
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
[gold]弱体[/gold]{VulnerablePower:diff()}を付与する。
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
สร้าง {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]จุดอ่อน[/gold]

name: Bash+
description:
Deal 10 damage.
Apply 3 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].

translations.tha: ทุบตี

translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
给予{VulnerablePower:diff()}层[gold]易伤[/gold]。
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
[gold]弱体[/gold]{VulnerablePower:diff()}を付与する。
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
สร้าง {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]จุดอ่อน[/gold]

name: Battle Trance
description:
Draw 3 cards.
You cannot draw additional cards this turn.

translations.tha: หลงใหลการศึก

translations.eng:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
You cannot draw additional cards this turn.
translations.zhs:
抽{Cards:diff()}张牌。
你在本回合内不能再抽任何牌。
translations.deu:
Ziehe {Cards:diff()} Karten.
Du kannst in diesem Zug keine Karten mehr nachziehen.
translations.esp:
Robas {Cards:diff()} cartas.
No puedes robar más cartas durante este turno.
translations.fra:
Piochez {Cards:diff()} cartes.
Vous ne pouvez plus piocher de cartes jusqu'à la fin du tour.
translations.ita:
Peschi {Cards:diff()} carte.
Non puoi pescare carte extra in questo turno.
translations.jpn:
カードを{Cards:diff()}枚引く。
このターン、追加でカードを引くことができない。
translations.kor:
카드를 {Cards:diff()}장 뽑습니다.
이번 턴 동안 더 이상
카드를 뽑을 수 없습니다.
translations.pol:
Dobierz {Cards:diff()} karty.
Nie możesz dobierać więcej kart w tej turze.
translations.ptb:
Compre {Cards:diff()} cartas.
Você não pode comprar mais cartas neste turno.
translations.rus:
Вы добираете {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт},
после чего не сможете добирать карты до конца хода.
translations.spa:
Roba {Cards:diff()} cartas.
No puedes robar más cartas este turno.
translations.tha:
จั่ว {Cards:diff()} การ์ด
ในเทิร์นนี้ คุณจะจั่วการ์ดไม่ได้อีก
translations.tur:
{Cards:diff()} kart çek.
Bu tur daha fazla kart çekemezsin.

name: Body Slam
description: Deal damage equal to your [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.tha: พุ่งเข้าชน

translations.eng:
Deal damage equal to your [gold]Block[/gold].{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
translations.zhs:
造成你当前[gold]格挡[/gold]值的伤害。{InCombat:
（造成{CalculatedDamage:diff()}点伤害）|}
translations.deu:
Füge Schaden in Höhe deines [gold]Blocks[/gold] zu.{InCombat:
({CalculatedDamage:diff()} Schaden)|}
translations.esp:
Infliges daño por un valor equivalente a tus puntos de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].{InCombat:
(Infliges{CalculatedDamage:diff()} de daño)|}
translations.fra:
Infligez un montant de dégâts égal à votre [gold]Armure[/gold].{InCombat:
(Inflige {CalculatedDamage:diff()} dégâts)|}
translations.ita:
Infliggi danno pari al tuo [gold]Blocco[/gold].{InCombat:
(Infligge {CalculatedDamage:diff()} di danno)|}
translations.jpn:
自身の[gold]ブロック[/gold]値に等しいダメージを与える。{InCombat:
({CalculatedDamage:diff()}ダメージを与える)|}
translations.pol:
Zadaj obrażenia równe twojemu [gold]Blokowi[/gold].{InCombat:
(Zadaje {CalculatedDamage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń)|}
translations.ptb:
Cause dano equivalente à sua [gold]Proteção[/gold].{InCombat:
(Causa {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de dano)|}
translations.spa:
Inflige daño igual a tu [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].{InCombat:
(Inflige {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de daño).|}
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหายตาม[gold]บล็อก[/gold]ที่คุณมี{InCombat:
(สร้างความเสียหาย {CalculatedDamage:diff()})|}
translations.tur:
Sahip olduğun [gold]Blok[/gold] kadar hasar ver.{InCombat:
({CalculatedDamage:diff()} hasar verir)|}

name: Breakthrough
description:
Lose 1 HP.
Deal 9 damage to ALL enemies.

translations.tha: ฝ่าวงล้อม

translations.eng:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs:
失去{HpLoss:diff()}点生命。
对所有敌人造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
translations.deu:
Verliere {HpLoss:diff()} TP.
Füge ALLEN Gegnern {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
translations.esp:
Pierdes {HpLoss:diff()} PV.
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra:
Perdez {HpLoss:diff()} PV.
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita:
Perdi {HpLoss:diff()} PV.
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn:
HPを{HpLoss:diff()}失う。
すべての敵に{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
체력을 {HpLoss:diff()} 잃습니다.
모든 적에게
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
translations.pol:
Utrać {HpLoss:diff()} PŻ.
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
translations.ptb:
Perca {HpLoss:diff()} PV.
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus:
Вы теряете {HpLoss:diff()} ОЗ.
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона ВСЕМ врагам.
translations.spa:
Pierde {HpLoss:diff()} PV.
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha:
เสีย {HpLoss:diff()} HP
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()} ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur:
{HpLoss:diff()} CP kaybet.
TÜM düşmanlara {Damage:diff()} hasar ver.

name: Bully
description:
Deal 4 damage.
Deals 2 additional damage for each [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] on the enemy.

translations.eng:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] on the enemy.
translations.zhs:
造成{CalculatedDamage:diff()}点伤害。
该敌人身上每有一层[gold]易伤[/gold]就额外造成{ExtraDamage:diff()}点伤害。
translations.deu:
Füge {CalculatedDamage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Fügt {ExtraDamage:diff()} Schaden mehr zu pro [gold]Verwundbar[/gold] auf dem Gegner.
translations.esp:
Infliges {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de daño.
Infliges {ExtraDamage:diff()} daño adicional por cada punto de [gold]vulnerabilidad[/gold] del enemigo.
translations.fra:
Infligez {CalculatedDamage:diff()} dégâts.
Inflige {ExtraDamage:diff()} dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque incidence de [gold]Vulnérable[/gold] sur l'ennemi.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {CalculatedDamage:diff()} di danno.
Infliggi {ExtraDamage:diff()} di danno extra per ogni punto di [gold]Vulnerabilità[/gold] sul nemico.
translations.jpn:
{CalculatedDamage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
対象の敵に付与している[gold]弱体[/gold]1につき、追加で{ExtraDamage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
피해를 {CalculatedDamage:diff()} 줍니다.
대상 적이 보유한 [gold]취약[/gold]마다 피해량이 {ExtraDamage:diff()} 증가합니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {CalculatedDamage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Zadaje dodatkowo {ExtraDamage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń za każdego [gold]Wrażliwego[/gold] przeciwnika.
translations.ptb:
Cause {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de dano.
Causa {ExtraDamage:diff()} de dano adicional por cada [gold]Vulnerável[/gold] no inimigo.
translations.rus:
Наносит {CalculatedDamage:diff()} урона.
Наносит на {ExtraDamage:diff()} урона больше за каждую [gold]уязвимость[/gold] врага.
translations.spa:
Inflige {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de daño.
Inflige {ExtraDamage:diff()} de daño adicional por cada [gold]Vulnerabilidad[/gold] que tenga el enemigo.
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {CalculatedDamage:diff()}
สร้างความเสียหายเพิ่ม {ExtraDamage:diff()} ตามจำนวน[gold]จุดอ่อน[/gold]บนตัวศัตรู
translations.tur:
{CalculatedDamage:diff()} hasar ver.
Düşman üzerindeki her [gold]Savunmasız[/gold] için fazladan {ExtraDamage:diff()} hasar verir.

name: Cascade
description: Play the top X cards of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

translations.eng: Play the top X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} cards of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
translations.deu: Spiele die obersten X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} Karten deines [gold]Nachziehstapels[/gold].
translations.esp: Juegas las siguientes X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} cartas del [gold]mazo de robo[/gold].
translations.fra: Jouez les X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} cartes du dessus de votre [gold]Pioche[/gold].
translations.ita: Giochi le prime X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} carte del tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]山札[/gold]の上からX{IfUpgraded:show:+1}枚のカードをプレイする。
translations.kor:
[gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold] 맨 위의
무작위 카드를 X{IfUpgraded:show:+1}장
사용합니다.
translations.pol: Zagraj kartę ze szczytu [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold] X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} razy.
translations.ptb: Jogue as X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} cartas do topo da sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold].
translations.rus: Вы разыгрываете X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} карт с верха [gold]стопки добора[/gold].
translations.spa: Juega las X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} primeras cartas de tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold].
translations.tha: เล่นการ์ดใบบนสุด X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} ใบของ[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]
translations.tur: [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'nin en üstündeki X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} kartı oyna.

name: Colossus
description:
Gain 5 [gold]Block[/gold].
You receive 50% less damage from [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] enemies this turn.

translations.eng:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
You receive 50% less damage from [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] enemies this turn.
translations.zhs:
获得{Block:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
在本回合中，有[gold]易伤[/gold]状态的敌人对你造成的伤害降低50%。
translations.deu:
Erhalte {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Du nimmst in diesem Zug 50% weniger Schaden von [gold]Verwundbaren[/gold] Gegnern.
translations.esp:
Obtienes {Block:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
Recibes 50 % menos de daño de enemigos con [gold]vulnerabilidad[/gold] en este turno.
translations.fra:
Gagnez {Block:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
Vous subissez 50% de dégâts en moins des ennemis [gold]Vulnérables[/gold] pendant ce tour.
translations.ita:
Ottieni {Block:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
Subisci il 50% di danno in meno dai nemici con [gold]Vulnerabilità[/gold] in questo turno.
translations.jpn:
{Block:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
このターン、[gold]弱体[/gold]中の敵から受けるダメージが50%減少する。
translations.kor:
[gold]방어도[/gold]를 {Block:diff()} 얻습니다.
이번 턴에 [gold]취약[/gold] 상태의
적에게서 받는 피해량이
50% 감소합니다.
translations.pol:
Zyskaj {Block:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
W tej turze otrzymujesz 50% mniej obrażeń od [gold]Wrażliwych[/gold] przeciwników.
translations.ptb:
Receba {Block:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
Você sofre 50% menos dano de inimigos [gold]Vulneráveis[/gold] neste turno.
translations.rus:
Дает {Block:diff()} [gold]защиты[/gold].
В этом ходу вы получаете на 50% меньше урона от [gold]уязвимых[/gold] врагов.
translations.spa:
Gana {Block:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
Recibes un 50 % menos de daño de enemigos [gold]Vulnerables[/gold] durante este turno.
translations.tha:
ได้รับ {Block:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
ในเทิร์นนี้ คุณจะได้รับความเสียหายน้อยลง 50% จากศัตรูที่มี[gold]จุดอ่อน[/gold]
translations.tur:
{Block:diff()} [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.
Bu tur, [gold]Savunmasız[/gold] olan düşmanlardan %50 daha az hasar al.

name: Conflagration
description:
Deal 8 damage to ALL enemies.
Deals 2 additional damage for each other Attack you've played this turn.

translations.eng:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each other Attack you've played this turn.
translations.zhs:
对所有敌人造成{CalculatedDamage:diff()}点伤害。
你在本回合中每打出过一张其他攻击牌，这张牌的伤害就提升{ExtraDamage:diff()}点。
translations.deu:
Füge ALLEN Gegnern {CalculatedDamage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Fügt {ExtraDamage:diff()} Schaden mehr zu pro anderem Angriff, den du in diesem Zug gespielt hast.
translations.esp:
Infliges {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
Infliges {ExtraDamage:diff()} de daño adicional por cada carta de ataque que hayas jugado en este turno.
translations.fra:
Infligez {CalculatedDamage:diff()} dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
Inflige {ExtraDamage:diff()} dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque autre Attaque que vous avez jouée ce tour.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {CalculatedDamage:diff()} di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
Infliggi {ExtraDamage:diff()} di danno extra per ogni altra carta Attacco che hai giocato in questo turno.
translations.jpn: すべての敵に{CalculatedDamage:diff()}ダメージを与える。このターンにプレイしたアタック1枚につき、追加で{ExtraDamage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
모든 적에게
피해를 {CalculatedDamage:diff()} 줍니다.
이번 턴에 사용한 다른
공격 카드 1장당
피해량이 {ExtraDamage:diff()} 증가합니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {CalculatedDamage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
Zadaje dodatkowo {ExtraDamage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń za każdy inny Atak zagrany w tej turze.
translations.ptb:
Cause {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
Causa {ExtraDamage:diff()} de dano adicional por cada outro Ataque que você jogou neste turno.
translations.rus:
Наносит {CalculatedDamage:diff()} урона ВСЕМ врагам.
Наносит на {ExtraDamage:diff()} урона больше за каждую вторую Атаку, разыгранную в этом ходу.
translations.spa:
Inflige {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
Inflige {ExtraDamage:diff()} de daño adicional por cada otro Ataque que hayas jugado este turno.
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {CalculatedDamage:diff()} ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
สร้างความเสียหายเพิ่ม {ExtraDamage:diff()} ตามจำนวนการ์ดโจมตีใบอื่นที่คุณเล่นในเทิร์นนี้
translations.tur:
TÜM düşmanlara {CalculatedDamage:diff()} hasar ver.
Bu tur oynadığın her Saldırı için fazladan {ExtraDamage:diff()} hasar verir.

description:
Deal 9 damage to ALL enemies.
Deals 3 additional damage for each other Attack you've played this turn.

name: Corruption
description:
Skills cost 0 [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/ironclad_energy_icon.png[/img].
Whenever you play a Skill, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.

translations.tha: เปื้อนมลทิน

translations.eng:
Skills cost 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
Whenever you play a Skill, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
translations.zhs:
技能牌消耗变为0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}。
每当你打出一张技能牌时，将其[gold]消耗[/gold]。
translations.deu:
Fertigkeiten kosten 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
Immer wenn du eine Fertigkeit spielst, [gold]Erschöpfe[/gold] sie.
translations.esp:
Las cartas de habilidad cuestan 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
Al jugar una carta de habilidad, se [gold]agotará[/gold].
translations.fra:
Vos Compétences coûtent 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
Lorsque vous jouez une Compétence, [gold]Épuisez[/gold]-la.
translations.ita:
Le carte Abilità costano 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
Ogni volta che giochi una carta Abilità, [gold]esauriscila[/gold].
translations.jpn:
スキルのコストは0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}。
スキルをプレイするたび、それを[gold]廃棄[/gold]する。
translations.kor:
스킬 카드의 비용이
0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}이 됩니다.
스킬 카드를 사용할 때마다 그 카드를 [gold]소멸[/gold]시킵니다.
translations.pol:
Umiejętności kosztują 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
Kiedykolwiek zagrasz Umiejętność, [gold]Wyczerp[/gold] ją.
translations.ptb:
Técnicas custam 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
Sempre que você jogar uma Técnica, a [gold]Exaure[/gold].
translations.spa:
Las Habilidades cuestan 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
Cuando juegues una Habilidad, [gold]Agótala[/gold].
translations.tha:
การ์ดทักษะทั้งหมดมีค่าร่าย 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}
ทุกครั้งที่เล่นการ์ดทักษะ [gold]สลาย[/gold]มัน
translations.tur:
Becerilerin maliyeti 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} olur.
Her Beceri oynadığında o kart [gold]Tüketilir[/gold].

name: Crimson Mantle
description: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP and gain 8 [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP and gain {CrimsonMantlePower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在你的回合开始时，失去1点生命并获得{CrimsonMantlePower:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Verliere immer zu Beginn deines Zuges 1 TP und erhalte {CrimsonMantlePower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu turno, pierdes 1 PV y obtienes {CrimsonMantlePower:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, perdez 1 PV et gagnez {CrimsonMantlePower:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo turno, perdi 1 PV e ottieni {CrimsonMantlePower:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、HPを1失い、{CrimsonMantlePower:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.kor:
내 턴 시작 시,
체력을 1 잃고
[gold]방어도[/gold]를 {CrimsonMantlePower:diff()} 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Na początku tury utrać 1 PŻ i zyskaj {CrimsonMantlePower:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início do seu turno, perca 1 PV e receba {CrimsonMantlePower:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.rus: Вы теряете 1 ОЗ и получаете {CrimsonMantlePower:diff()} [gold]защиты[/gold] в начале хода.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu turno, pierde 1 PV y gana {CrimsonMantlePower:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น เสีย 1 HP และได้รับ {CrimsonMantlePower:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
translations.tur: Turunun başında 1 CP kaybet ve {CrimsonMantlePower:diff()} [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.

name: Cruelty
description: [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] enemies take an additional 25% damage.

translations.zhs: 有[gold]易伤[/gold]状态的敌人额外受到{CrueltyPower:diff()}%的伤害。
translations.esp: Los enemigos con [gold]vulnerabilidad[/gold] reciben un {CrueltyPower:diff()} % de daño adicional.
translations.fra: Les ennemis [gold]Vulnérables[/gold] subissent {CrueltyPower:diff()}% de dégâts supplémentaires.
translations.ita: I nemici con [gold]Vulnerabilità[/gold] subiscono un {CrueltyPower:diff()}% di danno extra.
translations.jpn: [gold]弱体[/gold]中の敵は、追加で{CrueltyPower:diff()}%のダメージを受ける。
translations.spa: Los enemigos [gold]Vulnerables[/gold] reciben un {CrueltyPower:diff()} % de daño adicional.
translations.tha: ศัตรูที่มี[gold]จุดอ่อน[/gold]ได้รับความเสียหายเพิ่ม {CrueltyPower:diff()}%

name: Cruelty+
description: [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] enemies take an additional 50% damage.

translations.zhs: 有[gold]易伤[/gold]状态的敌人额外受到{CrueltyPower:diff()}%的伤害。

translations.spa: Los enemigos [gold]Vulnerables[/gold] reciben un {CrueltyPower:diff()} % de daño adicional.
translations.tha: ศัตรูที่มี[gold]จุดอ่อน[/gold]ได้รับความเสียหายเพิ่ม {CrueltyPower:diff()}%

name: Dark Embrace
description:
Whenever a card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold],
draw 1 card.

translations.tha: ความมืดโอบกอด

translations.eng:
Whenever a card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold],
draw 1 card.
translations.zhs:
每当有一张牌被[gold]消耗[/gold]时，
抽1张牌。
translations.deu: Immer wenn eine Karte [gold]Erschöpft[/gold] wird, ziehe 1 Karte.
translations.ita:
Ogni volta che una carta è [gold]esaurita[/gold],
peschi 1 carta.
translations.jpn:
カードが[gold]廃棄[/gold]されるたび、
カードを1枚引く。
translations.ptb:
Sempre que uma carta for [gold]Exaurida[/gold],
compre 1 carta.
translations.spa:
Cuando una carta se [gold]Agote[/gold],
roba 1 carta.
translations.tha:
ทุกครั้งที่การ์ด[gold]สลาย[/gold]
จั่วการ์ด 1 ใบ
translations.tur:
Ne zaman bir kart [gold]Tüketilirse[/gold]
1 kart çek.

translations.tha: ป้องกัน

name: Demon Form
description: At the start of your turn, gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold].

translations.tha: ร่างปีศาจ

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在你的回合开始时，获得{StrengthPower:diff()}点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu: Erhalte immer zu Beginn deines Zuges {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Stärke[/gold].
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu turno, obtienes {StrengthPower:diff()} de [gold]fuerza[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, gagnez {StrengthPower:diff()} de [gold]Force[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo turno, ottieni {StrengthPower:diff()} di [gold]Forza[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início do seu turno, receba {StrengthPower:diff()} de [gold]Força[/gold].
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu turno, gana {StrengthPower:diff()} de [gold]Fuerza[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น ได้รับ {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]

description: At the start of your turn, gain 3 [gold]Strength[/gold].

name: Demonic Shield
description:
Lose 1 HP.
Give another player [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.kor:
체력을 {HpLoss:diff()} 잃습니다.
다른 플레이어에게 자신의
[gold]방어도[/gold]와 동일한 만큼의
[gold]방어도[/gold]를 줍니다.{InCombat:
([gold]방어도[/gold]를 {CalculatedBlock:diff()} 줍니다)|}

name: Demonic Shield+
description:
Lose 1 HP.
Give another player [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.kor:
체력을 {HpLoss:diff()} 잃습니다.
다른 플레이어에게 자신의
[gold]방어도[/gold]와 동일한 만큼의
[gold]방어도[/gold]를 줍니다.{InCombat:
([gold]방어도[/gold]를 {CalculatedBlock:diff()} 줍니다)|}

name: Dismantle
description:
Deal 8 damage.
If the enemy is [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], hits twice.

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy is [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], hits twice.
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
如果该敌人有[gold]易伤[/gold]状态，则攻击两次。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Trifft zweimal, falls der Gegner [gold]Verwundbar[/gold] ist.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Si el enemigo tiene [gold]vulnerabilidad[/gold], golpeas dos veces.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Si l'ennemi est [gold]Vulnérable[/gold], infligez ces dégâts 2 fois.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Se il nemico ha [gold]Vulnerabilità[/gold], colpisce due volte.
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
敵が[gold]弱体[/gold]状態の時、2回攻撃になる。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
대상 적이 [gold]취약[/gold] 상태라면,
2번 적중합니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Jeżeli przeciwnik jest [gold]Wrażliwy[/gold], uderza dwukrotnie.
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
Se o inimigo estiver [gold]Vulnerável[/gold], golpeie duas vezes.
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Наносит урон еще раз, если враг [gold]уязвим[/gold].
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Si el enemigo es [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], golpea dos veces.
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
ถ้าศัตรูมี[gold]จุดอ่อน[/gold] โจมตี 2 ครั้ง
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
Eğer düşman [gold]Savunmasız[/gold] ise iki kez vurur.

name: Dominate
description:
Apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] for each [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] on the enemy.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.eng:
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Gain {StrengthPerVulnerable:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] for each [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] on the enemy.
translations.zhs:
给予{VulnerablePower:diff()}层[gold]易伤[/gold]。
敌人身上每有一层[gold]易伤[/gold]，就获得{StrengthPerVulnerable:diff()}点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu:
Wende {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Verwundbar[/gold] an.
 Erhalte {StrengthPerVulnerable:diff()} [gold]Stärke[/gold] für jedes [gold]Verwundbar[/gold] auf dem Gegner.
translations.esp:
Aplicas {VulnerablePower:diff()} de [gold]vulnerabilidad[/gold].
Obtienes {StrengthPerVulnerable:diff()} de [gold]fuerza[/gold] por cada punto de [gold]vulnerabilidad[/gold] que tenga el enemigo.
translations.fra:
Appliquez [gold]Vulnérable[/gold] ({VulnerablePower:diff()}).
Gagnez {StrengthPerVulnerable:diff()} de [gold]Force[/gold] pour chaque incidence de [gold]Vulnérable[/gold] sur l'ennemi.
translations.ita:
Applichi {VulnerablePower:diff()} di [gold]Vulnerabilità[/gold].
Ottieni {StrengthPerVulnerable:diff()} di [gold]Forza[/gold] per ogni punto di [gold]Vulnerabilità[/gold] sul nemico.
translations.jpn:
[gold]弱体[/gold] {VulnerablePower:diff()}を付与する。
対象の敵に付与している[gold]弱体[/gold]1につき、[gold]筋力[/gold]{StrengthPerVulnerable:diff()}を得る。
translations.pol:
Nałóż {VulnerablePower:diff()} pkt. [gold]Wrażliwości[/gold].
Zyskaj {StrengthPerVulnerable:diff()} pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold] za każdy pkt. [gold]Wrażliwości[/gold] na przeciwniku.
translations.ptb:
Aplique {VulnerablePower:diff()} de [gold]Vulnerável[/gold].
Receba {StrengthPerVulnerable:diff()} de [gold]Força[/gold] por cada [gold]Vulnerável[/gold] no inimigo.
translations.spa:
Aplica {VulnerablePower:diff()} de [gold]Vulnerabilidad[/gold].
Gana {StrengthPerVulnerable:diff()} de [gold]Fuerza[/gold] por cada [gold]Vulnerabilidad[/gold] que tenga el enemigo.
translations.tur:
{VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Savunmasız[/gold] uygula.
Düşmandaki her [gold]Savunmasız[/gold] için {StrengthPerVulnerable:diff()} [gold]Kuvvet[/gold] elde et.

name: Dominate+
description:
Apply 2 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].

[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

name: Drum of Battle
description:
Draw 2 cards.
At the start of your turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

translations.tha: ลั่นกลองรบ

translations.eng:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
At the start of your turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
translations.zhs:
抽{Cards:diff()}张牌。
在你的回合开始时，[gold]消耗[/gold]你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]顶部的牌。
translations.deu:
Ziehe {Cards:diff()} Karten.
[gold]Erschöpfe[/gold] immer zu Beginn deines Zuges die oberste Karte deines [gold]Nachziehstapels[/gold].
translations.esp:
Robas {Cards:diff()} cartas.
Al inicio de tu turno, [gold]agotas[/gold] la carta en la parte superior del [gold]mazo de robo[/gold].
translations.fra:
Piochez {Cards:diff()} cartes.
Au début de votre tour, [gold]Épuisez[/gold] la carte du dessus de votre [gold]Pioche[/gold].
translations.ita:
Peschi {Cards:diff()} carte.
All'inizio del tuo turno, [gold]esaurisci[/gold] la carta in cima al tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold].
translations.jpn:
カードを{Cards:diff()}枚引く。
ターン開始時、[gold]山札[/gold]の一番上のカードを[gold]廃棄[/gold]する。
translations.kor:
카드를 {Cards:diff()}장 뽑습니다.
내 턴 시작 시,
[gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold] 맨 위의
카드를 [gold]소멸[/gold]시킵니다.
translations.pol:
Dobierz {Cards:diff()} karty.
Na początku tury [gold]Wyczerp[/gold] kartę ze szczytu [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Compre {Cards:diff()} cartas.
No início do seu turno, [gold]Exaure[/gold] a carta no topo da sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold].
translations.rus:
Вы добираете {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт}.
[gold]Сжигает[/gold] карту на верху [gold]стопки добора[/gold] в начале хода.
translations.spa:
Roba {Cards:diff()} cartas.
Al comienzo de tu turno, [gold]Agota[/gold] la primera carta de tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold].
translations.tha:
จั่วการ์ด {Cards:diff()} ใบ
ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น [gold]สลาย[/gold]การ์ดใบบนสุดของ[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]
translations.tur:
{Cards:diff()} kart çek.
Turunun başında [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'nin en üstündeki kartı [gold]Tüket[/gold].

name: Drum of Battle+
description:
Draw 3 cards.
At the start of your turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

translations.tha: ลั่นกลองรบ

translations.eng:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
At the start of your turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
translations.zhs:
抽{Cards:diff()}张牌。
在你的回合开始时，[gold]消耗[/gold]你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]顶部的牌。
translations.deu:
Ziehe {Cards:diff()} Karten.
[gold]Erschöpfe[/gold] immer zu Beginn deines Zuges die oberste Karte deines [gold]Nachziehstapels[/gold].
translations.esp:
Robas {Cards:diff()} cartas.
Al inicio de tu turno, [gold]agotas[/gold] la carta en la parte superior del [gold]mazo de robo[/gold].
translations.fra:
Piochez {Cards:diff()} cartes.
Au début de votre tour, [gold]Épuisez[/gold] la carte du dessus de votre [gold]Pioche[/gold].
translations.ita:
Peschi {Cards:diff()} carte.
All'inizio del tuo turno, [gold]esaurisci[/gold] la carta in cima al tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold].

name: Evil Eye
description:
Gain 8 [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain another 8 [gold]Block[/gold] if you have [gold]Exhausted[/gold] a card this turn.

translations.eng:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain another {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] if you have [gold]Exhausted[/gold] a card this turn.
translations.zhs:
获得{Block:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
如果你在本回合[gold]消耗[/gold]过卡牌，则额外获得{Block:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu:
Erhalte {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Erhalte weitere {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold], falls du in diesem Zug eine Karte [gold]Erschöpft[/gold] hast.
translations.esp:
Obtienes {Block:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
Obtienes {Block:diff()} [gold]bloqueo[/gold] extra si [gold]agotaste[/gold] una carta durante este turno.
translations.fra:
Gagnez {Block:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
Gagnez {Block:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold] de nouveau si vous avez [gold]Épuisé[/gold] une carte pendant ce tour.
translations.ita:
Ottieni {Block:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
Ottieni {Block:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold] extra se hai fatto [gold]esaurire[/gold] una carta in questo turno.
translations.jpn:
{Block:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
このターン、カードを[gold]廃棄[/gold]している場合、さらに{Block:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.kor:
[gold]방어도[/gold]를 {Block:diff()} 얻습니다.
이번 턴 동안 [gold]소멸[/gold]시킨
카드가 있다면 [gold]방어도[/gold]를
추가로 {Block:diff()} 얻습니다.
translations.pol:
Zyskaj {Block:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
Zyskaj dodatkowo {Block:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold], jeżeli [gold]Wyczerpano[/gold] kartę w tej turze.
translations.ptb:
Receba {Block:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
Receba {Block:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold] adicional se você [gold]Exauriu[/gold] uma carta neste turno.
translations.rus:
Дает {Block:diff()} [gold]защиты[/gold].
Дает еще {Block:diff()} [gold]защиты[/gold] , если вы [gold]сжигали[/gold] карты в этом ходу.
translations.spa:
Gana {Block:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
Gana {Block:diff()} más de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold] si has [gold]Agotado[/gold] una carta este turno.
translations.tha:
ได้รับ {Block:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
ได้รับเพิ่ม {Block:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]ถ้าคุณ[gold]สลาย[/gold]การ์ดไปในเทิร์นนี้
translations.tur:
{Block:diff()} [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.
Eğer bu tur bir kart [gold]Tükettiysen[/gold] {Block:diff()} [gold]Blok[/gold] daha elde et.

name: Expect a Fight
description:
Gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/ironclad_energy_icon.png[/img] for each Attack in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
You cannot gain
additional [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/ironclad_energy_icon.png[/img] this turn.

translations.eng:
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each Attack in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
You cannot gain
additional {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedEnergy:energyIcons()})|}
translations.zhs:
你的[gold]手牌[/gold]中每有一张攻击牌，就获得{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}。
你在本回合内
不能再获得{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}。{InCombat:
（获得{CalculatedEnergy:energyIcons()}）|}
translations.esp:
Obtienes {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} por cada carta de ataque en tu [gold]mano[/gold].
No puedes obtener
{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} adicional en este turno.{InCombat:
(Obtienes {CalculatedEnergy:energyIcons()})|}
translations.ita:
Ottieni {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} per ogni carta Attacco nella tua [gold]mano[/gold].
Non puoi ottenere
{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} extra in questo turno.{InCombat:
(Ottieni {CalculatedEnergy:energyIcons()})|}
translations.kor:
[gold]손[/gold]에 있는 공격 카드 1장당
{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}를 얻습니다.
이번 턴에 추가로
{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}를 얻을 수 없습니다.{InCombat:
({CalculatedEnergy:energyIcons()}를 얻습니다.)|}
translations.ptb:
Receba {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} por cada Ataque na sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
Você não pode receber
{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} adicional neste turno.{InCombat:
(Receba {CalculatedEnergy:energyIcons()}.)|}
translations.spa:
Gana {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} por cada Ataque en tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
No puedes ganar
más {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} este turno.{InCombat:
(Gana {CalculatedEnergy:energyIcons()}).|}
translations.tha:
ได้รับ {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} ตามจำนวนการ์ดโจมตีใน[gold]มือ[/gold]{InCombat:
(ได้รับ {CalculatedEnergy:energyIcons()})|}
translations.tur:
[gold]El[/gold]'indeki her Saldırı için {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} elde et.
Bu tur
fazladan {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} elde edemezsin.{InCombat:
({CalculatedEnergy:energyIcons()} elde et)|}

name: Feed
description:
Deal 10 damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], raise your Max HP by 3.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.tha: กัดกิน

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], raise your Max HP by {MaxHp:diff()}.
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
[gold]斩杀[/gold]时，永久获得{MaxHp:diff()}点最大生命值。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Falls [gold]Tödlich[/gold], erhöhe deine max. TP um {MaxHp:diff()}.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Si es [gold]fatal[/gold], aumentan tus PV máx. en {MaxHp:diff()}.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
[gold]Coup de grâce[/gold] : augmentez vos PV Max de {MaxHp:diff()}.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Se è [gold]letale[/gold], aumenti i tuoi PV massimi di {MaxHp:diff()}.
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
[gold]リーサル[/gold]時、最大HPが{MaxHp:diff()}増加する。
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Po [gold]Uśmierceniu[/gold] przeciwnika zyskaj {MaxHp:diff()} maks. PŻ.
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
Se for [gold]Letal[/gold], aumente seus PV Máximos em {MaxHp:diff()}.
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Повышает максимальные ОЗ на {MaxHp:diff()}, если [gold]казнит[/gold] врага.
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Si el daño es [gold]Letal[/gold], aumenta tus PV máx. en {MaxHp:diff()}.
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
ถ้า[gold]สังหาร[/gold] เพิ่ม {MaxHp:diff()} HP สูงสุด
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
Eğer [gold]Öldürürse[/gold] maksimum CP'ni {MaxHp:diff()} artır.

description:

If [gold]Fatal[/gold], raise your Max HP by 4.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

name: Feel No Pain
description: Whenever a card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], gain 3 [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.tha: สภาพไร้เจ็บปวด

translations.zhs: 每当有一张牌被[gold]消耗[/gold]时，获得{Power:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn eine Karte [gold]Erschöpft[/gold] wird, erhalte {Power:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che una carta viene [gold]esaurita[/gold], ottieni {Power:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: カードが[gold]廃棄[/gold]されるたび、{Power:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.ptb: Sempre que uma carta for [gold]Exaurida[/gold], receba {Power:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando una carta sea [gold]Agotada[/gold], gana {Power:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่การ์ด[gold]สลาย[/gold] ได้รับ {Power:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]

name: Fiend Fire
description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Deal 7 damage for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.tha: เพลิงมาร

translations.eng:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
translations.zhs:
[gold]消耗[/gold]所有[gold]手牌[/gold]。
每张被[gold]消耗[/gold]的牌造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
translations.deu:
[gold]Erschöpfe[/gold] deine [gold]Hand[/gold].
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden für jede [gold]Erschöpfte[/gold] Karte zu.
translations.esp:
[gold]Agotas[/gold] tu [gold]mano[/gold].
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño por cada carta [gold]agotada[/gold].
translations.fra:
[gold]Épuisez[/gold] votre [gold]Main[/gold].
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts pour chaque carte [gold]Épuisée[/gold] ainsi.
translations.ita:
[gold]Esaurisci[/gold] la tua [gold]mano[/gold].
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno per ogni carta [gold]esaurita[/gold].
translations.jpn:
[gold]手札[/gold]をすべて[gold]廃棄[/gold]する。
[gold]廃棄[/gold]したカード1枚につき、{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
[gold]손[/gold]에 있는 모든 카드를
[gold]소멸[/gold]시킵니다.
[gold]소멸[/gold]시킨 카드 1장당
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
translations.pol:
[gold]Wyczerp[/gold] swoją [gold]rękę[/gold].
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń za każdą [gold]Wyczerpaną[/gold] kartę.
translations.ptb:
[gold]Exaure[/gold] a sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano por cada carta [gold]Exaurida[/gold].
translations.rus:
[gold]Сжигает[/gold] все карты в [gold]руке[/gold].
Наносит по {Damage:diff()} урона за каждую.
translations.spa:
[gold]Agota[/gold] tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño por cada carta [gold]Agotada[/gold].
translations.tha:
[gold]สลาย[/gold]ทั้ง[gold]มือ[/gold]
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()} ตามจำนวนการ์ดที่[gold]สลาย[/gold]

[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

name: Fight Me!
description:
Deal 5 damage twice.
Gain 3 [gold]Strength[/gold].
The enemy gains 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].

translations.tha: มาสู้กัน!

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
The enemy gains {EnemyStrength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害两次。
获得{StrengthPower:diff()}点[gold]力量[/gold]。
该敌人获得{EnemyStrength:diff()}点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu:
Füge zweimal {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Erhalte {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Stärke[/gold].
Der Gegner erhält {EnemyStrength:diff()} [gold]Stärke[/gold].
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño dos veces.
Obtienes {StrengthPower:diff()} de [gold]fuerza[/gold].
El enemigo obtiene {EnemyStrength:diff()} de [gold]fuerza[/gold].
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts 2 fois.
Gagnez {StrengthPower:diff()} de [gold]Force[/gold].
L'ennemi gagne {EnemyStrength:diff()} de [gold]Force[/gold].
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno due volte.
Ottieni {StrengthPower:diff()} di [gold]Forza[/gold].
Il nemico ottiene {EnemyStrength:diff()} di [gold]Forza[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを2回与える。
[gold]筋力[/gold]{StrengthPower:diff()}を得る。
敵は[gold]筋力[/gold]{EnemyStrength:diff()}を得る。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()}만큼 2번 줍니다.
[gold]힘[/gold]을 {StrengthPower:diff()} 얻습니다.
대상 적이 [gold]힘[/gold]을 {EnemyStrength:diff()} 얻습니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń dwukrotnie.
Zyskaj {StrengthPower:diff()} pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold].
Przeciwnik otrzymuje {EnemyStrength:diff()} pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano duas vezes.
Receba {StrengthPower:diff()} de [gold]Força[/gold].
O inimigo recebe {EnemyStrength:diff()} de [gold]Força[/gold].
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона 2 раза.
Дает {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]силы[/gold].
Враг получает {EnemyStrength:diff()} [gold]силы[/gold].
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño dos veces.
Gana {StrengthPower:diff()} de [gold]Fuerza[/gold].
El enemigo gana {EnemyStrength:diff()} de [gold]Fuerza[/gold].
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()} จำนวน 2 ครั้ง
ได้รับ {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]
ศัตรูได้รับ {EnemyStrength:diff()} [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]
translations.tur:
İki kez {Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
{StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Kuvvet[/gold] elde et.
Düşman {EnemyStrength:diff()} [gold]Kuvvet[/gold] elde eder.

name: Flame Barrier
description:
Gain 12 [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever you are attacked this turn, deal 4 damage back.

translations.tha: กำแพงอัคคี

translations.eng:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever you are attacked this turn, deal {DamageBack:diff()} damage back.
translations.zhs:
获得{Block:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
你在这个回合每受到一次攻击，都会对攻击者造成{DamageBack:diff()}点伤害。
translations.deu:
Erhalte {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Immer wenn du in diesem Zug angegriffen wirst, wirf {DamageBack:diff()} Schaden zurück.
translations.esp:
Obtienes {Block:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
Si te atacan durante este turno, inliges {DamageBack:diff()} de daño.
translations.fra:
Gagnez {Block:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
Lorsque vous vous faites attaquer pendant ce tour, infligez {DamageBack:diff()} dégâts en retour.
translations.ita:
Ottieni {Block:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
Ogni volta che subisci un attacco in questo turno, infliggi {DamageBack:diff()} di danno come contrattacco.
translations.jpn:
{Block:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
このターン、攻撃を受けるたび、攻撃した敵に{DamageBack:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
[gold]방어도[/gold]를 {Block:diff()} 얻습니다.
이번 턴에 공격을 받을
때마다, 공격한 적에게
피해를 {DamageBack:diff()} 줍니다.
translations.pol:
Zyskaj {Block:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
Kiedykolwiek przeciwnik cię zaatakuje w tej turze, zadaj mu {DamageBack:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
translations.ptb:
Receba {Block:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
Sempre que você sofrer um ataque neste turno, cause {DamageBack:diff()} de dano.
translations.rus:
Дает {Block:diff()} [gold]защиты[/gold].
Наносит {DamageBack:diff()} урона в ответ на каждую атаку до следующего хода.
translations.spa:
Gana {Block:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
Cuando te ataquen durante este turno, inflige {DamageBack:diff()} de daño al atacante.
translations.tha:
ได้รับ {Block:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
ทุกครั้งที่คุณถูกโจมตีในเทิร์นนี้ สร้างความเสียหายกลับไป {DamageBack:diff()}
translations.tur:
{Block:diff()} [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.
Bu tur her saldırıldığında geriye {DamageBack:diff()} hasar ver.

name: Forgotten Ritual
description:
If you [gold]Exhausted[/gold] a card this turn, gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/ironclad_energy_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/ironclad_energy_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/ironclad_energy_icon.png[/img].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.eng: If you [gold]Exhausted[/gold] a card this turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.zhs: 如果你在本回合[gold]消耗过[/gold]卡牌，则获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。
translations.deu: Falls du in diesem Zug eine Karte [gold]Erschöpft[/gold] hast, erhalte {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.esp: Si [gold]agotaste[/gold] una carta en este turno, obtienes {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.fra: Si vous avez [gold]Épuisé[/gold] une carte ce tour, gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.ita: Se hai [gold]esaurito[/gold] una carta in questo turno, ottieni {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.jpn: このターン、カードを[gold]廃棄[/gold]していた場合、{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。
translations.pol: Jeżeli [gold]Wyczerpano[/gold] kartę w tej turze, zyskaj {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.ptb: Se você [gold]Exauriu[/gold] uma carta neste turno, receba {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.rus: Дает {Energy:energyIcons()}, если вы [gold]сжигали[/gold] карты в этом ходу.
translations.spa: Si has [gold]Agotado[/gold] una carta este turno, gana {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.tha: ถ้าคุณเคย[gold]สลาย[/gold]การ์ดในเทิร์นนี้ ได้รับ {Energy:energyIcons()}
translations.tur: Eğer bu tur bir kartı [gold]Tükettiysen[/gold] {Energy:energyIcons()} elde et.

name: Havoc
description: Play the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.

translations.tha: นำพาหายนะ

translations.eng: Play the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
translations.zhs: 打出[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]顶部的牌并将其[gold]消耗[/gold]。
translations.deu: Spiele die oberste Karte deines [gold]Nachziehstapels[/gold] und [gold]Erschöpfe[/gold] sie.
translations.esp: Juegas la carta de la parte superior del [gold]mazo de robo[/gold] y se [gold]agota[/gold].
translations.fra: Jouez la carte du dessus de votre [gold]Pioche[/gold] et [gold]Épuisez[/gold]-la.
translations.ita: Gioca la prima carta del tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold] ed [gold]esauriscila[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]山札[/gold]の一番上にあるカードをプレイし、それを[gold]廃棄[/gold]する。
translations.kor:
[gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold] 맨 위의
카드를 사용한 뒤
[gold]소멸[/gold]시킵니다.
translations.pol: Zagraj kartę ze szczytu [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold] i [gold]Wyczerp[/gold] ją.
translations.ptb: Jogue a carta no topo da sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold] e a [gold]Exaure[/gold].
translations.rus: Вы разыгрываете и [gold]сжигаете[/gold] карту с верха [gold]стопки добора[/gold].
translations.spa: Juega la primera carta de tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold] y [gold]Agótala[/gold].
translations.tha: เล่นการ์ดใบบนสุดของ[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]แล้ว[gold]สลาย[/gold]มัน
translations.tur: [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'nin en üstündeki kartı oyna ve [gold]Tüket[/gold].

name: Havoc+
description: Play the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.

translations.tha: นำพาหายนะ

translations.eng: Play the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
translations.zhs: 打出[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]顶部的牌并将其[gold]消耗[/gold]。
translations.deu: Spiele die oberste Karte deines [gold]Nachziehstapels[/gold] und [gold]Erschöpfe[/gold] sie.
translations.esp: Juegas la carta de la parte superior del [gold]mazo de robo[/gold] y se [gold]agota[/gold].
translations.fra: Jouez la carte du dessus de votre [gold]Pioche[/gold] et [gold]Épuisez[/gold]-la.
translations.ita: Gioca la prima carta del tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold] ed [gold]esauriscila[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]山札[/gold]の一番上にあるカードをプレイし、それを[gold]廃棄[/gold]する。
translations.kor:
[gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold] 맨 위의
카드를 사용한 뒤
[gold]소멸[/gold]시킵니다.
translations.pol: Zagraj kartę ze szczytu [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold] i [gold]Wyczerp[/gold] ją.
translations.ptb: Jogue a carta no topo da sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold] e a [gold]Exaure[/gold].
translations.rus: Вы разыгрываете и [gold]сжигаете[/gold] карту с верха [gold]стопки добора[/gold].
translations.spa: Juega la primera carta de tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold] y [gold]Agótala[/gold].
translations.tha: เล่นการ์ดใบบนสุดของ[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]แล้ว[gold]สลาย[/gold]มัน
translations.tur: [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'nin en üstündeki kartı oyna ve [gold]Tüket[/gold].

name: Headbutt
description:
Deal 9 damage.
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

translations.tha: โขกหัว

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
将你[gold]弃牌堆[/gold]中的一张牌放到[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]顶部。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Lege eine Karte aus deinem [gold]Abwurfstapel[/gold] auf deinen [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold].
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Colocas una carta de la [gold]pila de descarte[/gold] en la parte superior del [gold]mazo de robo[/gold].
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Placez une carte de votre [gold]Défausse[/gold] sur le dessus de votre [gold]Pioche[/gold].
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Metti una carta dalla tua [gold]pila degli scarti[/gold] in cima al tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
[gold]捨て札[/gold]のカードを1枚[gold]山札[/gold]の一番上に置く。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
[gold]버린 카드 더미[/gold]에서
카드를 1장 [gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold]
맨 위에 놓습니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Przenieś kartę ze [gold]stosu kart odrzuconych[/gold] na szczyt [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
Coloque uma carta da sua [gold]Pilha de Descarte[/gold] no topo da sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold].
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Вы перекладываете карту из [gold]стопки сброса[/gold] на верх [gold]стопки добора[/gold].
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Coloca una carta de tu [gold]Pila de descarte[/gold] en la parte superior de tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold].
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
นำการ์ด 1 ใบจาก[gold]กองทิ้ง[/gold]ไปวางไว้บนสุดของ[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
[gold]Atık Deste[/gold]'nden bir kartı [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'nin en üstüne koy.

name: Hellraiser
description: Whenever you draw a card containing “Strike”, it is played against a random enemy.

translations.tha: ปลุกนรก

translations.eng: Whenever you draw a card containing “Strike”, it is played against a random enemy.
translations.zhs: 每当你抽到名字中有“打击”的牌时，对一名随机敌人打出这张牌。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du eine Karte ziehst, die “Schlag” beinhaltet, spiele sie gegen einen zufälligen Gegner.
translations.esp: Al robar una carta que tenga la palabra «Golpe», se jugará contra un enemigo al azar.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous piochez une carte contenant « Frappe », elle est immédiatement jouée sur un ennemi aléatoire.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che peschi una carta contenente la parola "Colpo", questa viene giocata contro un nemico casuale.
translations.jpn: 名前に「ストライク」を含むカードを引くたび、それをランダムな敵に対して自動でプレイする。
translations.kor:
이름에 “타격”이 포함된
카드를 뽑을 때마다,
무작위 적에게 사용합니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek dobierzesz kartę zawierającą „uderzenie” w nazwie, zaatakuj nią losowego przeciwnika.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você comprar uma carta contendo "Golpe", ela é jogada contra um inimigo aleatório.
translations.rus: Когда вы добираете карту с «ударом» в названии, она разыгрывается против случайного врага.
translations.spa: Cuando robes una carta que contenga «Golpe», se juega contra un enemigo aleatorio.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณจั่วการ์ดที่มีคำว่า "จู่โจม" มันจะถูกเล่นใส่ศัตรู 1 ตัวแบบสุ่ม
translations.tur: İsminde "Saldırı" bulunan bir kart çektiğinde rastgele bir düşmana karşı oynanır.

name: Hemokinesis
description:
Lose 2 HP.
Deal 15 damage.

translations.tha: คาถาโลหิต

translations.zhs:
失去{HpLoss:diff()}点生命。
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
translations.jpn:
HPを{HpLoss:diff()}失う。
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.tha:
เสีย {HpLoss:diff()} HP
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}

name: Hemokinesis+
description:
Lose 2 HP.
Deal 20 damage.

translations.tha: คาถาโลหิต

translations.zhs:
失去{HpLoss:diff()}点生命。
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。

translations.tha:

สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}

name: Howl from Beyond
description:
Deal 16 damage to ALL enemies.
At the start of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], play it.

translations.tha: เสียงหอนจากเบื้องบน

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
At the start of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], play it.
translations.zhs:
对所有敌人造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
在你的回合开始时，如果这张牌在你的[gold]消耗牌堆[/gold]中，则将其打出。
translations.deu:
Füge ALLEN Gegnern {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Falls diese Karte zu Beginn deines Zuges in deinem [gold]Erschöpfungsstapel[/gold] ist, spiele sie.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
Si al inicio de tu turno esta carta está en tu [gold]pila de agotamiento[/gold], puedes jugarla.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
Au début de votre tour, si cette carte est dans votre pile de cartes [gold]Épuisées[/gold], jouez-la.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
All'inizio del tuo turno, se questa carta è nella tua [gold]pila delle carte esaurite[/gold], giocala.
translations.jpn:
すべての敵に{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
ターン開始時、これが[gold]廃棄札[/gold]にある場合、それをプレイする。
translations.kor:
모든 적에게
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
내 턴 시작 시, 이 카드가
[gold]소멸된 카드 더미[/gold]에 있다면,
사용합니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
Na początku tury zagraj tę kartę, jeżeli znajduje się na [gold]stosie kart wyczerpanych[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
No início do seu turno, esta carta é jogada se estiver na sua pilha de [gold]Cartas Exauridas[/gold].
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона ВСЕМ врагам.
Разыгрывается в начале хода, если находится в [gold]стопке пепла[/gold].
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
Si esta carta se encuentra en tu [gold]Pila de agotamiento[/gold] al comienzo de tu turno, se juega.
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()} ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น เล่นจาก[gold]กองสลาย[/gold]
translations.tur:
TÜM düşmanlara {Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
Bu kart, turunun başında [gold]Tüketme Deste[/gold]'nde ise kendi kendine oynanır.

name: Impervious
description:
Gain 30 [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.tha: ฟันแทงไม่เข้า
ได้รับ {Block:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]

name: Impervious+
description:
Gain 40 [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.tha: ฟันแทงไม่เข้า
ได้รับ {Block:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]

name: Infernal Blade
description:
Add a random Attack into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.tha: นรกศาสตรา

translations.eng: Add a random Attack into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
translations.zhs: 将一张随机攻击牌加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。那张牌在本回合内可以免费打出。
translations.deu: Erhalte einen zufälligen Angriff auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold]. Er ist in diesem Zug kostenlos spielbar.
translations.esp: Agregas una carta de ataque a tu [gold]mano[/gold]. En este turno, puedes jugarla sin costo.
translations.fra: Ajoutez une Attaque aléatoire à votre [gold]Main[/gold]. Elle coûte [blue]0[/blue] ce tour.
translations.ita: Aggiungi una carta Attacco casuale alla tua [gold]mano[/gold]. Questa carta puoi giocarla senza nessun costo in questo turno.
translations.jpn: ランダムなアタックを1枚[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。このターン、それはコストを支払わずにプレイできる。
translations.kor:
무작위 공격 카드를 1장
[gold]손[/gold]으로 가져옵니다.
이번 턴 동안 그 카드를
비용 없이 사용할 수 있습니다.
translations.pol: Dodaj losowy Atak do [gold]ręki[/gold]. W tej turze jest darmowy.
translations.ptb: Adicione um Ataque aleatório na sua [gold]Mão[/gold]. Ele não tem custo neste turno.
translations.rus: Добавляет в [gold]руку[/gold] случайную Атаку. В этом ходу она бесплатная.
translations.spa: Añade un Ataque aleatorio a tu [gold]Mano[/gold]. Puedes jugarlo gratis este turno.
translations.tha: เพิ่มการ์ดโจมตี 1 ใบแบบสุ่มใส่[gold]มือ[/gold] มันเล่นฟรีในเทิร์นนี้
translations.tur: [gold]El[/gold]'ine rastgele bir Saldırı ekle. Bu tur oynaması ücretsiz olur.

name: Infernal Blade+
description:
Add a random Attack into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.tha: นรกศาสตรา

translations.pol: Dodaj losowy Atak do [gold]ręki[/gold]. W tej turze jest darmowy.
translations.ptb: Adicione um Ataque aleatório na sua [gold]Mão[/gold]. Ele não tem custo neste turno.
translations.rus: Добавляет в [gold]руку[/gold] случайную Атаку. В этом ходу она бесплатная.
translations.spa: Añade un Ataque aleatorio a tu [gold]Mano[/gold]. Puedes jugarlo gratis este turno.
translations.tha: เพิ่มการ์ดโจมตี 1 ใบแบบสุ่มใส่[gold]มือ[/gold] มันเล่นฟรีในเทิร์นนี้
translations.tur: [gold]El[/gold]'ine rastgele bir Saldırı ekle. Bu tur oynaması ücretsiz olur.

name: Inferno
description:
At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP.
Whenever you lose HP on your turn, deal 6 damage to ALL enemies.

translations.tha: เพลิงโลกันตร์

translations.eng:
At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP.
Whenever you lose HP on your turn, deal {InfernoPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs:
在你的回合开始时，失去1点生命。
每当你在你的回合内失去生命时，对所有敌人造成{InfernoPower:diff()}点伤害。
translations.deu:
Verliere immer zu Beginn deines Zuges 1 TP.
Immer wenn du in deinem Zug TP verlierst, füge ALLEN Gegnern {InfernoPower:diff()} Schaden zu.
translations.esp:
Al comienzo de tu turno, pierdes 1 PV.
Cada vez que pierdes PV en tu turno, infliges {InfernoPower:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra:
Au début de votre tour, perdez 1 PV.
Lorsque vous perdez des PV durant votre tour, infligez {InfernoPower:diff()} dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita:
All'inizio del tuo turno, perdi 1 PV
Ogni volta che perdi PV nel tuo turno, infliggi {InfernoPower:diff()} di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn:
ターン開始時、HPを1失う。
自身のターンにHPを失うたび、すべての敵に{InfernoPower:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
내 턴 시작 시,
체력을 1 잃습니다.
내 턴 동안 체력을
잃을 때마다, 모든 적에게
피해를 {InfernoPower:diff()} 줍니다.
translations.pol:
Na początku tury utrać 1 PŻ.
Kiedykolwiek utracisz PŻ podczas swojej tury, zadaj {InfernoPower:diff()} pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
translations.ptb:
No início do seu turno, perca 1 PV.
Sempre que você perder PV no seu turno, cause {InfernoPower:diff()} de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus:
Вы теряете 1 ОЗ в начале хода.
Наносит {InfernoPower:diff()} урона ВСЕМ врагам, когда вы теряете ОЗ в свой ход.
translations.spa:
Al comienzo de tu turno, pierde 1 PV.
Cuando pierdas PV durante tu turno, inflige {InfernoPower:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha:
ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น เสีย 1 HP
ทุกครั้งที่คุณเสีย HP ในเทิร์นของคุณ สร้างความเสียหาย {InfernoPower:diff()} ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur:
Turunun başında 1 CP kaybet.
Turunda her CP kaybettiğinde TÜM düşmanlara {InfernoPower:diff()} hasar ver.

ได้รับ {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]

translations.tha: คลื่นคมดาบ

translations.zhs:
获得{Block:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
translations.jpn:
{Block:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。

translations.tha:

name: Juggernaut
description: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold], deal 5 damage to a random enemy.

translations.tha: กำลังภายใน

translations.eng: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold], deal {JuggernautPower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
translations.zhs: 每当你获得[gold]格挡[/gold]时，对随机敌人造成{JuggernautPower:diff()}点伤害。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du [gold]Block[/gold] erhältst, füge einem zufälligen Gegner {JuggernautPower:diff()} Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Al obtener [gold]bloqueo[/gold], infliges {JuggernautPower:diff()} de daño a un enemigo al azar.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous gagnez de l'[gold]Armure[/gold], infligez {JuggernautPower:diff()} dégâts à un ennemi aléatoire.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che ottieni [gold]Blocco[/gold], infliggi {JuggernautPower:diff()} di danno a un nemico casuale.
translations.jpn: [gold]ブロック[/gold]を得るたび、ランダムな敵に{JuggernautPower:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
[gold]방어도[/gold]를 얻을 때마다,
무작위 적에게
피해를 {JuggernautPower:diff()} 줍니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek zyskasz [gold]Blok[/gold], zadaj {JuggernautPower:diff()} pkt. obrażeń losowemu przeciwnikowi.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você receber [gold]Proteção[/gold], cause {JuggernautPower:diff()} de dano a um inimigo aleatório.
translations.rus: Наносит {JuggernautPower:diff()} урона случайному врагу, когда вы получаете [gold]защиту[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando ganes [gold]Bloqueo[/gold], inflige {JuggernautPower:diff()} de daño a un enemigo aleatorio.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่ได้รับ[gold]บล็อก[/gold] สร้างความเสียหาย {JuggernautPower:diff()} ใส่ศัตรู 1 ตัวแบบสุ่ม
translations.tur: Bu tur her [gold]Blok[/gold] elde ettiğinde rastgele bir düşmana {JuggernautPower:diff()} hasar ver.

description: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold], deal 7 damage to a random enemy.

name: Juggling
description: Add a copy of the third [gold]Attack[/gold] you play each turn into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

translations.eng: Add a copy of the third [gold]Attack[/gold] you play each turn into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.zhs: 将你在每回合打出的第三张[gold]攻击牌[/gold]的复制品加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
translations.deu: Erhalte in jedem Zug eine Kopie des dritten gespielten [gold]Angriffs[/gold] auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.esp: Agregas una copia de la tercera carta de [gold]ataque[/gold] que juegues en cada turno a tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra: Ajoutez une copie de la troisième [gold]Attaque[/gold] que vous jouez chaque tour à votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita: Aggiungi una copia della terza carta [gold]Attacco[/gold] che giochi in ogni turno alla tua [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.jpn: 毎ターン、3枚目にプレイした[gold]アタック[/gold]のコピーを1枚[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。
translations.kor:
매 턴마다 세 번째로
사용하는 [gold]공격[/gold] 카드의
복사본을 1장 [gold]손[/gold]으로
가져옵니다.
translations.pol: W każdej turze skopiuj co trzeci zagrany [gold]Atak[/gold] i dodaj go do [gold]ręki[/gold].
translations.ptb: Adicione uma cópia do terceiro [gold]Ataque[/gold] que você jogar a cada turno na sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.rus: Добавляет в [gold]руку[/gold] копию каждой третьей [gold]Атаки[/gold], разыгранной за ход.
translations.spa: Añade una copia del tercer [gold]Ataque[/gold] que juegues cada turno a tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
translations.tha: เพิ่มสำเนา 1 ใบของการ์ด[gold]โจมตี[/gold]ใบที่ 3 ที่คุณเล่นในแต่ละเทิร์นใส่[gold]มือ[/gold]
translations.tur: Her tur oynadığın üçüncü [gold]Saldırı[/gold] kartının bir kopyasını [gold]El[/gold]'ine koy.

name: Juggling+
description:
[gold]Innate[/gold].

name: Mangle
description:
Deal 15 damage.
Enemy loses 10 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Enemy loses {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
敌人在本回合失去{StrengthLoss:diff()}点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Der Gegner verliert für diesen Zug {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Stärke[/gold].
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
El enemigo pierde {StrengthLoss:diff()} de [gold]fuerza[/gold] en este turno.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
L'ennemi perd {StrengthLoss:diff()} de [gold]Force[/gold] jusqu'à la fin du tour.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Il nemico perde {StrengthLoss:diff()} di [gold]Forza[/gold] in questo turno.
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
ターン終了時まで敵は[gold]筋力[/gold]{StrengthLoss:diff()}を失う。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
이번 턴 동안 적이
[gold]힘[/gold]을 {StrengthLoss:diff()} 잃습니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Przeciwnik traci {StrengthLoss:diff()} pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold] w tej turze.
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
O inimigo perde {StrengthLoss:diff()} de [gold]Força[/gold] neste turno.
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Отнимает у врага {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]силы[/gold] на этот ход.
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
El enemigo pierde {StrengthLoss:diff()} de [gold]Fuerza[/gold] este turno.
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
ศัตรูเสีย {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]ในเทิร์นนี้
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
Düşman bu turda {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Kuvvet[/gold] kaybeder.

name: Molten Fist
description:
Deal 10 damage.
Double the enemy's [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
将该敌人身上的[gold]易伤[/gold]层数翻倍。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Verdopple [gold]Verwundbar[/gold] auf diesem Gegner.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Duplicas los puntos de [gold]vulnerabilidad[/gold] del enemigo.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Doublez le nombre d'incidences de [gold]Vulnérable[/gold] sur l'ennemi.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Raddoppi la [gold]Vulnerabilità[/gold] del nemico.
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
敵の[gold]弱体[/gold]を2倍にする。
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Podwój liczbę pkt. [gold]Wrażliwości[/gold] na przeciwniku.
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.

Double the enemy's [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].

将该敌人身上的[gold]易伤[/gold]层数翻倍。

translations.esp:

name: One-Two Punch
description: This turn, your next Attack is played an extra time.

translations.eng: This turn, your next {Attacks:cond:>1?{Attacks:diff()} Attacks are|Attack is} played an extra time.
translations.zhs: 在这个回合，你打出的下{Attacks:diff()}张攻击牌会被额外打出一次。
translations.deu: {Attacks:cond:>1?Deine nächsten {Attacks:diff()} Angriffe|Dein nächster Angriff} in diesem Zug {Attacks:cond:>1?werden|wird} ein weiteres Mal gespielt.
translations.esp: En este turno, podrás jugar otra vez {Attacks:cond:>1?las próximas {Attacks:diff()} cartas de ataque| la próxima carta de ataque} que juegues.
translations.fra: {Attacks:cond:>1?Les {Attacks:diff()} prochaines Attaques que vous jouez ce tour seront jouées|La prochaine Attaque que vous jouez ce tour sera jouée} une fois supplémentaire.
translations.ita: In questo turno, potrai giocare una volta in più {Attacks:cond:>1?le prossime {Attacks:diff()} carte Attacco|la prossima carta Attacco} che giochi.
translations.jpn: このターン、次にプレイする{Attacks:cond:>1?{Attacks:diff()}枚のアタック|アタック}をもう1回プレイする。
translations.pol: W tej turze {Attacks:cond:>1?{Attacks:diff()} następne Ataki zostaną zagrane|następny Atak zostanie zagrany} dwukrotnie.
translations.ptb: Neste turno, {Attacks:cond:>1?seus próximos {Attacks:diff()} Ataques são jogados|seu próximo Ataque é jogado} uma vez adicional.
translations.rus: В этом ходу {Attacks:cond:>1?{Attacks:diff()} следующие Атаки разыгрываются|следующая Атака разыгрывается} еще 1 раз.
translations.spa: Este turno, {Attacks:cond:>1?tus siguientes {Attacks:diff()} Ataques se juegan|tu siguiente Ataque se juega} una vez más.
translations.tha: ในเทิร์นนี้ การ์ดโจมตีอีก {Attacks:cond:>1?{Attacks:diff()}|1} ใบจะถูกเล่นอีกครั้ง
translations.tur: Bu tur oynayacağın sonraki {Attacks:cond:>1?{Attacks:diff()} Saldırı|Saldırı} bir kez daha oynanır.

translations.spa: Este turno, {Attacks:cond:>1?tus siguientes {Attacks:diff()} Ataques se juegan|tu siguiente Ataque se juega} una vez más.

name: Pact's End
description:
Can only be played if you have 3 or more cards in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
Deal 17 damage to ALL enemies.

translations.eng:
Can only be played if you have {Cards:diff()} or more {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs:
只有在你的[gold]消耗牌堆[/gold]拥有大于等于{Cards:diff()}张牌的时候才能被打出。
对所有敌人造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
translations.deu:
Nur spielbar, wenn du {Cards:diff()} oder mehr {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten} in deinem [gold]Erschöpfungsstapel[/gold] hast.
Füge ALLEN Gegnern {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
translations.esp:
Solo se puede jugar si tienes {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} o más en la [gold]pila de agotamiento[/gold].
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra:
Ne peut être joué que si votre pile de cartes [gold]Épuisées[/gold] contient {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carte|cartes} ou plus.
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita:
Puoi giocarla solo se hai {Cards:diff()} o più {Cards:plural:carta|carte} nella tua [gold]pila delle carte esaurite[/gold].
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn:
[gold]廃棄札[/gold]にカードが{Cards:diff()}枚以上ある場合のみプレイ可能
すべての敵に{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
[gold]소멸된 카드 더미[/gold]에
카드가 {Cards:diff()}장 이상 있을 때만
사용할 수 있습니다.
모든 적에게
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
translations.pol:
Można zagrać, jeśli masz co najmniej {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart} na [gold]stosie kart wyczerpanych[/gold].
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
translations.ptb:
Somente pode ser jogada se você possuir {Cards:diff()} ou mais {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} na sua pilha de [gold]Cartas Exauridas[/gold].
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus:
Можно разыграть, только если в [gold]стопке пепла[/gold] не менее {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural(ru):карты|карт|карт}.
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона ВСЕМ врагам.
translations.spa:
Solo puede jugarse si tienes {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} o más en tu [gold]Pila de agotamiento[/gold].
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha:
จะเล่นได้ก็ต่อเมื่อคุณมีการ์ด {Cards:diff()} ใบขึ้นไปใน[gold]กองสลาย[/gold]
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()} ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur:
[gold]Tüketme Deste[/gold]'nde sadece {Cards:diff()} veya daha fazla {Cards:plural:kart|kart} varsa oynanabilir.
TÜM düşmanlara {Damage:diff()} hasar ver.

name: Pact's End+
description:

Deal 23 damage to ALL enemies.

name: Perfected Strike
description:
Deal 6 damage.
Deals 2 additional damage for ALL your cards containing “Strike”.

translations.jpn: パーフェクトストライク
translations.tha: จู่โจมสมบูรณ์แบบ

translations.eng:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for ALL your cards containing “Strike”.
translations.zhs:
造成{CalculatedDamage:diff()}点伤害。
你每有一张名字中含有“打击”的牌，伤害+{ExtraDamage:diff()}。
translations.deu:
Füge {CalculatedDamage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Fügt {ExtraDamage:diff()} Schaden mehr für ALLE deine “Schlag” beinhaltenden Karten zu.
translations.esp:
Inflige {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de daño.
Inflige {ExtraDamage:diff()} de daño adicional por TODAS tus cartas que contengan la palabra «Golpe».
translations.fra:
Infligez {CalculatedDamage:diff()} dégâts.
Inflige {ExtraDamage:diff()} dégâts supplémentaires pour CHACUNE de vos cartes contenant « Frappe ».
translations.ita:
Infliggi {CalculatedDamage:diff()} di danno.
Infligge {ExtraDamage:diff()} di danno extra per OGNI tua carta che contiene la parola "Colpo".
translations.jpn:
{CalculatedDamage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
名前に「ストライク」を含むすべてのカード1枚につき、追加で{ExtraDamage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
피해를 {CalculatedDamage:diff()} 줍니다.
보유한 카드 중 이름에
“타격”이 포함된 카드 1장당
피해량이 {ExtraDamage:diff()} 증가합니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {CalculatedDamage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Zadaje dodatkowo {ExtraDamage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń za WSZYSTKIE karty zawierające „uderzenie” w nazwie.
translations.ptb:
Cause {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de dano.
Causa {ExtraDamage:diff()} de dano adicional por CADA UMA das suas cartas contendo "Golpe".
translations.rus:
Наносит {CalculatedDamage:diff()} урона.
Наносит на {ExtraDamage:diff()} урона больше за каждую карту с «ударом» в названии.
translations.spa:
Inflige {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de daño.
Inflige {ExtraDamage:diff()} de daño adicional por CADA UNA de tus cartas que contengan «Golpe».
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {CalculatedDamage:diff()}
สร้างความเสียหายเพิ่ม {ExtraDamage:diff()} ตามจำนวนการ์ดที่มีคำว่า “จู่โจม”
translations.tur:
{CalculatedDamage:diff()} hasar ver.
İsminde "Saldırı" geçen TÜM kartların için fazladan {ExtraDamage:diff()} hasar ver.

description:
Deal 6 damage.
Deals 3 additional damage for ALL your cards containing “Strike”.

name: Pillage
description:
Deal 6 damage.
Draw cards until you draw a non-Attack card.

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw cards until you draw a non-Attack card.
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
抽牌直到你抽到一张非攻击牌。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Ziehe Karten, bis du eine Karte außer Angriffen ziehst.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Robas cartas hasta que robes una que no sea de ataque.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Piochez des cartes jusqu'à piocher une carte qui n'est pas une Attaque.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Peschi carte finché non ottieni una carta non Attacco.
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
アタック以外のカードを引くまで、カードを引く。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
공격이 아닌 카드를 뽑을
때까지 카드를 뽑습니다.

name: Primal Force
description: Transform all Attacks in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]Giant Rock[/gold].

translations.eng: Transform all Attacks in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Giant Rock+|Giant Rock}[/gold].
translations.zhs: 将[gold]手牌[/gold]中的所有攻击牌变化为[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:巨石+|巨石}[/gold]。
translations.deu: Transformiere alle Angriffe auf deiner [gold]Hand[/gold] zu [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Riesiger Fels+|Riesiger Fels}[/gold].
translations.esp: Transformas todas las cartas de ataque de tu [gold]mano[/gold] en [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Roca gigante+|Roca gigante}[/gold].
translations.fra: Transformez toutes les Attaques de votre [gold]Main[/gold] en [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Rocher gigantesque+|Rocher gigantesque}[/gold].
translations.ita: Trasformi tutte le carte Attacco nella tua [gold]mano[/gold] nella carta [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Macigno+|Macigno}[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]手札[/gold]にあるすべてのアタックを[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:巨大な岩+|巨大な岩}[/gold]に変化させる。
translations.kor:
[gold]손[/gold]에 있는 모든 공격
카드를 [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:거대한 바위+|거대한 바위}[/gold]로
변화시킵니다.
translations.pol: Zmień wszystkie Ataki w [gold]ręce[/gold] w [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Dużą skałę+|Dużą skałę}[/gold].
translations.ptb: Transforme todos os Ataques na sua [gold]Mão[/gold] em [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Rocha Gigante+|Rocha Gigante}[/gold].
translations.spa: Transforma todos los Ataques de tu [gold]Mano[/gold] en [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Roca gigantesca+|Roca gigantesca}[/gold].
translations.tha: แปรสภาพการ์ดโจมตีทั้งหมดใน[gold]มือ[/gold]ให้เป็น[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:หินยักษ์+|ศิลายักษ์}[/gold]
translations.tur: [gold]El[/gold]'indeki tüm Saldırı kartlarını [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Devasa Kaya+|Devasa Kaya}[/gold] kartına dönüştür.
