name: Noxious Fumes
description: At the start of your turn, apply 2 [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.

translations.tha: รมควันพิษ

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, apply {PoisonPerTurn:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 在你的回合开始时，给予所有敌人{PoisonPerTurn:diff()}层[gold]中毒[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wende immer zu Beginn deines Zuges auf ALLE Gegner {PoisonPerTurn:diff()} [gold]Gift[/gold] an.
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu turno, aplicas {PoisonPerTurn:diff()} de [gold]veneno[/gold] a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, appliquez {PoisonPerTurn:diff()} de [gold]Poison[/gold] à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo turno, applichi {PoisonPerTurn:diff()} di [gold]Veleno[/gold] a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、すべての敵に[gold]毒[/gold]{PoisonPerTurn:diff()}を付与する。
translations.kor: 내 턴 시작 시, 모든 적에게 [gold]중독[/gold]을 {PoisonPerTurn:diff()} 부여합니다.
translations.pol: Na początku tury nałóż {PoisonPerTurn:diff()} pkt. [gold]Trucizny[/gold] na WSZYSTKICH przeciwników.
translations.ptb: No início do seu turno, aplique {PoisonPerTurn:diff()} de [gold]Veneno[/gold] a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus: Накладывает {PoisonPerTurn:diff()} [gold]яда[/gold] на ВСЕХ врагов в начале хода.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu turno, aplica {PoisonPerTurn:diff()} de [gold]Veneno[/gold] a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น สร้าง {PoisonPerTurn:diff()} [gold]พิษ[/gold]ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด

name: Outbreak
description: Every 3 times you apply [gold]Poison[/gold], deal 11 damage to ALL enemies.

translations.eng: Every {Repeat:plural:time|{Repeat:diff()} times} you apply [gold]Poison[/gold], deal {OutbreakPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 每当你给予{Repeat:diff()}次[gold]中毒[/gold]，就对所有敌人造成{OutbreakPower:diff()}点伤害。
translations.deu: Füge immer, wenn du{Repeat:plural:| {Repeat:diff()} Mal} [gold]Gift[/gold] anwendest, ALLEN Gegnern {OutbreakPower:diff()} Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Cada {Repeat:plural:vez|{Repeat:diff()} veces} que aplicas [gold]veneno[/gold], infliges {OutbreakPower:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra: {Repeat:plural:À chaque fois|Toutes les {Repeat:diff()} fois} que vous appliquez du [gold]Poison[/gold], infligez {OutbreakPower:diff()} dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: Ogni {Repeat:plural:volta|{Repeat:diff()} volta} che applichi [gold]Veleno[/gold], infliggi {OutbreakPower:diff()} di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: [gold]毒[/gold]を{Repeat:diff()}回付与するたび、すべての敵に{OutbreakPower:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
[gold]중독[/gold]을 {Repeat:choose(1):부여할|{Repeat:diff()}번 부여할} 때마다, 모든 적에게
피해를 {OutbreakPower:diff()} 줍니다.
translations.pol: Zadaj {OutbreakPower:diff()} pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom po nałożeniu [gold]Trucizny[/gold] {Repeat:plural:{Repeat:diff()} raz|{Repeat:diff()} razy|{Repeat:diff()} razy}.
translations.ptb: Cada {Repeat:plural:vez|{Repeat:diff()} vezes} que você aplicar [gold]Veneno[/gold], cause {OutbreakPower:diff()} de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus: Наносит {OutbreakPower:diff()} урона ВСЕМ врагам {Repeat:plural(ru):каждый раз|каждые {Repeat:diff()} раза|каждые {Repeat:diff()} раз}, когда вы накладываете [gold]яд[/gold].
translations.spa: Cada {Repeat:plural:vez|{Repeat:diff()} veces} que apliques [gold]Veneno[/gold], inflige {OutbreakPower:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha: ทุก{Repeat:choose(1):ครั้ง| {Repeat:diff()} ครั้ง}ที่คุณสร้าง[gold]พิษ[/gold] สร้างความเสียหาย {OutbreakPower:diff()} ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด

name: Phantom Blades
description:
[gold]Shivs[/gold] gain [gold]Retain[/gold].
The first [gold]Shiv[/gold] you play each turn deals 9 additional damage.

translations.eng:
[gold]Shivs[/gold] gain [gold]Retain[/gold].
The first [gold]Shiv[/gold] you play each turn deals {PhantomBladesPower:diff()} additional damage.
translations.zhs:
[gold]小刀[/gold]获得[gold]保留[/gold]。
你在每回合打出的第一张[gold]小刀[/gold]额外造成{PhantomBladesPower:diff()}点伤害。
translations.deu:
Gib [gold]Messern[/gold] [gold]Behalten[/gold].
Das erste [gold]Messer[/gold], das du jeden Zug spielst, fügt {PhantomBladesPower:diff()} Schaden mehr zu.
translations.esp:
Las [gold]cartas de Navaja[/gold] obtienen [gold]retención[/gold].
La primera [gold]Navaja[/gold] que juegas en cada turno inflige {PhantomBladesPower:diff()} de daño adicional.
translations.fra:
Vos [gold]Surins[/gold] gagnent [gold]Retenue[/gold].
Le premier [gold]Surin[/gold] que vous jouez chaque tour inflige {PhantomBladesPower:diff()} dégâts supplémentaires.
translations.ita:
Le carte [gold]Pugnale[/gold] ottengono [gold]Conservazione[/gold].
La prima carta [gold]Pugnale[/gold] che giochi in ogni turno infligge {PhantomBladesPower:diff()} di danno extra.
translations.jpn:
[gold]ナイフ[/gold]が[gold]保留[/gold]を得る。
毎ターン、最初にプレイする[gold]ナイフ[/gold]が追加で{PhantomBladesPower:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
[gold]단도[/gold]가 [gold]보존[/gold]을 얻습니다.
매 턴마다 처음으로
사용하는 [gold]단도[/gold]의
피해량이 {PhantomBladesPower:diff()} 증가합니다.
translations.pol:
[gold]Noże[/gold] otrzymują [gold]Zachowanie[/gold].
W każdej turze pierwszy zagrany [gold]Nóż[/gold] zadaje dodatkowo {PhantomBladesPower:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
translations.ptb:
[gold]Lâminas[/gold] recebem [gold]Manter[/gold].
A primeira [gold]Lâmina[/gold] que você jogar a cada turno causa {PhantomBladesPower:diff()} de dano adicional.
translations.rus:
[gold]«Заточки»[/gold] [gold]оставляются[/gold].
Первая [gold]«Заточка»[/gold] за ход наносит на {PhantomBladesPower:diff()} урона больше.
translations.spa:
Las [gold]Navajas[/gold] ganan [gold]Retención[/gold].
La primera [gold]Navaja[/gold] que juegues cada turno inflige {PhantomBladesPower:diff()} de daño adicional.
translations.tha:
[gold]มีดสั้น[/gold]ได้รับ[gold]คงสภาพ[/gold]
[gold]มีดสั้น[/gold]ใบแรกที่คุณเล่นในแต่ละเทิร์นสร้างความเสียหายเพิ่ม {PhantomBladesPower:diff()}
translations.tur:
[gold]Kamaların[/gold] [gold]Sakla[/gold] elde eder.
Her tur oynadığın ilk [gold]Kama[/gold] fazladan {PhantomBladesPower:diff()} hasar verir.

The first [gold]Shiv[/gold] you play each turn deals 12 additional damage.

name: Piercing Wail
description:
ALL enemies lose 6 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.tha: คำครวญกรีดโสต

translations.zhs: 所有敌人在本回合失去{StrengthLoss:diff()}点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu: ALLE Gegner verlieren für diesen Zug {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Stärke[/gold].
translations.esp: TODOS los enemigos pierden {StrengthLoss:diff()} de [gold]fuerza[/gold] en este turno.
translations.fra: TOUS les ennemis perdent {StrengthLoss:diff()} de [gold]Force[/gold] jusqu'à la fin du tour.
translations.ita: TUTTI i nemici perdono {StrengthLoss:diff()} di [gold]Forza[/gold] in questo turno.
translations.jpn: ターン終了時まですべての敵は[gold]筋力[/gold]{StrengthLoss:diff()}を失う。
translations.kor:
이번 턴 동안 모든 적이
[gold]힘[/gold]을 {StrengthLoss:diff()} 잃습니다.
translations.pol: W tej turze WSZYSCY przeciwnicy tracą {StrengthLoss:diff()} pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold].
translations.ptb: TODOS os inimigos perdem {StrengthLoss:diff()} de [gold]Força[/gold] neste turno.
translations.rus: Отнимает у ВСЕХ врагов {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]силы[/gold] на этот ход.
translations.spa: TODOS los enemigos pierden {StrengthLoss:diff()} de [gold]Fuerza[/gold] este turno.
translations.tha: ศัตรูทั้งหมดเสีย {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]ในเทิร์นนี้

name: Pinpoint
description:
Deal 15 damage.
Costs 1 less [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img] for each Skill played this turn.

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Costs 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each Skill played this turn.
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
你在本回合中每打出过一张技能牌，其耗能减少1{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Kostet 1 weniger {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} für jede in diesem Zug gespielte Fertigkeit.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Por cada carta de habilidad jugada en este turno, el costo de esta carta se reduce en 1 de {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Coûte 1 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} en moins pour chaque Compétence jouée pendant ce tour.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Costa 1 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} in meno per ogni carta Abilità giocata in questo turno.
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
このターンにプレイしたスキル1枚につき、コストが1{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}減る。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
이번 턴에 스킬 카드를
사용할 때마다 비용이
1 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} 감소합니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Kosztuje 1 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} mniej za każdą Umiejętność zagraną w tej turze.
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
Custa 1 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} a menos por cada Técnica jogada neste turno.
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Стоит на 1 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} меньше за каждый разыгранный в этом ходу Навык.
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Cuesta 1 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} menos por cada Habilidad jugada este turno.
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
ค่าร่ายลดลง 1 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} ตามจำนวนการ์ดทักษะที่เคยเล่นในเทิร์นนี้
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
Bu turda oynanan her Beceri için 1 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} ucuzlaşır.

name: Precise Cut
description:
Deal 13 damage.
Deals 2 less damage for each other card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].

translations.eng:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} less damage for each other card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.zhs:
造成{CalculatedDamage:diff()}点伤害。
你的[gold]手牌[/gold]中每有一张牌，此牌的伤害就降低{ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()}点。
translations.deu:
Füge {CalculatedDamage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Fügt {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} weniger Schaden für jede weitere [gold]Handkarte[/gold] zu.
translations.esp:
Infliges {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de daño.
Infliges {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} menos de daño por cada carta en tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra:
Infligez {CalculatedDamage:diff()} dégâts.
Inflige {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} dégâts en moins pour chaque autre carte dans votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita:
Infliggi {CalculatedDamage:diff()} di danno.
Infligge {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} di danno in meno per ogni altra carta nella tua [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{CalculatedDamage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
[gold]手札[/gold]にある他のカード1枚につき、ダメージが{ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()}減少する。
translations.kor:
피해를 {CalculatedDamage:diff()} 줍니다.
[gold]손[/gold]에 있는 다른 카드 1장당 피해량이 {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} 감소합니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {CalculatedDamage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Zadaje {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} pkt. obrażeń mniej za każdą kartę w [gold]ręce[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Cause {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de dano.
Causa {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} a menos de dano por cada outra carta na sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.rus:
Наносит {CalculatedDamage:diff()} урона.
Наносит на {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} урона меньше за каждую карту в [gold]руке[/gold], кроме себя.
translations.spa:
Inflige {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de daño.
Inflige {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} de daño menos por cada otra carta en tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {CalculatedDamage:diff()}
สร้างความเสียหายน้อยลง {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} ตามจำนวนการ์ดอื่นใน[gold]มือ[/gold]
translations.tur:
{CalculatedDamage:diff()} hasar ver.
[gold]El[/gold]'indeki diğer her kart için {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} daha az hasar verir.

Infliges {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de daño.
Infliges {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} menos de daño por cada carta en tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra:
Infligez {CalculatedDamage:diff()} dégâts.
Inflige {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} dégâts en moins pour chaque autre carte dans votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita:
Infliggi {CalculatedDamage:diff()} di danno.
Infligge {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} di danno in meno per ogni altra carta nella tua [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{CalculatedDamage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
[gold]手札[/gold]にある他のカード1枚につき、ダメージが{ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()}減少する。
translations.kor:
피해를 {CalculatedDamage:diff()} 줍니다.
[gold]손[/gold]에 있는 다른 카드 1장당 피해량이 {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} 감소합니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {CalculatedDamage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.

translations.ptb:
Cause {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de dano.
Causa {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} a menos de dano por cada outra carta na sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.rus:
Наносит {CalculatedDamage:diff()} урона.
Наносит на {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} урона меньше за каждую карту в [gold]руке[/gold], кроме себя.
translations.spa:
Inflige {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de daño.
Inflige {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} de daño menos por cada otra carta en tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {CalculatedDamage:diff()}
สร้างความเสียหายน้อยลง {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} ตามจำนวนการ์ดอื่นใน[gold]มือ[/gold]
translations.tur:
{CalculatedDamage:diff()} hasar ver.
[gold]El[/gold]'indeki diğer her kart için {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} daha az hasar verir.

name: Ricochet
description:
[gold]Sly[/gold].
Deal 3 damage to a random enemy 4 times.

translations.eng: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
translations.deu: Füge {Repeat:diff()} Mal einem zufälligen Gegner {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño a un enemigo al azar {Repeat:diff()} veces.
translations.fra: Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts à un ennemi aléatoire {Repeat:diff()} fois.

translations.jpn: ランダムな敵に{Damage:diff()}ダメージを{Repeat:diff()}回与える。
translations.pol: Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń losowemu przeciwnikowi {Repeat:diff()} razy.
translations.ptb: Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano a um inimigo aleatório {Repeat:diff()} vezes.
translations.spa: Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño a un enemigo aleatorio {Repeat:diff()} veces.
translations.tha: สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()} ใส่ศัตรู 1 ตัวแบบสุ่ม จำนวน {Repeat:diff()} ครั้ง

name: Serpent Form
description: Whenever you play a card, deal 4 damage to a random enemy.

translations.tha: ร่างอสรพิษ

translations.eng: Whenever you play a card, deal {SerpentFormPower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
translations.zhs: 你每打出一张牌，就对随机一名敌人造成{SerpentFormPower:diff()}点伤害。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du eine Karte spielst, füge einem zufälligen Gegner {SerpentFormPower:diff()} Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Al jugar una carta, infliges {SerpentFormPower:diff()} de daño a un enemigo al azar.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous jouez une carte, infligez {SerpentFormPower:diff()} dégâts à un ennemi aléatoire.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi una carta, infliggi {SerpentFormPower:diff()} di danno a un nemico casuale.
translations.jpn: カードをプレイするたび、ランダムな敵に{SerpentFormPower:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
카드를 사용할 때마다,
무작위 적에게
피해를 {SerpentFormPower:diff()} 줍니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek zagrasz kartę, zadaj {SerpentFormPower:diff()} pkt. obrażeń losowemu przeciwnikowi.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar uma carta, cause {SerpentFormPower:diff()} de dano a um inimigo aleatório.
translations.rus: Наносит {SerpentFormPower:diff()} урона случайному врагу, когда вы разыгрываете карту.
translations.spa: Cuando juegues una carta, inflige {SerpentFormPower:diff()} de daño a un enemigo aleatorio.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเล่นการ์ด สร้างความเสียหาย {SerpentFormPower:diff()} ใส่ศัตรู 1 ตัวแบบสุ่ม
translations.tur: Her kart oynadığında rastgele bir düşmana {SerpentFormPower:diff()} hasar ver.

name: Shadow Step
description:
Discard your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Next turn, Attacks deal double damage.

translations.eng:
Discard your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Next turn, Attacks deal double damage.
translations.zhs:
丢弃所有[gold]手牌[/gold]。
在下个回合，你所有的攻击伤害翻倍。
translations.deu:
Wirf deine [gold]Hand[/gold] ab.
Im nächsten Zug fügen Angriffe doppelten Schaden zu.
translations.esp:
Descartas tu [gold]mano[/gold].
En el próximo turno, las cartas de ataque infligen el doble de daño.
translations.fra:
Défaussez votre [gold]Main[/gold].
Au prochain tour, les Attaques infligent le double de dégâts.
translations.ita:
Scarti la tua [gold]mano[/gold].
Il turno successivo, le carte Attacco infliggono danno doppio.
translations.jpn:
[gold]手札[/gold]をすべて捨てる。
次のターン、アタックは2倍のダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
[gold]손[/gold]에 있는 모든 카드를
버립니다.
다음 턴에, 공격 카드의
피해량이 2배가 됩니다.
translations.pol:
Odrzuć swoją [gold]rękę[/gold].
W następnej turze Ataki zadają podwójne obrażenia.
translations.ptb:
Descarte a sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
No próximo turno, Ataques causam o dobro de dano.
translations.rus:
Вы сбрасываете все карты.
В следующем ходу Атаки наносят двойной урон.
translations.spa:
Descarta tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
Durante tu siguiente turno, los Ataques infligen el doble de daño.
translations.tha:
ทิ้งการ์ดทั้ง[gold]มือ[/gold]
เทิร์นถัดไป การ์ดโจมตีทั้งหมดสร้างความเสียหาย 2 เท่า
translations.tur:
[gold]El[/gold]'indeki kartları at.
Sonraki turda Saldırıların iki kat fazla hasar verir.

name: Sneaky
description:
[gold]Sly[/gold].
Whenever another player attacks an enemy, gain 1 [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.eng: Whenever another player attacks an enemy, gain {SneakyPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 每当其他玩家攻击一名敌人时，获得{SneakyPower:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn ein anderer Spieler einen Gegner angreift, erhalte {SneakyPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.esp: Cuando tu camarada ataca a un enemigo, obtienes {SneakyPower:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsqu'un autre joueur attaque un ennemi, gagnez {SneakyPower:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che un altro giocatore attacca un nemico, ottieni {SneakyPower:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: 他のプレイヤーが敵を攻撃するたび、{SneakyPower:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.kor:
다른 플레이어가
적을 공격할 때마다,
[gold]방어도[/gold]를 {SneakyPower:diff()} 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek inny gracz zaatakuje przeciwnika, zyskaj {SneakyPower:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
translations.ptb: Sempre que outro jogador atacar um inimigo, receba {SneakyPower:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.rus: Дает {SneakyPower:diff()} [gold]защиты[/gold], когда другой игрок атакует врага.
translations.spa: Cuando otro jugador ataque a un enemigo, ganas {SneakyPower:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่พันธมิตรโจมตีศัตรู ได้รับ {SneakyPower:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
translations.tur: Başka bir oyuncu, bir düşmana her saldırdığında {SneakyPower:diff()} [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.

name: Sneaky+
description:
[gold]Sly[/gold].
Whenever another player attacks an enemy, gain 2 [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.eng: Whenever another player attacks an enemy, gain {SneakyPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 每当其他玩家攻击一名敌人时，获得{SneakyPower:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn ein anderer Spieler einen Gegner angreift, erhalte {SneakyPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.esp: Cuando tu camarada ataca a un enemigo, obtienes {SneakyPower:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsqu'un autre joueur attaque un ennemi, gagnez {SneakyPower:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che un altro giocatore attacca un nemico, ottieni {SneakyPower:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: 他のプレイヤーが敵を攻撃するたび、{SneakyPower:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.kor:
다른 플레이어가
적을 공격할 때마다,
[gold]방어도[/gold]를 {SneakyPower:diff()} 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek inny gracz zaatakuje przeciwnika, zyskaj {SneakyPower:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
translations.ptb: Sempre que outro jogador atacar um inimigo, receba {SneakyPower:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.rus: Дает {SneakyPower:diff()} [gold]защиты[/gold], когда другой игрок атакует врага.
translations.spa: Cuando otro jugador ataque a un enemigo, ganas {SneakyPower:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่พันธมิตรโจมตีศัตรู ได้รับ {SneakyPower:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
translations.tur: Başka bir oyuncu, bir düşmana her saldırdığında {SneakyPower:diff()} [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.

name: Speedster
description: Whenever you draw a card during your turn, deal 2 damage to ALL enemies.

translations.tha: ผู้ใช้ความเร็ว

translations.eng: Whenever you draw a card during your turn, deal {SpeedsterPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 每当你在回合进行中抽到一张牌时，对所有敌人造成{SpeedsterPower:diff()}点伤害。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du während deines Zuges eine Karte ziehst, füge ALLEN Gegnern {SpeedsterPower:diff()} Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Al robar una carta durante tu turno, infliges {SpeedsterPower:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous piochez une carte pendant votre tour, infligez {SpeedsterPower:diff()} dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che peschi una carta durante il tuo turno, infliggi {SpeedsterPower:diff()} di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: 自分のターン中にカードを引くたび、すべての敵に{SpeedsterPower:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
내 턴 동안 카드를 뽑을
때마다, 모든 적에게
피해를 {SpeedsterPower:diff()} 줍니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek dobierzesz kartę podczas swojej tury, zadaj {SpeedsterPower:diff()} pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você comprar uma carta durante o seu turno, cause {SpeedsterPower:diff()} de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus: Наносит {SpeedsterPower:diff()} урона ВСЕМ врагам, когда вы добираете карту в свой ход.
translations.spa: Cuando robes una carta durante tu turno, inflige {SpeedsterPower:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณจั่วการ์ดในเทิร์นของคุณ สร้างความเสียหาย {SpeedsterPower:diff()} ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur: Turun sırasında her kart çektiğinde TÜM düşmanlara {SpeedsterPower:diff()} hasar ver.

name: Storm of Steel
description:
Discard your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Add 1 [gold]Shiv[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] for each card discarded.

translations.tha: พายุมีด

translations.eng:
Discard your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Add 1 [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Shiv+|Shiv}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] for each card discarded.
translations.zhs:
丢弃所有[gold]手牌[/gold]。
每丢弃一张牌，就将一张[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:小刀+|小刀}[/gold]添加至你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
translations.deu:
Wirf deine [gold]Hand[/gold] ab.
Erhalte für jede abgeworfene Karte 1 [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Messer+|Messer}[/gold] auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.esp:
Descartas la [gold]mano[/gold].
Por cada carta que descartes, agregas 1 [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Navaja+|Navaja}[/gold] a tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra:
Défaussez votre [gold]Main[/gold].
Ajoutez autant de [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Surins+|Surins}[/gold] à votre [gold]Main[/gold] que de cartes défaussées.
translations.ita:
Scarti la tua [gold]mano[/gold].
Aggiungi 1 carta [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Pugnale+|Pugnale}[/gold] alla tua [gold]mano[/gold] per ogni carta scartata.
translations.jpn:
[gold]手札[/gold]をすべて捨てる。
捨てたカード1枚につき、[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:ナイフ+|ナイフ}[/gold]を1枚[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。
translations.kor:
[gold]손[/gold]에 있는 모든 카드를
버립니다.
버린 카드의 수만큼
[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:단도+|단도}[/gold]를 [gold]손[/gold]으로 가져옵니다.
translations.pol:
Odrzuć swoją [gold]rękę[/gold].
Dodaj 1 [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Nóż+|Nóż}[/gold] do [gold]ręki[/gold] za każdą odrzuconą kartę.
translations.ptb:
Descarte a sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
Adicione 1 [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Lâmina+|Lâmina}[/gold] na sua [gold]Mão[/gold] por cada carta descartada.
translations.rus:
Вы сбрасываете все карты.
Добавляет в [gold]руку[/gold] по [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:«Заточке+»|«Заточке»}[/gold] за каждую.
translations.spa:
Descarta tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
Añade 1 [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Navaja+|Navaja}[/gold] a tu [gold]Mano[/gold] por cada carta descartada.
translations.tha:
ทิ้งการ์ดทั้ง[gold]มือ[/gold]
เพิ่ม[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:มีดสั้น+|มีดสั้น}[/gold] 1 ใบใส่[gold]มือ[/gold]ตามจำนวนการ์ดที่ถูกทิ้ง
translations.tur:
[gold]El[/gold]'indeki kartları at.
Atılan her kart için [gold]El[/gold]'ine 1 [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Kama+|Kama}[/gold] ekle.

name: Strangle
description:
Deal 8 damage.
Whenever you play a card this turn, the enemy loses 2 HP.

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you play a card this turn, the enemy loses {StranglePower:diff()} HP.
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
你在这个回合内每出一张牌，该名敌人都会失去{StranglePower:diff()}点生命。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Immer wenn du in diesem Zug eine Karte spielst, verliert der Gegner {StranglePower:diff()} TP.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Al jugar una carta en este turno, el enemigo pierde {StranglePower:diff()} PV.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Lorsque vous jouez une carte pendant ce tour, l'ennemi perd {StranglePower:diff()} PV.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Ogni volta che giochi una carta in questo turno, il nemico perde {StranglePower:diff()} PV.
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
このターン、カードをプレイするたび、敵はHPを{StranglePower:diff()}失う。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
이번 턴에 카드를
사용할 때마다, 대상 적이
체력을 {StranglePower:diff()} 잃습니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Kiedykolwiek zagrasz kartę w tej turze, przeciwnik traci {StranglePower:diff()} PŻ.
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
Sempre que você jogar uma carta neste turno, o inimigo perde {StranglePower:diff()} PV.
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Отнимает у врага {StranglePower:diff()} ОЗ, когда вы разыгрываете карту в этом ходу.
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Cuando juegues una carta este turno, el enemigo pierde {StranglePower:diff()} PV.
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
ทุกครั้งที่คุณเล่นการ์ดในเทิร์นนี้ ศัตรูเสีย {StranglePower:diff()} HP
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
Bu tur her kart oynadığında düşman {StranglePower:diff()} CP kaybeder.

造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。

translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
[gold]Coup de grâce[/gold] : obtenez une récompense de carte supplémentaire.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Se è [gold]letale[/gold], ottieni una ricompensa di carte extra.
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
[gold]リーサル[/gold]時、追加のカード報酬を獲得する。

피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
[gold]치명타[/gold]라면, 카드 보상을
추가로 얻습니다.

Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.

translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Если [gold]казнит[/gold] врага, вы получите дополнительный наградной набор.

Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.

translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.

name: Tools of the Trade
description: At the start of your turn, draw 1 card and discard 1 card.

translations.tha: สรรพอุปกรณ์

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, draw 1 card and discard 1 card.
translations.zhs: 在你的回合开始时，抽1张牌，丢弃1张牌。
translations.deu: Ziehe zu Beginn jedes Zuges 1 Karte und wirf 1 Karte ab.
translations.esp: Al comienzo de tu turno, robas 1 carta y descartas otra.
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, piochez 1 carte et défaussez 1 carte.
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo turno, peschi 1 carta e scarti 1 carta.
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、カードを1枚引き、カードを1枚捨てる。
translations.kor:
내 턴 시작 시,
카드를 1장 뽑고
카드를 1장 버립니다.
translations.pol: Na początku tury dobierz 1 kartę and odrzuć 1 kartę.
translations.ptb: No início do seu turno, compre 1 carta e descarte 1 carta.
translations.rus:
Вы добираете еще 1 карту в начале хода,
затем сбрасываете 1 карту.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu siguiente turno, roba 1 carta y descarta 1 carta.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น จั่วการ์ด 1 ใบและทิ้งการ์ด 1 ใบ
translations.tur: Turunun başında 1 kart çek ve 1 kart at.

name: Tracking
description: [gold]Weak[/gold] enemies take double damage from Attacks.

translations.eng: [gold]Weak[/gold] enemies take double damage from Attacks.
translations.zhs: 对[gold]虚弱[/gold]状态的敌人，你所造成的攻击伤害翻倍。
translations.deu: [gold]Schwache[/gold] Gegner nehmen von Angriffen doppelten Schaden.
translations.esp: Los enemigos con puntos de [gold]debilitamiento[/gold] reciben el doble de daño por tus cartas de ataque.
translations.fra: Les ennemis [gold]Affaiblis[/gold] subissent le double des dégâts infligés par les Attaques.
translations.ita: I nemici con [gold]Debolezza[/gold] subiscono danno doppio dalle carte Attacco.
translations.jpn: [gold]脱力[/gold]を付与された敵は、アタックから受けるダメージが2倍になる。
translations.kor:
[gold]약화[/gold] 상태의 적이
공격 카드로 받는 피해가
2배가 됩니다.
translations.pol: [gold]Słabi[/gold] przeciwnicy otrzymują podwójne obrażenia od Ataków.
translations.ptb: Inimigos com [gold]Fraqueza[/gold] sofrem o dobro de dano de Ataques.
translations.rus: [gold]Слабые[/gold] враги получают двойной урон от Атак.
translations.spa: Los enemigos [gold]Débiles[/gold] reciben el doble de daño de Ataques.
translations.tha: ศัตรูที่มี[gold]ความอ่อนแอ[/gold]ได้รับความเสียหายจากการ์ดโจมตี 2 เท่า
translations.tur: [gold]Zayıf[/gold] düşmanlar Saldırılardan iki kat fazla hasar alır.

description:
Add 3 [gold]Shivs[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Reduce this card's cost by 1.

translations.eng:
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]{Cards:plural:Shiv|Shivs}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Reduce this card's cost by 1.
translations.zhs:
将{Cards:diff()}张[gold]小刀[/gold]加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
这张牌的耗能减少1。

Erhalte {Cards:diff()} [gold]Messer[/gold] auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold].
Senke die Kosten dieser Karte um 1.

Agregas {Cards:diff()} [gold]{Cards:plural:Navaja|cartas de Navaja}[/gold] a tu [gold]mano[/gold].
Se reduce el costo de esta carta en 1.

Ajoutez {Cards:diff()} [gold]{Cards:plural:Surin|Surins}[/gold] à votre [gold]Main[/gold].
Réduisez le coût de cette carte de 1.

このカードのコストが1減少する。

Dodaj {Cards:diff()} [gold]{Cards:plural:Nóż|Noże|Noży}[/gold] do [gold]ręki[/gold].
Zredukuj koszt tej karty o 1.
translations.ptb:

name: Well-Laid Plans
description: At the end of your turn, [gold]Retain[/gold] up to 1 card.

translations.tha: แผนการอย่างดี

translations.eng: At the end of your turn, [gold]Retain[/gold] up to {RetainAmount:diff()} {RetainAmount:plural:card|cards}.
translations.zhs: 在你的回合结束时，[gold]保留[/gold]最多{RetainAmount:diff()}张牌。
translations.deu: [gold]Behalte[/gold] am Ende deines Zuges bis zu {RetainAmount:diff()} {RetainAmount:plural:Karte|Karten}.
translations.esp: Al final de tu turno, [gold]retienes[/gold] hasta {RetainAmount:diff()} {RetainAmount:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.fra: À la fin de votre tour, [gold]Retenez[/gold] jusqu'à {RetainAmount:diff()} {RetainAmount:plural:carte|cartes}.
translations.ita: Al termine del turno, [gold]conservi[/gold] fino a {RetainAmount:diff()} {RetainAmount:plural:carta|carte}.
translations.jpn: ターン終了時、カードを{RetainAmount:diff()}枚まで[gold]保留[/gold]する。
translations.kor:
내 턴 종료 시, 카드를
최대 {RetainAmount:diff()}장까지 [gold]보존[/gold]합니다.
translations.ptb: No final do seu turno, [gold]Mantenha[/gold] até {RetainAmount:diff()} {RetainAmount:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.spa: Al final de tu turno, [gold]Retén[/gold] hasta {RetainAmount:diff()} {RetainAmount:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.tha: ตอนจบเทิร์น [gold]คงสภาพ[/gold]การ์ดได้สูงสุด {RetainAmount:diff()} ใบ

name: Wraith Form
description:
Gain 2 [gold]Intangible[/gold].
At the start of your turn, lose 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

translations.tha: ร่างมายา

translations.eng:
Gain {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]Intangible[/gold].
At the start of your turn, lose {WraithFormPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
translations.zhs:
获得{IntangiblePower:diff()}[gold]无实体[/gold]。
在你的回合开始时，失去{WraithFormPower:diff()}点[gold]敏捷[/gold]。
translations.deu:
Erhalte {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]Immateriell[/gold].
Verliere zu Beginn jedes Zuges {WraithFormPower:diff()} [gold]Geschicklichkeit[/gold].
translations.esp:
Obtienes {IntangiblePower:diff()} de [gold]intangibilidad[/gold].
Al comienzo de tu turno, pierdes {WraithFormPower:diff()} de [gold]destreza[/gold].
translations.fra:
Gagnez [gold]Intangible[/gold] ({IntangiblePower:diff()}).
Au début de votre tour, perdez {WraithFormPower:diff()} de [gold]Dextérité[/gold].
translations.ita:
Ottieni {IntangiblePower:diff()} di [gold]Intangibilità[/gold].
All'inizio del tuo turno, perdi {WraithFormPower:diff()} di [gold]Destrezza[/gold].
translations.jpn:
[gold]霊体[/gold]{IntangiblePower:diff()}を得る。
ターン開始時、[gold]敏捷[/gold]{WraithFormPower:diff()}を失う。
translations.kor:
[gold]불가침[/gold]을 {IntangiblePower:diff()} 얻습니다.
내 턴 시작 시,
[gold]민첩[/gold]을 {WraithFormPower:diff()} 잃습니다.
translations.pol:
Zyskaj {IntangiblePower:diff()} pkt. [gold]Nieuchwytności[/gold].
Na początku tury utrać {WraithFormPower:diff()} pkt. [gold]Zręczności[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Receba {IntangiblePower:diff()} de [gold]Intangível[/gold].
No início do seu turno, perca {WraithFormPower:diff()} de [gold]Destreza[/gold].
translations.rus:
Дает {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]неосязаемости[/gold].
Вы теряете {WraithFormPower:diff()} [gold]ловкости[/gold] в начале хода.
translations.spa:
Gana {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]Intangible[/gold].
Al comienzo de tu turno, pierde {WraithFormPower:diff()} de [gold]Destreza[/gold].
translations.tha:
ได้รับ {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]ไร้ตัวตน[/gold]
ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น เสีย {WraithFormPower:diff()} [gold]ความชำนาญ[/gold]

ターン開始時、[gold]敏捷[/gold]{WraithFormPower:diff()}を失う。
translations.kor:
[gold]불가침[/gold]을 {IntangiblePower:diff()} 얻습니다.
내 턴 시작 시,
[gold]민첩[/gold]을 {WraithFormPower:diff()} 잃습니다.
translations.pol:
Zyskaj {IntangiblePower:diff()} pkt. [gold]Nieuchwytności[/gold].
Na początku tury utrać {WraithFormPower:diff()} pkt. [gold]Zręczności[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Receba {IntangiblePower:diff()} de [gold]Intangível[/gold].
No início do seu turno, perca {WraithFormPower:diff()} de [gold]Destreza[/gold].
translations.rus:
Дает {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]неосязаемости[/gold].
Вы теряете {WraithFormPower:diff()} [gold]ловкости[/gold] в начале хода.
translations.spa:
Gana {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]Intangible[/gold].
Al comienzo de tu turno, pierde {WraithFormPower:diff()} de [gold]Destreza[/gold].
translations.tha:
ได้รับ {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]ไร้ตัวตน[/gold]
ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น เสีย {WraithFormPower:diff()} [gold]ความชำนาญ[/gold]

name: Arsenal
description: Whenever you create a card, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].

translations.tha: คลังสรรพาวุธ

translations.eng: Whenever you create a card, gain {ArsenalPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
translations.zhs: 每当你生成一张牌，就获得{ArsenalPower:diff()}点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du eine Karte erzeugst, erhalte {ArsenalPower:diff()} [gold]Stärke[/gold].
translations.esp: Al crear una carta, obtienes {ArsenalPower:diff()} de [gold]fuerza[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous créez une carte, gagnez {ArsenalPower:diff()} de [gold]Force[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che crei una carta, ottieni {ArsenalPower:diff()} di [gold]Forza[/gold].
translations.jpn: カードを作成するたび、[gold]筋力[/gold]{ArsenalPower:diff()}を得る。
translations.ptb: Sempre que você criar um carta, receba {ArsenalPower:diff()} de [gold]Força[/gold].

name: Beat into Shape
description:
Deal 5 damage.
[gold]Forge[/gold] 5.
[gold]Forges[/gold] an additional 5 for every other time you've hit the enemy this turn.

translations.tha: ตีขึ้นรูป

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Forge[/gold] {CalculatedForge:diff()}.
[gold]Forges[/gold] an additional {CalculationExtra:diff()} for every other time you've hit the enemy this turn.
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
[gold]铸造[/gold]{CalculatedForge:diff()}。
本回合此前你每击中过该敌人一次，[gold]铸造[/gold]值就上升{CalculationExtra:diff()}。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
[gold]Schmiede[/gold] {CalculatedForge:diff()}.
[gold]Schmiedet[/gold] {CalculationExtra:diff()} mehr für jeden vorherigen Treffer auf diesen Gegner in diesem Zug.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Aplicas [gold]forja[/gold] {CalculatedForge:diff()}.
[gold]Forjas[/gold] {CalculationExtra:diff()} más por cada golpe al enemigo en este turno.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
[gold]Forgez[/gold] pour {CalculatedForge:diff()}.
[gold]Forgez[/gold] pour {CalculationExtra:diff()} supplémentaires pour chaque fois que vous avez touché l'ennemi pendant ce tour.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Applichi {CalculatedForge:diff()} di [gold]Forgiatura[/gold].
Applichi {CalculationExtra:diff()} di [gold]Forgiatura[/gold] extra per ogni volta che hai colpito il nemico in questo turno.
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
[gold]鍛造[/gold]{CalculatedForge:diff()}。
このターンに対象の敵へ攻撃していた回数（これを除く）1回につき、追加で[gold]鍛造[/gold]{CalculationExtra:diff()}。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
[gold]단조[/gold] {CalculatedForge:diff()}.
이번 턴에 대상 적을
공격한 다른 횟수마다
추가로 [gold]단조[/gold] {CalculationExtra:diff()}.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
[gold]Wykuj[/gold] {CalculatedForge:diff()}.
[gold]Wykuj[/gold] dodatkowe {CalculationExtra:diff()} za każdy inny raz, gdy uderzono przeciwnika w tej turze.
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
[gold]Forje[/gold] {CalculatedForge:diff()}.
[gold]Forje[/gold] mais {CalculationExtra:diff()} por cada outra vez que você golpeou o inimigo neste turno.
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
[gold]Закаляет[/gold] {CalculatedForge:diff()}.
[gold]Закаляет[/gold] на {CalculationExtra:diff()} больше за каждый второй ваш удар по врагу в этом ходу.
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
[gold]Forja[/gold] {CalculatedForge:diff()}.
[gold]Forja[/gold] {CalculationExtra:diff()} más por cada otra vez que hayas golpeado al enemigo este turno.
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
{CalculatedForge:diff()} [gold]Döv[/gold].
Bu tur düşmana yaptığın her vuruş için fazladan {CalculationExtra:diff()} [gold]Dövme[/gold] uygular.

name: BEGONE!
description: Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]Minion Strike[/gold].

translations.tha: หายไปซะ!

translations.eng: Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Minion Strike+|Minion Strike}[/gold].
translations.zhs: 选择你[gold]手牌[/gold]中的一张牌，将其[gold]变化[/gold]为[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:仆从打击+|仆从打击}[/gold]。
translations.esp: Eliges una carta de tu [gold]mano[/gold] para [gold]transformarla[/gold] en [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Golpe de esbirro+|Golpe de esbirro}[/gold].
translations.fra: Choisissez une carte dans votre [gold]Main[/gold] à [gold]Transformer[/gold] en [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Frappe de sbire+|Frappe de sbire}[/gold].
translations.ita: Scegli una carta nella tua [gold]mano[/gold] da [gold]trasformare[/gold] nella carta [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Colpo del Seguace+|Colpo del Seguace}[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]手札[/gold]のカードを1枚選び、[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:ミニオンストライク+|ミニオンストライク}[/gold]に[gold]変化[/gold]させる。
translations.pol: Wybierz kartę w [gold]ręce[/gold] i [gold]Zmień[/gold] ją w [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Uderzenie służby+|Uderzenie służby}[/gold].
translations.ptb: Escolha uma carta na sua [gold]Mão[/gold] para [gold]Transformá-la[/gold] em [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Golpe de Lacaio+|Golpe de Lacaio}[/gold].
translations.rus: [gold]Преобразует[/gold] выбранную в [gold]руке[/gold] карту в [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:«Удар слуги+»|«Удар слуги»}[/gold].
translations.spa: Elige una carta de tu [gold]Mano[/gold] y [gold]Transfórmala[/gold] en [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Golpe de esbirro+|Golpe de esbirro}[/gold].
translations.tha: เลือกการ์ด 1 ใบใน[gold]มือ[/gold]เพื่อ[gold]แปรสภาพ[/gold]ให้เป็น[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:ลูกน้องจู่โจม+|ลูกน้องจู่โจม}[/gold]
translations.tur: [gold]El[/gold]'indeki kartlardan birini seç ve [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Uşak Saldırısı+|Uşak Saldırısı}[/gold] kartına [gold]Dönüştür[/gold].

name: Black Hole
description: Whenever you spend or gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img], deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.

translations.tha: หลุมดำ

translations.eng: Whenever you spend or gain {singleStarIcon}, deal {BlackHolePower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 每当你花费或获得{singleStarIcon}时，对所有敌人造成{BlackHolePower:diff()}点伤害。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du {singleStarIcon} ausgibst oder erhältst, füge ALLEN Gegnern {BlackHolePower:diff()} Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Al gastar u obtener {singleStarIcon}, infliges {BlackHolePower:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous gagnez ou dépensez des {singleStarIcon}, infligez {BlackHolePower:diff()} dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che consumi od ottieni {singleStarIcon}, infliggi {BlackHolePower:diff()} di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: {singleStarIcon}を使用するか得るたび、すべての敵に{BlackHolePower:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
{singleStarIcon}을 소모하거나 얻을
때마다, 모든 적에게
피해를 {BlackHolePower:diff()} 줍니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek wydasz lub zyskasz {singleStarIcon}, zadaj {BlackHolePower:diff()} pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você gastar ou receber {singleStarIcon}, cause {BlackHolePower:diff()} de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus: Наносит {BlackHolePower:diff()} урона ВСЕМ врагам, когда вы получаете или тратите {singleStarIcon}.
translations.spa: Siempre que gastes u obtengas {singleStarIcon}, inflige {BlackHolePower:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณจ่ายหรือได้รับ {singleStarIcon} สร้างความเสียหาย {BlackHolePower:diff()} ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur: {singleStarIcon} harcadığında veya elde ettiğinde, TÜM düşmanlara {BlackHolePower:diff()} hasar ver.

name: Black Hole+
description: Whenever you spend or gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img], deal 4 damage to ALL enemies.

translations.tha: หลุมดำ

translations.eng: Whenever you spend or gain {singleStarIcon}, deal {BlackHolePower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.

translations.deu: Immer wenn du {singleStarIcon} ausgibst oder erhältst, füge ALLEN Gegnern {BlackHolePower:diff()} Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Al gastar u obtener {singleStarIcon}, infliges {BlackHolePower:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous gagnez ou dépensez des {singleStarIcon}, infligez {BlackHolePower:diff()} dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che consumi od ottieni {singleStarIcon}, infliggi {BlackHolePower:diff()} di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: {singleStarIcon}を使用するか得るたび、すべての敵に{BlackHolePower:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
{singleStarIcon}을 소모하거나 얻을
때마다, 모든 적에게
피해를 {BlackHolePower:diff()} 줍니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek wydasz lub zyskasz {singleStarIcon}, zadaj {BlackHolePower:diff()} pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você gastar ou receber {singleStarIcon}, cause {BlackHolePower:diff()} de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus: Наносит {BlackHolePower:diff()} урона ВСЕМ врагам, когда вы получаете или тратите {singleStarIcon}.
translations.spa: Siempre que gastes u obtengas {singleStarIcon}, inflige {BlackHolePower:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณจ่ายหรือได้รับ {singleStarIcon} สร้างความเสียหาย {BlackHolePower:diff()} ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur: {singleStarIcon} harcadığında veya elde ettiğinde, TÜM düşmanlara {BlackHolePower:diff()} hasar ver.

name: Bombardment
description:
Deal 18 damage.
At the start of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], play it.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.tha: ระเบิดทำลายล้าง

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
At the start of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], play it.
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
你的回合开始时，如果这张牌在你的[gold]消耗牌堆[/gold]中，则将其打出。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Falls diese Karte zu Beginn deines Zuges in deinem [gold]Erschöpfungsstapel[/gold] ist, spiele sie.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Si al inicio de tu turno esta carta está en tu [gold]pila de agotamiento[/gold], puedes jugarla.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Au début de votre tour, si cette carte est dans votre pile de cartes [gold]Épuisées[/gold], jouez-la.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Se all'inizio del tuo turno questa carta si trova nella tua [gold]pila delle carte esaurite[/gold], giocala.
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
ターン開始時、これが[gold]廃棄札[/gold]にある場合、それをプレイする。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
내 턴 시작 시, 이 카드가
[gold]소멸된 카드 더미[/gold]에 있다면,
사용합니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Na początku tury zagraj tę kartę, jeżeli znajduje się na [gold]stosie kart wyczerpanych[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
No início do seu turno, esta carta é jogada se estiver na sua pilha de [gold]Cartas Exauridas[/gold].
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Разыгрывается в начале хода, если находится в [gold]стопке пепла[/gold].
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Si esta carta se encuentra en tu [gold]Pila de agotamiento[/gold] al comienzo de tu turno, se juega.
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น เล่นจาก[gold]กองสลาย[/gold]
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
Bu kart, turunun başında [gold]Tüketme Deste[/gold]'nde ise kendi kendine oynanır.

[gold]หลอมสร้าง[/gold] {Forge:diff()}

name: Bundle of Joy
description:
Add 3 random Colorless cards into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.zhs: 将{Cards:diff()}张随机无色牌添加到你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
translations.esp: Agregas {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta incolora|cartas incoloras} al azar a tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra: Ajoutez {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carte Incolore aléatoire|cartes Incolores aléatoires} à votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita: Aggiungi {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta incolore casuale|carte incolori casuali} alla tua [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.jpn: ランダムな無色カードを{Cards:diff()}枚[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。
translations.pol: Dodaj {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:losową bezbarwną kartę|losowe bezbarwne karty|losowych bezbarwnych kart} do [gold]ręki[/gold].
translations.ptb: Adicione {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta Incolor aleatória|cartas Incolores aleatórias} na sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.rus: Добавляет в [gold]руку[/gold] {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural(ru):случайную бесцветную карту|случайные бесцветные карты|случайных бесцветных карт}.
translations.spa: Añade {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta incolora aleatoria|cartas incoloras aleatorias} a tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
translations.tha: เพิ่มการ์ดไม่มีสี {Cards:diff()} ใบแบบสุ่มใส่[gold]มือ[/gold]

name: CHARGE!!
description:
Choose 2 cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into
[gold]Minion Dive Bombs[/gold].

translations.tha: ลุย!!

translations.eng:
Choose {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into
[gold]{Cards:plural:{IfUpgraded:show:Minion Dive Bomb+|Minion Dive Bomb}[/gold]|{IfUpgraded:show:Minion Dive Bombs+|Minion Dive Bombs}[/gold]}.
translations.zhs:
选择你[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]中的{Cards:diff()}张牌，将其[gold]变化[/gold]为
[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:仆从俯冲+|仆从俯冲}[/gold]。
translations.deu:
Wähle {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten} aus deinem [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold], die du zu 
[gold]{Cards:plural:{IfUpgraded:show:Diener-Sturzflug+|Diener-Sturzflug}[/gold]|{IfUpgraded:show:Diener-Sturzflügen+|Diener-Sturzflügen}[/gold]} [gold]Transformierst[/gold].
translations.esp:
Eliges {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} del [gold]mazo de robo[/gold] para [gold]transformar[/gold] en
[gold]{Cards:plural:{IfUpgraded:show:Bomba de esbirros+|Bomba de esbirros}[/gold]|{IfUpgraded:show:Bomba de esbirros+|Bomba de esbirros}[/gold]}.
translations.fra: Sélectionnez {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carte|cartes} de votre [gold]Pioche[/gold] à [gold]Transformer[/gold] en [gold]{Cards:plural:{IfUpgraded:show:Sbire en piqué+|Sbire en piqué}[/gold]|{IfUpgraded:show:Sbires en piqué+|Sbires en piqué}[/gold]}.
translations.ita:
Scegli {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|carte} nel tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold] da [gold]trasformare[/gold]
[gold]{Cards:plural:{IfUpgraded:show:nella carta Attacco Bomba del Seguace+|nella carta Attacco Bomba del Seguace}[/gold]|{IfUpgraded:show:nelle carte Attacco Bomba del Seguace+|nelle carte Attacco Bomba del Seguace}[/gold]}.
translations.jpn:
[gold]山札[/gold]のランダムなカード{Cards:diff()}枚から1枚選び、
[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:ミニオンの特攻+|ミニオンの特攻}[/gold]に[gold]変化[/gold]させる。
translations.kor:
[gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold]에서
카드를 {Cards:diff()}장 선택해
[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:하수인 투하+|하수인 투하}[/gold]로
[gold]변화[/gold]시킵니다.
translations.pol:
Wybierz {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart} ze [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold]
i [gold]Zmień[/gold] {Cards:plural:ją|je|je} w [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Szarżę służby+|Szarżę służby}[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Escolha {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} na sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold] para [gold]Transformar[/gold] em
[gold]{Cards:plural:{IfUpgraded:show:Bombardeio de Lacaio+|Bombardeio de Lacaio}[/gold]|{IfUpgraded:show:Bombardeios de Lacaio+|Bombardeios de Lacaio}[/gold]}.
translations.spa:
Elige {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} de tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold] y [gold]Transfórmalas[/gold] en
[gold]{Cards:plural:{IfUpgraded:show:Bombardeo de esbirro+|Bombardeo de esbirro}[/gold]|{IfUpgraded:show:Bombardeo de esbirro+|Bombardeo de esbirro}[/gold]}.
translations.tha: เลือกการ์ด {Cards:diff()} ใบใน[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]เพื่อ[gold]แปรสภาพ[/gold]เป็น[gold]{Cards:choose(1):{IfUpgraded:show:ลูกน้องจู่โจม+|ลูกน้องจู่โจม}[/gold]|{IfUpgraded:show:ลูกน้องจู่โจม+|ลูกน้องจู่โจม}[/gold]}
translations.tur:
[gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'nden {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:kart|kart} seç ve onları
[gold]{Cards:plural:{IfUpgraded:show:Uşak Dalışı+|Uşak Dalışı}[/gold]|{IfUpgraded:show:Uşak Dalışı+|Uşak Dalışı}[/gold]} kartlarına [gold]Dönüştür[/gold].

name: Child of the Stars
description: Whenever you spend [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img], gain 2 [gold]Block[/gold] for each [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img] spent.

translations.eng: Whenever you spend {singleStarIcon}, gain {BlockForStars:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each {singleStarIcon} spent.
translations.zhs: 每当你花费{singleStarIcon}时，每花费一点{singleStarIcon}，获得{BlockForStars:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du {singleStarIcon} ausgibst, erhalte {BlockForStars:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] für jeden ausgegebenen {singleStarIcon}.
translations.esp: Al gastar {singleStarIcon}, obtienes {BlockForStars:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold] por cada {singleStarIcon} gastada.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous dépensez {singleStarIcon}, gagnez {BlockForStars:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold] pour chaque {singleStarIcon} dépensée.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che consumi {singleStarIcon}, ottieni {BlockForStars:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold] per ogni {singleStarIcon} che consumi.
translations.jpn: {singleStarIcon}を消費するたび、消費した{singleStarIcon}1つにつき{BlockForStars:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek wydasz {singleStarIcon}, zyskaj {BlockForStars:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold] za każdą wydaną {singleStarIcon}.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você gastar {singleStarIcon}, receba {BlockForStars:diff()} [gold]Proteção[/gold] por cada {singleStarIcon} gasta.
translations.rus: Дает {BlockForStars:diff()} [gold]защиты[/gold] за каждую потраченную {singleStarIcon}, когда вы тратите {singleStarIcon}.
translations.spa: Siempre que gastes {singleStarIcon}, gana {BlockForStars:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold] por cada {singleStarIcon} gastado.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณจ่าย {singleStarIcon} ได้รับ {BlockForStars:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]ตามจำนวน {singleStarIcon} ที่จ่ายไป
translations.tur: Her {singleStarIcon} harcadığında harcadığın her {singleStarIcon} için {BlockForStars:diff()} [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.

name: Child of the Stars+
description: Whenever you spend [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img], gain 3 [gold]Block[/gold] for each [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img] spent.

translations.eng: Whenever you spend {singleStarIcon}, gain {BlockForStars:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each {singleStarIcon} spent.
translations.zhs: 每当你花费{singleStarIcon}时，每花费一点{singleStarIcon}，获得{BlockForStars:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du {singleStarIcon} ausgibst, erhalte {BlockForStars:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] für jeden ausgegebenen {singleStarIcon}.
translations.esp: Al gastar {singleStarIcon}, obtienes {BlockForStars:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold] por cada {singleStarIcon} gastada.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous dépensez {singleStarIcon}, gagnez {BlockForStars:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold] pour chaque {singleStarIcon} dépensée.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che consumi {singleStarIcon}, ottieni {BlockForStars:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold] per ogni {singleStarIcon} che consumi.
translations.jpn: {singleStarIcon}を消費するたび、消費した{singleStarIcon}1つにつき{BlockForStars:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek wydasz {singleStarIcon}, zyskaj {BlockForStars:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold] za każdą wydaną {singleStarIcon}.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você gastar {singleStarIcon}, receba {BlockForStars:diff()} [gold]Proteção[/gold] por cada {singleStarIcon} gasta.
translations.rus: Дает {BlockForStars:diff()} [gold]защиты[/gold] за каждую потраченную {singleStarIcon}, когда вы тратите {singleStarIcon}.
translations.spa: Siempre que gastes {singleStarIcon}, gana {BlockForStars:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold] por cada {singleStarIcon} gastado.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณจ่าย {singleStarIcon} ได้รับ {BlockForStars:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]ตามจำนวน {singleStarIcon} ที่จ่ายไป
translations.tur: Her {singleStarIcon} harcadığında harcadığın her {singleStarIcon} için {BlockForStars:diff()} [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.

name: Cloak of Stars
description: Gain 7 [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.tha: ได้รับ {Block:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]

name: Cloak of Stars+
description: Gain 10 [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.tha: ได้รับ {Block:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]

name: Collision Course
description:
Deal 11 damage.
Add a [gold]Debris[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Debris[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
将一张[gold]碎屑[/gold]添加至你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Erhalte einen [gold]Schutt[/gold] auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Agregas una carta de [gold]Escombros[/gold] a tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Ajoutez un [gold]Débris[/gold] à votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Aggiungi la carta [gold]Rottami[/gold] alla tua [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
[gold]デブリ[/gold]を1枚[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
Adicione um [gold]Escombros[/gold] na sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Añade 1 [gold]Escombros[/gold] a tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
เพิ่ม[gold]Debris[/gold] 1 ใบใส่[gold]มือ[/gold]

name: Comet
description:
Deal 33 damage.
Apply 3 [gold]Weak[/gold].
Apply 3 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].

translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
给予{WeakPower:diff()}层[gold]虚弱[/gold]。
给予{VulnerablePower:diff()}层[gold]易伤[/gold]。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Wende {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Schwach[/gold] an.
Wende {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Verwundbar[/gold] an.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Aplicas {WeakPower:diff()} de [gold]debilitamiento[/gold].
Aplicas {VulnerablePower:diff()} de [gold]vulnerabilidad[/gold].
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Applichi {WeakPower:diff()} di [gold]Debolezza[/gold].
Applichi {VulnerablePower:diff()} di [gold]Vulnerabilità[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
[gold]脱力[/gold]{WeakPower:diff()}を付与する。
[gold]弱体[/gold]{VulnerablePower:diff()}を付与する。
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Nałóż {WeakPower:diff()} pkt. [gold]Słabości[/gold].
Nałóż {VulnerablePower:diff()} pkt. [gold]Wrażliwości[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
Aplique {WeakPower:diff()} de [gold]Fraqueza[/gold].
Aplique {VulnerablePower:diff()} de [gold]Vulnerável[/gold].
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Aplica {WeakPower:diff()} de [gold]Debilidad[/gold].
Aplica {VulnerablePower:diff()} de [gold]Vulnerabilidad[/gold].

name: Conqueror
description:
[gold]Forge[/gold] 3.
[gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] deals double damage to the enemy this turn.

translations.eng:
[gold]Forge[/gold] {Forge:diff()}.
[gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] deals double damage to the enemy this turn.
translations.zhs:
[gold]铸造[/gold]{Forge:diff()}。
[gold]君王之剑[/gold]在本回合对敌人造成双倍伤害。
translations.deu:
[gold]Schmiede[/gold] {Forge:diff()}.
[gold]Hoheitsklinge[/gold] fügt diesem Gegner in diesem Zug doppelten Schaden zu.
translations.esp:
Aplicas [gold]forja[/gold] {Forge:diff()}.
[gold]Espada del soberano[/gold] inflige el doble de daño a los enemigos durante este turno.
translations.fra:
[gold]Forgez[/gold] pour {Forge:diff()}.
[gold]Lame souveraine[/gold] inflige le double de dégâts à l'ennemi pendant ce tour.
translations.ita:
Applichi {Forge:diff()} di [gold]Forgiatura[/gold].
La carta [gold]Spada Sovrana[/gold] infligge danno doppio al nemico in questo turno.
translations.jpn:
[gold]鍛造[/gold]{Forge:diff()}。
このターン、[gold]ソヴリン・ブレード[/gold]は対象の敵に2倍のダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
[gold]단조[/gold] {Forge:diff()}.
이번 턴 동안 대상 적이
[gold]군주의 칼날[/gold]로 받는
피해량이 2배가 됩니다.
translations.pol:
[gold]Wykuj[/gold] {Forge:diff()}.
W tej turze [gold]Niebiańskie Ostrze[/gold] zadaje danemu przeciwnikowi podwójne obrażenia.
translations.ptb:
[gold]Forje[/gold] {Forge:diff()}.
[gold]Espada Soberana[/gold] causa o dobro de dano ao inimigo neste turno.
translations.rus:
[gold]Закаляет[/gold] {Forge:diff()}.
В этом ходу [gold]Клинок монарха[/gold] наносит врагу двойной урон.
translations.spa:
[gold]Forja[/gold] {Forge:diff()}.
[gold]Espada del soberano[/gold] inflige el doble de daño al enemigo este turno.
translations.tha:
[gold]หลอมสร้าง[/gold] {Forge:diff()}
และในเทิร์นนี้ [gold]พระแสงอาญาสิทธิ์[/gold]สร้างความเสียหายใส่ศัตรูเป็น 2 เท่า
translations.tur:
{Forge:diff()} [gold]Döv[/gold].
[gold]Egemen Kılıcı[/gold] düşmana bu tur iki kat daha fazla hasar verir.

name: Convergence
description:
Next turn,
gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/regent_energy_icon.png[/img] and [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img].
[gold]Retain[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn.

translations.eng:
Next turn,
gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and {Stars:starIcons()}.
[gold]Retain[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn.
translations.zhs:
在本回合[gold]保留[/gold]你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
在下个回合，
获得{Energy:energyIcons()}与{Stars:starIcons()}。
translations.deu:
Erhalte im nächsten Zug {Energy:energyIcons()} und {Stars:starIcons()}.
[gold]Behalte[/gold] deine [gold]Hand[/gold] in diesem Zug.
translations.esp:
[gold]Retienes[/gold] tu [gold]mano[/gold] durante este turno.
En el próximo turno,
obtienes {Energy:energyIcons()} y {Stars:starIcons()}.
translations.fra:
Au prochain tour,
gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()} et {Stars:starIcons()}.
[gold]Retenez[/gold] votre [gold]Main[/gold] jusqu'au tour suivant.
translations.ita:
Il turno successivo,
ottieni {Energy:energyIcons()} e {Stars:starIcons()}.
[gold]Conservi[/gold] la tua [gold]mano[/gold] in questo turno.
translations.jpn:
次のターン、
{Energy:energyIcons()}と{Stars:starIcons()}を得る。
このターン、[gold]手札[/gold]をすべて[gold]保留[/gold]する。
translations.kor:
다음 턴에, {Energy:energyIcons()}와
{Stars:starIcons()}을 얻습니다.
이번 턴에 [gold]손[/gold]에 있는
카드를 [gold]보존[/gold]합니다.
translations.pol:
W następnej turze,
zyskaj {Energy:energyIcons()} i {Stars:starIcons()}.
[gold]Zachowaj[/gold] swoją [gold]rękę[/gold] w tej turze.
translations.ptb:
No próximo turno,
receba {Energy:energyIcons()} e {Stars:starIcons()}.
[gold]Mantenha[/gold] a sua [gold]Mão[/gold] neste turno.
translations.spa:
Al siguiente turno,
gana {Energy:energyIcons()} y {Stars:starIcons()}.
[gold]Retén[/gold] tu [gold]Mano[/gold] este turno.
translations.tur:
Sonraki turunda
{Energy:energyIcons()} ve {Stars:starIcons()} elde et.
Bu turda [gold]El[/gold]'ini [gold]Sakla[/gold].

name: Cosmic Indifference
description:
Gain 6 [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

translations.eng:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
translations.zhs:
获得{Block:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
将[gold]弃牌堆[/gold]中的一张牌放到你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]的顶部。
translations.deu:
Erhalte {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Lege eine Karte aus deinem [gold]Abwurfstapel[/gold] auf deinen [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold].
translations.esp:
Obtienes {Block:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
Colocas una carta de la [gold]pila de descarte[/gold] en la parte superior del [gold]mazo de robo[/gold].
translations.fra:
Gagnez {Block:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
Placez une carte de votre [gold]Défausse[/gold] sur le dessus de votre [gold]Pioche[/gold].
translations.ita:
Ottieni {Block:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
Metti una carta dalla tua [gold]pila degli scarti[/gold] in cima al tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{Block:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
[gold]捨て札[/gold]のカードを1枚[gold]山札[/gold]の一番上に置く。
translations.kor:
[gold]방어도[/gold]를 {Block:diff()} 얻습니다.
[gold]버린 카드 더미[/gold]의 카드
1장을 [gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold]
맨 위에 놓습니다.
translations.pol:
Zyskaj {Block:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
Przenieś kartę ze [gold]stosu kart odrzuconych[/gold] na szczyt [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Receba {Block:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
Coloque uma carta da sua [gold]Pilha de Descarte[/gold] no topo da sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold].
translations.rus:
Дает {Block:diff()} [gold]защиты[/gold].
Вы перекладываете выбранную из [gold]стопки сброса[/gold] карту на верх [gold]стопки добора[/gold].
translations.spa:
Gana {Block:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
Coloca una carta de tu [gold]Pila de descarte[/gold] en la parte superior de tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold].
translations.tha:
ได้รับ {Block:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
นำการ์ด 1 ใบจาก[gold]กองทิ้ง[/gold]ไปวางไว้บนสุดของ[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]
translations.tur:
{Block:diff()} [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.
[gold]Atık Deste[/gold]'nden bir kartı [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'nin en üstüne koy.

name: Cosmic Indifference+
description:
Gain 9 [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

translations.eng:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
translations.zhs:
获得{Block:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
将[gold]弃牌堆[/gold]中的一张牌放到你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]的顶部。
translations.deu:
Erhalte {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Lege eine Karte aus deinem [gold]Abwurfstapel[/gold] auf deinen [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold].
translations.esp:
Obtienes {Block:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
Colocas una carta de la [gold]pila de descarte[/gold] en la parte superior del [gold]mazo de robo[/gold].
translations.fra:
Gagnez {Block:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
Placez une carte de votre [gold]Défausse[/gold] sur le dessus de votre [gold]Pioche[/gold].
translations.ita:
Ottieni {Block:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
Metti una carta dalla tua [gold]pila degli scarti[/gold] in cima al tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{Block:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
[gold]捨て札[/gold]のカードを1枚[gold]山札[/gold]の一番上に置く。
translations.kor:
[gold]방어도[/gold]를 {Block:diff()} 얻습니다.
[gold]버린 카드 더미[/gold]의 카드
1장을 [gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold]
맨 위에 놓습니다.
translations.pol:
Zyskaj {Block:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
Przenieś kartę ze [gold]stosu kart odrzuconych[/gold] na szczyt [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Receba {Block:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
Coloque uma carta da sua [gold]Pilha de Descarte[/gold] no topo da sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold].
translations.rus:
Дает {Block:diff()} [gold]защиты[/gold].
Вы перекладываете выбранную из [gold]стопки сброса[/gold] карту на верх [gold]стопки добора[/gold].
translations.spa:
Gana {Block:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
Coloca una carta de tu [gold]Pila de descarte[/gold] en la parte superior de tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold].
translations.tha:
ได้รับ {Block:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
นำการ์ด 1 ใบจาก[gold]กองทิ้ง[/gold]ไปวางไว้บนสุดของ[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]
translations.tur:
{Block:diff()} [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.
[gold]Atık Deste[/gold]'nden bir kartı [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'nin en üstüne koy.

name: Crash Landing
description:
Deal 21 damage to ALL enemies.
Fill your [gold]Hand[/gold] with [gold]Debris[/gold].

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Fill your [gold]Hand[/gold] with [gold]Debris[/gold].
translations.zhs:
对所有敌人造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
用[gold]碎屑[/gold]填满你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
translations.deu:
Füge ALLEN Gegnern {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Fülle deine [gold]Hand[/gold] mit [gold]Schutt[/gold].
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
Llenas tu [gold]mano[/gold] con [gold]Escombros[/gold].
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
Remplissez votre [gold]Main[/gold] de [gold]Débris[/gold].
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
Riempi la tua [gold]mano[/gold] di carte [gold]Rottami[/gold].
translations.jpn:
すべての敵に{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
[gold]手札[/gold]を[gold]デブリ[/gold]で満たす。
translations.kor:
모든 적에게
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
[gold]손[/gold]을 [gold]잔해[/gold]로 가득 채웁니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
Zapełnij swoją [gold]rękę[/gold] [gold]Gruzem[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
Preencha sua [gold]Mão[/gold] com [gold]Escombros[/gold].
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
Llena tu [gold]Mano[/gold] de [gold]Escombros[/gold].
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()} ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
เติมทั้ง[gold]มือ[/gold]ด้วย[gold]Debris[/gold]
translations.tur:
TÜM düşmanlara {Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
[gold]El[/gold]'ini [gold]Moloz[/gold] ile doldur.

name: Crescent Spear
description:
Deal 6 damage.
Deals 2 additional damage for ALL your cards that have a [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img] cost.

translations.tha: หอกจันทร์เสี้ยว

translations.eng:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for ALL your cards that have a {singleStarIcon} cost.
translations.zhs:
造成{CalculatedDamage:diff()}点伤害。
你每有一张拥有{singleStarIcon}耗能的卡牌，这张牌就额外造成{ExtraDamage:diff()}点伤害。
translations.deu:
Füge {CalculatedDamage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Fügt {ExtraDamage:diff()} Schaden mehr für ALLE deine Karten mit {singleStarIcon}-Kosten zu.
translations.esp:
Infliges {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de daño.
Infliges {ExtraDamage:diff()} de daño adicional por TODAS las cartas de costo {singleStarIcon}.
translations.fra:
Infligez {CalculatedDamage:diff()} dégâts.
Inflige {ExtraDamage:diff()} dégâts supplémentaires pour TOUTES vos cartes coûtant des {singleStarIcon}.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {CalculatedDamage:diff()} di danno.
Infligge {ExtraDamage:diff()} di danno extra per TUTTE le carte tue carte con {singleStarIcon} come costo.
translations.jpn:
{CalculatedDamage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
{singleStarIcon}をコストに持つすべてのカード1枚につき、追加で{ExtraDamage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
피해를 {CalculatedDamage:diff()} 줍니다.
보유한 카드 중 {singleStarIcon} 비용을
지닌 카드 1장당
피해량이 {ExtraDamage:diff()} 증가합니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {CalculatedDamage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Zadaje dodatkowo {ExtraDamage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń za WSZYSTKIE karty kosztujące {singleStarIcon}.
translations.ptb:
Cause {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de dano.
Causa {ExtraDamage:diff()} de dano adicional por TODAS as suas cartas que possuam um custo de {singleStarIcon}.
translations.rus:
Наносит {CalculatedDamage:diff()} урона.
Наносит на {ExtraDamage:diff()} урона больше за КАЖДУЮ вашу карту, требующую {singleStarIcon}.
translations.spa:
Inflige {CalculatedDamage:diff()} de daño.
Inflige {ExtraDamage:diff()} de daño adicional por CADA UNA de tus cartas que cuesten {singleStarIcon}.
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {CalculatedDamage:diff()}
สร้างความเสียหายเพิ่ม {ExtraDamage:diff()} ตามจำนวนการ์ดทั้งหมดของคุณที่มีค่าร่าย {singleStarIcon}
translations.tur:
{CalculatedDamage:diff()} hasar ver.
{singleStarIcon} bedeli olan TÜM kartlarının sayısı kadar fazladan {ExtraDamage:diff()} hasar verir.

description: Deal 7 damage to ALL enemies. All enemies lose 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.

translations.eng: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. All enemies lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
translations.zhs: 对所有敌人造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。所有敌人在本回合失去{StrengthLoss:diff()}点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu:
Füge ALLEN Gegnern {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Alle Gegner verlieren für diesen Zug {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Stärke[/gold].

translations.kor:
모든 적에게
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.

translations.ptb: Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano a TODOS os inimigos. Todos os inimigos perdem {StrengthLoss:diff()} de [gold]Força[/gold] neste turno.

translations.spa: Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos. Pierden {StrengthLoss:diff()} de [gold]Fuerza[/gold] este turno.
translations.tha: สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()} ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด ศัตรูทั้งหมดเสีย {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]ในเทิร์นนี้
translations.tur: TÜM düşmanlara {Damage:diff()} hasar ver. Bu turda tüm düşmanlar {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Kuvvet[/gold] kaybeder.

description:
Draw 3 cards.
Choose a Skill in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and play it 3 times.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Choose a Skill in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and play it {Repeat:diff()} times.

抽{Cards:diff()}张牌。
选择你[gold]手牌[/gold]中的一张技能牌，并将其打出{Repeat:diff()}次。
translations.deu:
Ziehe {Cards:diff()} Karten.
Wähle eine Fertigkeit aus deiner [gold]Hand[/gold] und spiele sie {Repeat:diff()} Mal.
translations.esp:
Robas {Cards:diff()} cartas.
Eliges una carta de habilidad de tu [gold]mano[/gold] y la juegas {Repeat:diff()} veces.
translations.fra:
Piochez {Cards:diff()} cartes.
Sélectionnez une Compétence dans votre [gold]Main[/gold] et jouez-la {Repeat:diff()} fois.
translations.ita:
Peschi {Cards:diff()} carte.
Scegli una carta Abilità nella tua [gold]mano[/gold] e giocala {Repeat:diff()} volte.

카드를 {Cards:diff()}장 뽑습니다.

name: Dying Star
description:
[gold]Ethereal[/gold].
Deal 9 damage to ALL enemies. ALL enemies lose 9 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.

translations.eng: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. ALL enemies lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
translations.zhs: 对所有敌人造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。所有敌人在本回合中失去{StrengthLoss:diff()}点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu: Füge ALLEN Gegnern {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu. ALLE Gegner verlieren für diesen Zug {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Stärke[/gold].
translations.esp: Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos, los cuales pierden {StrengthLoss:diff()} de [gold]fuerza[/gold] en este turno.
translations.fra: Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts à TOUS les ennemis. TOUS les ennemis perdent {StrengthLoss:diff()} de [gold]Force[/gold] jusqu'à la fin du tour.
translations.ita: Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno a TUTTI i nemici. Tutti i nemici perdono {StrengthLoss:diff()} di [gold]Forza[/gold] in questo turno.
translations.jpn: すべての敵に{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。ターン終了時まですべての敵は[gold]筋力[/gold]{StrengthLoss:diff()}を失う。
translations.kor:
모든 적에게
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
이번 턴 동안 모든 적이
[gold]힘[/gold]을 {StrengthLoss:diff()} 잃습니다.
translations.pol: Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom. W tej turze WSZYSCY przeciwnicy tracą {StrengthLoss:diff()} pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold].
translations.ptb: Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano a TODOS os inimigos. TODOS os inimigos perdem {StrengthLoss:diff()} de [gold]Força[/gold] neste turno.
translations.rus: Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона ВСЕМ врагам. Отнимает у ВСЕХ врагов {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]силы[/gold] на этот ход.
translations.spa: Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos. TODOS los enemigos pierden {StrengthLoss:diff()} de [gold]Fuerza[/gold] este turno.
translations.tha: สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()} ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด ศัตรูทั้งหมดเสีย {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]ในเทิร์นนี้
translations.tur: TÜM düşmanlara {Damage:diff()} hasar ver. Bu tur TÜM düşmanlar {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Kuvvet[/gold] kaybeder.

name: Glimmer
description:
Draw 3 cards.
Put 1 card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

translations.eng:
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Put {PutBack:diff()} {PutBack:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
translations.zhs:
抽{Cards:diff()}张牌。
将你[gold]手牌[/gold]中的{PutBack:diff()}张牌放到[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]顶部。
translations.esp:
Robas {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
Colocas {PutBack:diff()} {PutBack:plural:carta|cartas} de tu [gold]mano[/gold] en la parte superior del [gold]mazo de robo[/gold].
translations.fra:
Piochez {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carte|cartes}.
Placez {PutBack:diff()} {PutBack:plural:carte|cartes} de votre [gold]Main[/gold] sur le dessus de votre [gold]Pioche[/gold].
translations.ita:
Peschi {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|carte}.
Metti {PutBack:diff()} {PutBack:plural:carta|carte} dalla tua [gold]mano[/gold] in cima al tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold].
translations.jpn:
カードを{Cards:diff()}枚引く。
[gold]手札[/gold]からカードを{PutBack:diff()}枚選び、[gold]山札[/gold]の一番上に置く。
translations.kor:
카드를 {Cards:diff()}장 뽑습니다.
[gold]손[/gold]에 있는 카드 {PutBack:diff()}장을
[gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold]
맨 위에 놓습니다.
translations.pol:
Dobierz {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart}.
Przenieś {PutBack:diff()} {PutBack:plural:kartę|karty|kart} z [gold]ręki[/gold] na szczyt [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Compre {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
Coloque {PutBack:diff()} {PutBack:plural:carta|cartas} da sua [gold]Mão[/gold] no topo da sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold].
translations.rus:
Вы добираете {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт}.
Вы кладете {PutBack:diff()} {PutBack:plural(ru):выбранную карту|выбранные карты|выбранных карт} из [gold]руки[/gold] на верх [gold]стопки добора[/gold].
translations.spa:
Roba {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
Coloca {PutBack:diff()} {PutBack:plural:carta|cartas} de tu [gold]Mano[/gold] en la parte superior de tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold].
translations.tha:
จั่วการ์ด {Cards:diff()} ใบ
นำการ์ด {PutBack:diff()} ใบจาก[gold]มือ[/gold]ไปวางไว้บนสุดของ[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]

name: Glitterstream
description:
Gain 11 [gold]Block[/gold].
Next turn, gain 5 [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.zhs:
获得{Block:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
在下一回合获得{BlockNextTurn:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.esp:
Obtienes {Block:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
En el próximo turno, obtienes {BlockNextTurn:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra:
Gagnez {Block:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
Au prochain tour, gagnez {BlockNextTurn:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita:
Ottieni {Block:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
Il turno successivo ottieni {BlockNextTurn:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{Block:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
次のターン、{BlockNextTurn:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.pol:
Zyskaj {Block:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
W następnej turze zyskaj {BlockNextTurn:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Receba {Block:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
No próximo turno, receba {BlockNextTurn:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.rus:
Дает {Block:diff()} [gold]защиты[/gold].
Даcт {BlockNextTurn:diff()} [gold]защиты[/gold] в начале следующего хода.
translations.spa:
Gana {Block:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
Al siguiente turno, gana {BlockNextTurn:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha:
ได้รับ {Block:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
เทิร์นถัดไป ได้รับ {BlockNextTurn:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
translations.tur:
{Block:diff()} [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.
Bir sonraki tur {BlockNextTurn:diff()} [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.

name: GUARDS!!!
description:
[gold]Transform[/gold] any number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]Minion Sacrifice[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.eng: [gold]Transform[/gold] any number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Minion Sacrifice+|Minion Sacrifice}[/gold].
translations.zhs: 将你[gold]手牌[/gold]中的任意张牌[gold]变化[/gold]为[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:仆从捐躯+|仆从捐躯}[/gold]。
translations.esp: [gold]Transformas[/gold] cualquier cantidad de cartas de tu [gold]mano[/gold] en [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Sacrificio de esbirros+|Sacrificio de esbirros}[/gold].
translations.fra: [gold]Transformez[/gold] autant de cartes de votre [gold]Main[/gold] que vous souhaitez en [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Sbire sacrificiel+|Sbire sacrificiel}[/gold].
translations.ita: [gold]Trasformi[/gold] un numero qualsiasi di carte nella tua [gold]mano[/gold] nella carta [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Sacrificio del Seguace+|Sacrificio del Seguace}[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]手札[/gold]からカードを任意の枚数選び、[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:ミニオンの盾+|ミニオンの盾}[/gold]に[gold]変化[/gold]させる。
translations.kor:
[gold]손[/gold]에 있는 카드를
원하는 만큼
[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:하수인 희생+|하수인 희생}[/gold]으로
[gold]변화[/gold]시킵니다.
translations.pol: [gold]Zmień[/gold] dowoloną liczbę kart w [gold]ręce[/gold] w [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Poświęcenie służby+|Poświęcenie służby}[/gold]
translations.ptb: [gold]Transforme[/gold] qualquer quantidade de cartas na sua [gold]Mão[/gold] em [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Sacrifício de Lacaio+|Sacrifício de Lacaio}[/gold].
translations.spa: [gold]Transforma[/gold] cualquier número de cartas de tu [gold]Mano[/gold] en [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Sacrificio de esbirro+|Sacrificio de esbirro}[/gold].
translations.tha: [gold]แปรสภาพ[/gold]การ์ดกี่ใบก็ได้ใน[gold]มือ[/gold]ให้เป็น[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:ลูกน้องสละชีพ+|ลูกน้องสละชีพ}[/gold]
translations.tur: [gold]El[/gold]'indeki herhangi sayıda kartı [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Uşak Fedakarlığı+|Uşak Fedakarlığı}[/gold] kartına [gold]Dönüştür[/gold].

name: Hammer Time
description: Whenever you [gold]Forge[/gold], all allies [gold]Forge[/gold] as well.

translations.eng: Whenever you [gold]Forge[/gold], all allies [gold]Forge[/gold] as well.
translations.zhs: 每当你[gold]铸造[/gold]时，所有盟友也都[gold]铸造[/gold]相同的数值。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du [gold]Schmiedest[/gold], [gold]Schmieden[/gold] alle Verbündeten ebenso.
translations.esp: Al aplicar [gold]forja[/gold], tus camaradas [gold]también lo harán[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous [gold]Forgez[/gold], tous vos alliés [gold]Forgent[/gold] également.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che [gold]Forgi[/gold], anche tutti gli alleati [gold]forgiano[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]鍛造[/gold]を行うたび、味方全員も[gold]鍛造[/gold]を行う。
translations.ptb: Sempre que você [gold]Forjar[/gold], todos os aliados também [gold]Forjam[/gold].
translations.rus: Когда вы [gold]закаляете[/gold], другие игроки [gold]закаляют[/gold] столько же.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณ[gold]หลอมสร้าง[/gold] พันธมิตรทั้งหมดจะ[gold]หลอมสร้าง[/gold]เช่นกัน

name: Hammer Time+
description: Whenever you [gold]Forge[/gold], all allies [gold]Forge[/gold] as well.

translations.eng: Whenever you [gold]Forge[/gold], all allies [gold]Forge[/gold] as well.
translations.zhs: 每当你[gold]铸造[/gold]时，所有盟友也都[gold]铸造[/gold]相同的数值。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du [gold]Schmiedest[/gold], [gold]Schmieden[/gold] alle Verbündeten ebenso.
translations.esp: Al aplicar [gold]forja[/gold], tus camaradas [gold]también lo harán[/gold].
