translations.tur: Sonraki {BufferPower:plural:sefer|{BufferPower:diff()} sefer} CP'ne alacağın hasarı engeller.

name: Bulk Up
description:
Lose 1 Orb Slot.
Gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold].
Gain 2 [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

translations.zhs:
失去{OrbSlots:diff()}个充能球栏位。
获得{StrengthPower:diff()}点[gold]力量[/gold]。
获得{DexterityPower:diff()}点[gold]敏捷[/gold]。
translations.esp:
Pierdes {OrbSlots:diff()} {OrbSlots:plural:espacio|espacios} de orbe.
Obtienes {StrengthPower:diff()} de [gold]fuerza[/gold].
Obtienes {DexterityPower:diff()} de [gold]destreza[/gold].
translations.fra:
Perdez {OrbSlots:diff()} {OrbSlots:plural:Emplacement d'Orbe|Emplacements d'Orbe}.
Gagnez {StrengthPower:diff()} de [gold]Force[/gold].
Gagnez {DexterityPower:diff()} de [gold]Dextérité[/gold].
translations.ita:
Perdi {OrbSlots:diff()} {OrbSlots:plural:spazio Globi|spazi Globi}.
Ottieni {StrengthPower:diff()} di [gold]Forza[/gold].
Ottieni {DexterityPower:diff()} di [gold]Destrezza[/gold].
translations.jpn:
オーブスロットを{OrbSlots:diff()}個失う。
[gold]筋力[/gold]{StrengthPower:diff()}を得る。
[gold]敏捷[/gold]{DexterityPower:diff()}を得る。
translations.pol:
Utrać {OrbSlots:diff()} {OrbSlots:plural:miejsce|miejsca|miejsc} na Sferę.
Zyskaj {StrengthPower:diff()} pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold].
Zyskaj {DexterityPower:diff()} pkt. [gold]Zręczności[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Perca {OrbSlots:diff()} {OrbSlots:plural:Espaço|Espaços} de Orbe.
Receba {StrengthPower:diff()} de [gold]Força[/gold].
Receba {DexterityPower:diff()} de [gold]Destreza[/gold].
translations.spa:
Pierde {OrbSlots:diff()} {OrbSlots:plural:espacio|espacios} de Orbe.
Gana {StrengthPower:diff()} de [gold]Fuerza[/gold].
Gana {DexterityPower:diff()} de [gold]Destreza[/gold].
translations.tha:
เสียช่องเก็บลูกแก้ว {OrbSlots:diff()} ช่อง
ได้รับ {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]
ได้รับ {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]ความชำนาญ[/gold]
translations.tur:
{OrbSlots:diff()} Küre {OrbSlots:plural:Yuvası|Yuvası} kaybet.
{StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Kuvvet[/gold] elde et.
{DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Beceriklilik[/gold] elde et.

name: Claw
description:
Deal 3 damage.
Increase the damage of ALL Claw cards by 2 this combat.

translations.tha: ข่วน

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Increase the damage of ALL Claw cards by {Increase:diff()} this combat.
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
本场战斗中所有爪击卡牌的伤害增加{Increase:diff()}点。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Erhöhe den Schaden ALLER Krallen-Karten für diesen Kampf um {Increase:diff()}.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Aumenta el daño de TODAS las Garras en {Increase:diff()} durante este combate.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Augmentez les dégâts de TOUTES les cartes Griffure de {Increase:diff()} jusqu'à la fin du combat.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Aumenti il danno di TUTTE le carte Artiglio di {Increase:diff()} in questo combattimento.
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
この戦闘中、すべての《爪》のダメージが{Increase:diff()}増加する。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
이번 전투 동안 모든
후벼 파기 카드의
피해량이 {Increase:diff()} 증가합니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Zwiększ obrażenia zadawane przez WSZYSTKIE Szpony w tej walce o {Increase:diff()} pkt.
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
Aumenta o dano de TODAS as cartas Arranhar em {Increase:diff()} neste combate.
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Повышает урон ВСЕХ «Когтей» на {Increase:diff()} на этот бой.
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Aumenta el daño de TODAS las cartas de Tajo en {Increase:diff()} durante este combate.
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
เพิ่มพลังโจมตีให้การ์ดข่วนทั้งหมด {Increase:diff()} ในการต่อสู้นี้
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
TÜM Pençe kartlarının hasarını bu savaş boyunca {Increase:diff()} artır.

name: Compact
description:
Gain 6 [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Transform[/gold] all Status cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]Fuel[/gold].

translations.eng:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Transform[/gold] all Status cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Fuel+|Fuel}[/gold].
translations.zhs:
获得{Block:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
将你[gold]手牌[/gold]中的全部状态牌[gold]变化[/gold]为[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:燃料+|燃料}[/gold]。
translations.deu:
Erhalte {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Transformiere[/gold] alle Status-Karten auf deiner [gold]Hand[/gold] zu [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Treibstoff+|Treibstoff}[/gold].
translations.esp:
Obtienes {Block:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
[gold]Transformas[/gold] todas las cartas de estado en tu [gold]mano[/gold] en [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Gasolina+|Gasolina}[/gold].
translations.fra:
Gagnez {Block:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
[gold]Transformez[/gold] toutes les cartes Statut de votre [gold]Main[/gold] en [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Combustible+|Combustible}[/gold].
translations.ita:
Ottieni {Block:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
[gold]Trasformi[/gold] tutte le carte Stato nella tua [gold]mano[/gold] nella carta [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Carburante+|Carburante}[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{Block:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
[gold]手札[/gold]にあるすべての状態異常を[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:燃料+|燃料}[/gold]に[gold]変化[/gold]させる。
translations.pol:
Zyskaj {Block:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
[gold]Zmień[/gold] wszystkie karty Stanu w [gold]ręce[/gold] w [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Paliwo+|Paliwo}[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Receba {Block:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
[gold]Transforme[/gold] todas as cartas de Condição na sua [gold]Mão[/gold] em [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Combustível+|Combustível}[/gold].
translations.spa:
Gana {Block:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
[gold]Transforma[/gold] todas las cartas de Estado de tu [gold]Mano[/gold] en [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Combustible+|Combustible}[/gold].
translations.tha:
ได้รับ {Block:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
[gold]แปรสภาพ[/gold]การ์ดสถานะทั้งหมดใน[gold]มือ[/gold]เป็น[gold]{IfUpgraded:show:เชื้อเพลิง+|เชื้อเพลิง}[/gold]
translations.tur:
{Block:diff()} [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.
[gold]El[/gold]'indeki tüm Durum kartlarını [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Benzin+|Benzin}[/gold] kartına [gold]Dönüştür[/gold].

name: Consuming Shadow
description:
[gold]Channel[/gold] 2 [gold]Dark[/gold].
At the end of your turn, [gold]Evoke[/gold] your leftmost Orb.

translations.eng:
[gold]Channel[/gold] {Repeat:diff()} [gold]Dark[/gold].
At the end of your turn, [gold]Evoke[/gold] your leftmost Orb.
translations.zhs:
[gold]生成[/gold]{Repeat:diff()}个[gold]黑暗[/gold]充能球。
在你的回合结束时，[gold]激发[/gold]你最左侧的充能球。
translations.deu:
[gold]Erschaffe[/gold] {Repeat:diff()} [gold]Schatten[/gold].
[gold]Entlade[/gold] immer am Ende deines Zuges deinen hintersten Orb.
translations.esp:
[gold]Canalizas[/gold] {Repeat:diff()} de [gold]oscuridad[/gold].
Al final de tu turno, [gold]descargas[/gold] tu orbe del extremo izquierdo.
translations.fra:
[gold]Canalisez[/gold] {Repeat:diff()} [gold]Orbes ténébreux[/gold].
À la fin de votre tour, [gold]Activez[/gold] votre Orbe le plus à gauche.
translations.ita:
[gold]Tetroglobi[/gold] [gold]canalizzati[/gold]: {Repeat:diff()}.
Al termine del tuo turno, [gold]evochi[/gold] il tuo primo Globo a sinistra.
translations.jpn:
[gold]ダーク[/gold]{Repeat:diff()}を[gold]生成[/gold]する。
ターン終了時、左端のオーブを[gold]解放[/gold]する。
translations.kor:
[gold]암흑[/gold]을 {Repeat:diff()}번 [gold]영창[/gold]합니다.
내 턴 종료 시, 가장 왼쪽의 구체를 [gold]발현[/gold]합니다.
translations.pol:
[gold]Załaduj[/gold] {Repeat:diff()} [gold]Sfery Ciemności[/gold].
Pod koniec tury [gold]Wyładuj[/gold] ostatnią Sferę.
translations.ptb:
[gold]Canalize[/gold] {Repeat:diff()} [gold]Trevas[/gold].
No final do seu turno, [gold]Evoque[/gold] sua Orbe mais à esquerda.
translations.rus:
[gold]Заряжает[/gold] {Repeat:diff()} [gold]сферы тьмы[/gold].
[gold]Разряжает[/gold] левую сферу в конце хода.
translations.spa:
[gold]Invoca[/gold] {Repeat:diff()} [gold]Oscuridad[/gold].
Al final de tu turno, [gold]Descarga[/gold] el Orbe situado más a la izquierda.
translations.tha:
[gold]ปลุกเสก[/gold] {Repeat:diff()} [gold]ความมืด[/gold]
ตอนจบเทิร์น [gold]ปล่อยพลัง[/gold]ลูกแก้วลูกซ้ายสุด

name: Coolant
description: At the start of your turn, gain 2 [gold]Block[/gold] for each unique Orb you have.

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, gain {CoolantPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each unique Orb you have.
translations.zhs: 在你的回合开始时，你每有一种不同的充能球，就获得{CoolantPower:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Erhalte immer zu Beginn deines Zuges {CoolantPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] für jeden unterschiedlichen Orb, den du hast.
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu turno, obtienes {CoolantPower:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold] por cada orbe único que tengas.
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, gagnez {CoolantPower:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold] pour chaque Orbe unique.
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo turno, ottieni {CoolantPower:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold] per ogni Globo unico che possiedi.
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、生成中のオーブ1種類につき{CoolantPower:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.kor:
내 턴 시작 시, 영창된
구체의 종류 하나당
[gold]방어도[/gold]를 {CoolantPower:diff()} 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Na początku tury zyskaj {CoolantPower:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold] za każdy posiadany rodzaj Sfery.
translations.ptb: No início do seu turno, receba {CoolantPower:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold] por cada tipo de Orbe que você possuir.
translations.rus: Дает {CoolantPower:diff()} [gold]защиты[/gold] в начале хода за каждую уникальную заряженную сферу.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu turno, gana {CoolantPower:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold] por cada Orbe único que tengas.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น ได้รับ {CoolantPower:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]ตามจำนวนลูกแก้วไม่ซ้ำธาตุที่คุณมี
translations.tur: Turunun başında sahip olduğun her eşsiz Küre için {CoolantPower:diff()} [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.

name: Creative AI
description: At the start of your turn, add a random Power into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

translations.tha: ปัญญาประดิษฐ์สร้างสรรค์

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, add a random Power into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在你的回合开始时，将一张随机能力牌加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
translations.deu: Erhalte immer zu Beginn deines Zuges eine zufällige Macht auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu turno, agregas un poder al azar a tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, ajoutez un Pouvoir aléatoire à votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo turno, aggiungi una carta Potere casuale alla tua [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、ランダムなパワーを1枚[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。
translations.kor:
내 턴 시작 시,
무작위 파워 카드를 1장
[gold]손[/gold]으로 가져옵니다.
translations.pol: Na początku tury dodaj losową Moc do [gold]ręki[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início do seu turno, adicione um Poder aleatório na sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.rus: Добавляет в [gold]руку[/gold] случайный Талант в начале хода.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu turno, añade un Poder aleatorio a tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น เพิ่มการ์ดพลัง 1 ใบแบบสุ่มใส่[gold]มือ[/gold]
translations.tur: Her turunun başında [gold]El[/gold]'ine rastgele bir Güç kartı ekle.

name: Darkness
description:
[gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Dark[/gold].
Trigger the passive ability of all [gold]Dark[/gold] Orbs.

translations.tha: ความมืดมิด

translations.eng:
[gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Dark[/gold].
Trigger the passive ability of all [gold]Dark[/gold] Orbs{IfUpgraded:show: twice|}.
translations.zhs:
[gold]生成[/gold]1[gold]黑暗[/gold]充能球。
触发所有[gold]黑暗[/gold]充能球的被动{IfUpgraded:show:两次|}。
translations.deu:
[gold]Erschaffe[/gold] 1 [gold]Schatten[/gold].
Löse die passive Fähigkeit all deiner [gold]Schatten[/gold]-Orbs{IfUpgraded:show: zweimal|} aus.
translations.esp:
[gold]Canalizas[/gold] 1 de [gold]oscuridad[/gold].
Activas la habilidad pasiva de todos los orbes de [gold]oscuridad[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: dos veces|}.
translations.fra:
[gold]Canalisez[/gold] 1 [gold]Orbe ténébreux[/gold].
Déclenchez la capacité passive de tous vos [gold]Orbes ténébreux[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: 2 fois|}.
translations.ita:
[gold]Tetroglobi[/gold] [gold]canalizzati[/gold]: 1.
Attivi l'abilità passiva di ogni [gold]Tetroglobo[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show:due volte|}.
translations.jpn:
[gold]ダーク[/gold]1を[gold]生成[/gold]する。
すべての[gold]ダーク[/gold]オーブの自動効果を{IfUpgraded:show:2回|}発動する。
translations.pol:
[gold]Załaduj[/gold] 1 [gold]Sferę Ciemności[/gold].
Aktywuj umiejętność bierną wszystkich [gold]Sfer Ciemności[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: dwukrotnie|}.
translations.ptb:
[gold]Canalize[/gold] 1 [gold]Trevas[/gold].
Ativa a habilidade passiva de todas as Orbes de [gold]Trevas[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: duas vezes|}.
translations.rus:
[gold]Заряжает[/gold] 1 [gold]сферу тьмы[/gold].
Активирует пассивный эффект всех [gold]сфер тьмы[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show: 2 раза|}.
translations.spa:
[gold]Invoca[/gold] 1 [gold]Oscuridad[/gold].
Activa la habilidad pasiva de todos tus Orbes de [gold]Oscuridad[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: dos veces|}.
translations.tha:
[gold]ปลุกเสก[/gold] 1 [gold]ความมืด[/gold]
ผลต่อเนื่องของลูกแก้ว[gold]ความมืด[/gold]ทั้งหมดทำงาน{IfUpgraded:show: 2 ครั้ง|}
translations.tur:
1 [gold]Karanlık[/gold] [gold]Oluştur[/gold].
Tüm [gold]Karanlık[/gold] Kürelerin pasif yeteneğini{IfUpgraded:show: iki kez|} aktifleştir.

name: Echo Form
description:
[gold]Ethereal[/gold].
The first card you play each turn is played an extra time.

translations.tha: ร่างกังวาน

translations.eng: The first card you play each turn is played an extra time.
translations.zhs: 你每回合打出的第一张牌会被打出两次。
translations.deu: In jedem Zug wird die erste Karte, die du spielst, ein weiteres Mal gespielt.
translations.esp: Podrás jugar dos veces la primera carta que juegues en cada turno.
translations.fra: La première carte que vous jouez chaque tour est jouée une fois supplémentaire.
translations.ita: La prima carta che giochi in ogni turno viene giocata una volta in più.
translations.jpn: 毎ターン、最初にプレイするカードをもう一度プレイする。
translations.kor:
매 턴마다 처음으로
사용하는 카드가
1번 추가로 사용됩니다.
translations.pol: W każdej turze pierwsza zagrana karta jest zagrywana dwukrotnie.
translations.ptb: A primeira carta que você jogar a cada turno será jogada uma vez adicional.
translations.rus: Первая карта за ход разыгрывается еще раз.
translations.spa: La primera carta que juegues cada turno se juega una vez más.

translations.esp:

una carta de ataque de costo 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} en cada turno
vuelve a tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra:
{FeralPower:plural:La première fois|Les {FeralPower:diff()} premières fois} de chaque tour que vous jouez une
Attaque coûtant 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)},
celle-ci retourne dans votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita:
{FeralPower:plural:La prima volta|{FeralPower:diff()} Le prime volte} che giochi una 
carta Attacco da costo 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} in ogni turno,
rimettila nella tua [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.jpn: 毎ターン、コスト0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}のアタックをプレイするたび、そのカードを[gold]手札[/gold]に戻す（1ターンにつき{FeralPower:diff()}枚まで）。
translations.kor:
매 턴마다 처음 비용이
0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}인 공격 카드를{FeralPower:choose(1):| {FeralPower:diff()}장}
사용 시, 그 카드를 다시
[gold]손[/gold]으로 가져옵니다.
translations.ptb:
{FeralPower:plural:Na primeira vez|{FeralPower:Nas primeiras diff()} vezes} que você jogar um
Ataque de custo 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} a cada turno,
o retorne à sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.tha:
{FeralPower:choose(1):ครั้งแรก|{FeralPower:diff()} ครั้งแรก}ที่คุณเล่นการ์ดโจมตีค่าร่าย
0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} ในแต่ละเทิร์น
นำมันกลับขึ้น[gold]มือ[/gold]

name: Fight Through
description:
Gain 13 [gold]Block[/gold].
Add 2 [gold]Wounds[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].

translations.zhs:
获得{Block:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
将2张[gold]伤口[/gold]加入你的[gold]弃牌堆[/gold]。
translations.esp:
Obtienes {Block:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
Agregas 2 cartas de [gold]Herida[/gold] a tu [gold]pila de descarte[/gold].
translations.ita:
Ottieni {Block:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
Aggiungi 2 carte [gold]Ferita[/gold] alla tua [gold]pila degli scarti[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{Block:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
[gold]負傷[/gold]を2枚[gold]捨て札[/gold]に加える。
translations.pol:
Zyskaj {Block:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
Dodaj 2 [gold]Rany[/gold] do [gold]stosu kart odrzuconych[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Receba {Block:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
Adicione 2 [gold]Ferimentos[/gold] na sua [gold]Pilha de Descarte[/gold].
translations.spa:
Gana {Block:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
Añade 2 [gold]Heridas[/gold] a tu [gold]Pila de descarte[/gold].
translations.tha:
ได้รับ {Block:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
เพิ่ม[gold]Wounds[/gold] 2 ใบเข้า[gold]กองทิ้ง[/gold]

name: Flak Cannon
description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] ALL your Status cards.
Deal 8 damage to a random enemy for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].

translations.jpn:
すべての状態異常を[gold]廃棄[/gold]する。[gold]廃棄[/gold]したカード1枚につき、ランダムな敵に{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。{InCombat:
(攻撃回数は{CalculatedHits:diff()}回)|}
translations.kor:
모든 상태이상 카드를
[gold]소멸[/gold]시킵니다.
[gold]소멸[/gold]시킨 카드 1장당
무작위 적에게
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.{InCombat:
({CalculatedHits:diff()}번 적중합니다)|}

name: Focused Strike
description:
Deal 9 damage.
Gain 1 [gold]Focus[/gold] this turn.

translations.jpn: フォーカスストライク
translations.tha: จู่โจมโฟกัส

translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
在本回合获得{FocusPower:diff()}点[gold]集中[/gold]。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Erhalte für diesen Zug {FocusPower:diff()} [gold]Fokus[/gold].
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Obtienes {FocusPower:diff()} de [gold]concentración[/gold] en este turno.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Gagnez {FocusPower:diff()} de [gold]Focalisation[/gold] jusqu'à la fin du tour.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Ottieni {FocusPower:diff()} di [gold]Focus[/gold] in questo turno.
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
ターン終了時まで[gold]集中力[/gold]{FocusPower:diff()}を得る。
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Zyskaj {FocusPower:diff()} pkt. [gold]Skupienia[/gold] w tej turze.
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
Receba {FocusPower:diff()} de [gold]Foco[/gold] neste turno.
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Дает {FocusPower:diff()} [gold]фокуса[/gold] на этот ход.
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Gana {FocusPower:diff()} de [gold]Concentración[/gold] este turno.
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
ได้รับ {FocusPower:diff()} [gold]โฟกัส[/gold]ในเทิร์นนี้
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
Bu tur {FocusPower:diff()} [gold]Odak[/gold] elde et.

name: FTL
description:
Deal 5 damage.
If you have played fewer than 3 cards this turn, draw 1 card.

translations.tha: เร็วเหนือแสง

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have played fewer than {PlayMax:diff()} cards this turn, draw 1 card.
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
如果你在这回合打出的牌数小于{PlayMax:diff()}张，抽1张牌。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Falls du in diesem Zug weniger als {PlayMax:diff()} Karten gespielt hast, ziehe 1 Karte.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Si jugaste menos de {PlayMax:diff()} cartas en este turno, robas 1 carta.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Si vous avez joué moins de {PlayMax:diff()} cartes ce tour, piochez 1 carte.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Se hai meno di {PlayMax:diff()} carte in questo turno, peschi 1 carta.
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
このターン、プレイしたカードが{PlayMax:diff()}枚未満の場合、カードを1枚引く。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
이번 턴에 카드를
{PlayMax:diff()}장보다 적게 사용했다면,
카드를 1장 뽑습니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Jeżeli w tej turze zagrano mniej niż {PlayMax:diff()} karty, dobierz 1 kartę.
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
Se você jogou menos de {PlayMax:diff()} cartas neste turno, compre 1 carta.
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Вы добираете 1 карту, если разыграли меньше {PlayMax:diff()} карт в этом ходу.
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Si has jugado menos de {PlayMax:diff()} cartas este turno, roba 1 carta.
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
ถ้าคุณใช้การ์ดไม่เกิน {PlayMax:diff()} ใบในเทิร์นนี้ จั่ว 1 การ์ด
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
Eğer bu tur {PlayMax:diff()} karttan daha az kart oynadıysan 1 kart çek.

name: Genetic Algorithm
description:
Gain 1 [gold]Block[/gold].
Permanently increase this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by 3.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.tha: อัลกอริทึมพันธุกรรม

translations.eng:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Permanently increase this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by {Increase:diff()}.
translations.zhs:
获得{Block:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
每打出一次，这张牌在本局游戏中的[gold]格挡[/gold]值永久增加{Increase:diff()}点。
translations.deu:
Erhalte {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Erhöhe den [gold]Block[/gold] dieser Karte permanent um {Increase:diff()}.
translations.esp:
Obtienes {Block:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
Aumenta en {Increase:diff()} el [gold]bloqueo[/gold] de esta carta de forma permanente.
translations.fra:
Gagnez {Block:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
Augmentez l'[gold]Armure[/gold] conférée par cette carte de {Increase:diff()} de façon permanente.
translations.ita:
Ottieni {Block:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
Aumenti permanentemente il [gold]Blocco[/gold] di questa carta di {Increase:diff()}.
translations.jpn:
{Block:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
このカードの[gold]ブロック[/gold]値が永続的に{Increase:diff()}増加する。
translations.kor:
[gold]방어도[/gold]를 {Block:diff()} 얻습니다.
이 카드로 얻는 [gold]방어도[/gold]가
영구적으로 {Increase:diff()} 증가합니다.
translations.pol:
Zyskaj {Block:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
Na stałe zwiększ [gold]Blok[/gold] otrzymywany z tej karty o {Increase:diff()} pkt.
translations.ptb:
Receba {Block:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
Aumenta permanentemente a [gold]Proteção[/gold] desta carta em {Increase:diff()}.
translations.rus:
Дает {Block:diff()} [gold]защиты[/gold].
Даваемая [gold]защита[/gold] повышается на {Increase:diff()} до конца вылазки.
translations.spa:
Gana {Block:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
Aumenta el [gold]Bloqueo[/gold] de esta carta en {Increase:diff()}.
translations.tha:
ได้รับ {Block:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
[gold]บล็อก[/gold]ของการ์ดนี้เพิ่มขึ้น {Increase:diff()} แบบถาวร
translations.tur:
{Block:diff()} [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.
Bu kartın [gold]Blok[/gold]'unu kalıcı olarak {Increase:diff()} artır.

translations.ptb:

Aumenta permanentemente a [gold]Proteção[/gold] desta carta em {Increase:diff()}.
translations.rus:
Дает {Block:diff()} [gold]защиты[/gold].

translations.spa:
Gana {Block:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
Aumenta el [gold]Bloqueo[/gold] de esta carta en {Increase:diff()}.
translations.tha:

translations.tur:
{Block:diff()} [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.
Bu kartın [gold]Blok[/gold]'unu kalıcı olarak {Increase:diff()} artır.

name: Go for the Eyes
description:
Deal 3 damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, apply 1 [gold]Weak[/gold].

translations.tha: พุ่งใส่ตา

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
如果敌人的意图是攻击，则给予{WeakPower:diff()}层[gold]虚弱[/gold]。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Falls der Gegner angreifen möchte, wende {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Schwach[/gold] an.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Si el enemigo planea atacar, aplicas {WeakPower:diff()} de [gold]debilitamiento[/gold].
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Si l'ennemi s'apprête à attaquer, appliquez [gold]Affaibli[/gold] ({WeakPower:diff()}).
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Se il nemico si appresta ad attaccare, applichi {WeakPower:diff()} di [gold]Debolezza[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
敵が攻撃を予定している場合、[gold]脱力[/gold]{WeakPower:diff()}を付与する。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
적이 공격할 의도가 있다면 [gold]약화[/gold]를 {WeakPower:diff()} 부여합니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Jeżeli przeciwnik zamierza zaatakować, nałóż {WeakPower:diff()} pkt. [gold]Słabości[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
Se o inimigo tem intenção de atacar, aplique {WeakPower:diff()} de [gold]Fraqueza[/gold].
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Накладывает {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]слабости[/gold], если враг планирует атаковать.
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Si el enemigo tiene intención de atacar, aplica {WeakPower:diff()} de [gold]Debilidad[/gold].
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
ถ้าศัตรูตั้งใจจะโจมตี สร้าง {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]ความอ่อนแอ[/gold]
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
Eğer düşman saldırmayı amaçlıyorsa {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Zayıf[/gold] uygula.

name: Gunk Up
description:
Deal 4 damage 3 times.
Add a [gold]Slimed[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:time|times}.
Add a [gold]Slimed[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害{Repeat:diff()}次。
在你的[gold]弃牌堆[/gold]中加入一张[gold]黏液[/gold]。
translations.deu:
Füge {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:Mal|Mal} {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Erhalte ein [gold]Verschleimt[/gold] in deinen [gold]Abwurfstapel[/gold].
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:vez|veces}.
Agregas [gold]Babeado[/gold] a la [gold]pila de descarte[/gold].
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts {Repeat:diff()} fois.
Ajoutez [gold]Englué[/gold] à votre [gold]Défausse[/gold].
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:volta|volte}.
Aggiungi la carta [gold]Inzaccherato[/gold] alla tua [gold]pila degli scarti[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを{Repeat:diff()}回与える。
[gold]粘液[/gold]を1枚[gold]捨て札[/gold]に加える。
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:raz|razy|razy}.
Dodaj [gold]Śluz[/gold] do [gold]stosu kart odrzuconych[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Causa {Damage:diff()} de dano {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:vez|vezes}.
Adicione uma [gold]Gosma[/gold] na sua [gold]Pilha de Descarte[/gold].
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:vez|veces}.
Añade 1 [gold]Viscoso[/gold] a tu [gold]Pila de descarte[/gold].
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()} จำนวน {Repeat:diff()} ครั้ง
เพิ่ม[gold]Slimed[/gold] 1 ใบเข้า[gold]กองทิ้ง[/gold]
translations.tur:
{Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:kez|kez} {Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
[gold]Atık Deste[/gold]'ne bir [gold]Yapış Yapış[/gold] ekle.

name: Hailstorm
description: At the end of your turn, if you have [gold]Frost[/gold], deal 6 damage to ALL enemies.

translations.tha: พายุลูกเห็บ

translations.eng: At the end of your turn, if you have [gold]Frost[/gold], deal {HailstormPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 在你的回合结束时，如果你有[gold]冰霜[/gold]充能球，则对所有敌人造成{HailstormPower:diff()}点伤害。
translations.deu: Füge immer am Ende deines Zuges ALLEN Gegnern {HailstormPower:diff()} Schaden zu, falls du [gold]Frost[/gold] hast.
translations.esp: Al finalizar tu turno, si tienes [gold]escarcha[/gold], infliges {HailstormPower:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra: À la fin de votre tour, si vous avez un [gold]Orbe glaciaire[/gold], infligez {HailstormPower:diff()} dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: Al termine del tuo turno, se hai un [gold]Crioglobo[/gold], infliggi {HailstormPower:diff()} di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: ターン終了時、[gold]フロスト[/gold]を生成中の場合、すべての敵に{HailstormPower:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
내 턴 종료 시 [gold]냉기[/gold]를
보유하고 있다면, 모든
적에게 피해를 {HailstormPower:diff()} 줍니다.
translations.pol: Jeżeli masz [gold]Załadowaną[/gold] co najmniej [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Sferę Mrozu[/gold] pod koniec tury, zadaj {HailstormPower:diff()} pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
translations.ptb: No final do seu turno, se você possuir [gold]Gelo[/gold], cause {HailstormPower:diff()} de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus: Наносит {HailstormPower:diff()} урона ВСЕМ врагам, если у вас есть заряженная [gold]сфера льда[/gold] в конце хода.
translations.spa: Al final de tu turno, si tienes [gold]Escarcha[/gold], inflige {HailstormPower:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha: ตอนจบเทิร์น ถ้าคุณมี[gold]น้ำแข็ง[/gold] สร้างความเสียหาย {HailstormPower:diff()} ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur: Turunun sonunda [gold]Buz[/gold]'a sahipsen TÜM düşmanlara {HailstormPower:diff()} hasar ver.

name: Hailstorm+
description: At the end of your turn, if you have [gold]Frost[/gold], deal 8 damage to ALL enemies.

translations.tur: Turunun sonunda [gold]Buz[/gold]'a sahipsen TÜM düşmanlara {HailstormPower:diff()} hasar ver.

name: Helix Drill
description: Deal 3 damage for each [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/defect_energy_icon.png[/img] previously spent this turn.

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} previously spent this turn.{InCombat:
(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:time|times})|}
translations.zhs:
在本回合中，每个被使用的{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}，都会使此牌造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害一次。{InCombat:
（命中{CalculatedHits:diff()}次）|}
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu pro {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, die du vorher in diesem Zug ausgegeben hast.{InCombat:
(Trifft {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:Mal|Mal})|}
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño por cada {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} que gastes en este turno.{InCombat:
(Golpeas {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:vez|veces})|}
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts pour chaque {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} déjà dépensé pendant ce tour.{InCombat:
(Se déclenche {CalculatedHits:diff()} fois)|}
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno per ogni {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} che hai precedentemente consumato in questo turno.{InCombat:
(Colpisce {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:volta|volte})|}
translations.jpn:
このターン中に支払った{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}1つにつき、{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。{InCombat:
(攻撃回数は{CalculatedHits:diff()}回)|}
translations.kor:
이번 턴 동안 소모한 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}당 피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.{InCombat:
({CalculatedHits:diff()}번 적중합니다)|}
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń za każdy {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} wydany w tej turze.{InCombat:
(Uderza {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:raz|razy|razy})|}
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano por cada {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} gasta anteriormente neste turno.{InCombat:
(Golpeie {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:vez|vezes})|}
translations.rus:
Наносит по {Damage:diff()} урона за каждую {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, потраченную в этом ходу.{InCombat:
(Наносит урон {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural(ru):раз|раза|раз})|}
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño por cada {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} que hayas gastado este turno.{InCombat:
(Golpea {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:vez|veces}).|}
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()} ตามจำนวน {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} ที่เคยจ่ายในเทิร์นนี้{InCombat:
(โจมตี {CalculatedHits:diff()} ครั้ง)|}
translations.tur:
Bu turda harcadığın her {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} için {Damage:diff()} hasar ver.{InCombat:
({CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:kez|kez} vurur)|}

description: Deal 5 damage for each [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/defect_energy_icon.png[/img] previously spent this turn.

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} previously spent this turn.{InCombat:
(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:time|times})|}
translations.zhs:
在本回合中，每个被使用的{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}，都会使此牌造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害一次。{InCombat:
（命中{CalculatedHits:diff()}次）|}
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu pro {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, die du vorher in diesem Zug ausgegeben hast.{InCombat:
(Trifft {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:Mal|Mal})|}
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño por cada {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} que gastes en este turno.{InCombat:
(Golpeas {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:vez|veces})|}
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts pour chaque {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} déjà dépensé pendant ce tour.{InCombat:
(Se déclenche {CalculatedHits:diff()} fois)|}
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno per ogni {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} che hai precedentemente consumato in questo turno.{InCombat:
(Colpisce {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:volta|volte})|}
translations.jpn:
このターン中に支払った{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}1つにつき、{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。{InCombat:
(攻撃回数は{CalculatedHits:diff()}回)|}
translations.kor:
이번 턴 동안 소모한 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}당 피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.{InCombat:
({CalculatedHits:diff()}번 적중합니다)|}
translations.pol:

(Uderza {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:raz|razy|razy})|}
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano por cada {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} gasta anteriormente neste turno.{InCombat:
(Golpeie {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:vez|vezes})|}
translations.rus:
Наносит по {Damage:diff()} урона за каждую {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, потраченную в этом ходу.{InCombat:
(Наносит урон {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural(ru):раз|раза|раз})|}
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño por cada {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} que hayas gastado este turno.{InCombat:
(Golpea {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:vez|veces}).|}
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()} ตามจำนวน {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} ที่เคยจ่ายในเทิร์นนี้{InCombat:
(โจมตี {CalculatedHits:diff()} ครั้ง)|}
translations.tur:
Bu turda harcadığın her {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} için {Damage:diff()} hasar ver.{InCombat:
({CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:kez|kez} vurur)|}

name: Hologram
description:

Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.tha: ภาพจำลอง

translations.eng:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

获得{Block:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
将[gold]弃牌堆[/gold]中的一张牌放入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。

Erhalte {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Nimm eine Karte aus deinem [gold]Abwurfstapel[/gold] auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.esp:

Colocas una carta de la [gold]pila de descarte[/gold] en tu [gold]mano[/gold].

Placez une carte de votre [gold]Défausse[/gold] à votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita:

{Block:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
[gold]捨て札[/gold]からカードを1枚[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。

translations.rus:

translations.spa:

name: Iteration
description: The first time you draw a Status each turn, draw 2 cards.

translations.eng: The first time you draw a Status each turn, draw {IterationPower:diff()} {IterationPower:plural:card|cards}.
translations.zhs: 每回合你第一次抽到状态牌时，抽{IterationPower:diff()}张牌。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du den ersten Status in einem Zug ziehst, ziehe {IterationPower:diff()} {IterationPower:plural:Karte|Karten}.
translations.esp: Cada turno, la primera vez que robes una carta de estado, robas {IterationPower:diff()} {IterationPower:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.fra: La première fois de chaque tour que vous piochez une carte Statut, piochez {IterationPower:diff()} {IterationPower:plural:carte|cartes}.
translations.ita: La prima volta che peschi una carta Stato in ogni turno, peschi {IterationPower:diff()} {IterationPower:plural:carta|carte}.
translations.jpn: 毎ターン、最初に状態異常を引いた時、カードを{IterationPower:diff()}枚引く。
translations.kor:
매 턴마다 처음으로
상태이상 카드를 뽑을 시,
카드를 {IterationPower:diff()}장 뽑습니다.

translations.tha: ครั้งแรกที่คุณเล่นการ์ดสถานะในแต่ละเทิร์น จั่วการ์ด {IterationPower:diff()} ใบ

translations.spa:
Gana {Block:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
Al comienzo de {LightningRodPower:plural:tu siguiente turno|tus siguientes {:diff()} turnos}, [gold]Invoca[/gold] 1 [gold]Relámpago[/gold].
translations.tha:
ได้รับ {Block:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์นในอีก {LightningRodPower:choose(1):1 เทิร์น|{:diff()} เทิร์น} [gold]ปลุกเสก[/gold] 1 [gold]สายฟ้า[/gold]

name: Lightning Rod+
description:
Gain 7 [gold]Block[/gold].
At the start of the next 2 turns, [gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Lightning[/gold].

translations.tha: สายล่อฟ้า

translations.eng:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
At the start of the next {LightningRodPower:plural:turn|{:diff()} turns}, [gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Lightning[/gold].
translations.zhs:
获得{Block:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
在下{LightningRodPower:diff()}个回合开始时,[gold]生成[/gold]1个[gold]闪电[/gold]充能球。
translations.deu:
Erhalte {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Erschaffe[/gold] zu Beginn {LightningRodPower:plural:deines nächsten Zuges|deiner nächsten {:diff()} Züge} 1 [gold]Blitz[/gold].
translations.esp:
Obtienes {Block:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
Al inicio {LightningRodPower:plural:del próximo turno|de los próximos {:diff()} turnos}, [gold]canalizas[/gold] 1 de [gold]electricidad[/gold].
translations.fra:
Gagnez {Block:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
Au début de {LightningRodPower:plural:votre prochain tour|vos {:diff()} prochains tours}, [gold]Canalisez[/gold] 1 [gold]Orbe kéraunique[/gold].
translations.ita:
Ottieni {Block:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
[gold]Elettroglobi[/gold] [gold]canalizzati[/gold] all'inizio {LightningRodPower:plural:del prossimo turno|dei prossimi {:diff()} turni}: 1.
translations.jpn:
{Block:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
次の{LightningRodPower:diff()}ターンの間、ターン開始時に[gold]ライトニング[/gold]1を[gold]生成[/gold]する。
translations.kor:
[gold]방어도[/gold]를 {Block:diff()} 얻습니다.
다음 {LightningRodPower:choose(1):턴 시작 시|{:diff()}턴 동안 턴 시작 시}, [gold]전기[/gold]를 1번 [gold]영창[/gold]합니다.
translations.pol:
Zyskaj {Block:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
Na początku {LightningRodPower:plural:następnej tury|{:diff()} następnych tur|{:diff()} następnych tur} [gold]Załaduj[/gold] 1 [gold]Sferę Gromu[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Receba {Block:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
No início {LightningRodPower:plural:do seu próximo turno|dos seus próximos {:diff()} turnos}, [gold]Canalize[/gold] 1 [gold]Relâmpago[/gold].
translations.rus:
Дает {Block:diff()} [gold]защиты[/gold].
{LightningRodPower:plural(ru):[gold]Зарядит[/gold]|[gold]Заряжает[/gold]|[gold]Заряжает[/gold]} 1 [gold]сферу молнии[/gold] в начале {LightningRodPower:plural(ru):следующего хода|{:diff()} следующих ходов|{:diff()} следующих ходов}.
translations.spa:
Gana {Block:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
Al comienzo de {LightningRodPower:plural:tu siguiente turno|tus siguientes {:diff()} turnos}, [gold]Invoca[/gold] 1 [gold]Relámpago[/gold].
translations.tha:
ได้รับ {Block:diff()} [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์นในอีก {LightningRodPower:choose(1):1 เทิร์น|{:diff()} เทิร์น} [gold]ปลุกเสก[/gold] 1 [gold]สายฟ้า[/gold]

name: Loop
description: At the start of your turn, trigger the passive ability of your rightmost Orb.

translations.tha: คำสั่งวนซ้ำ

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, trigger the passive ability of your rightmost Orb{IfUpgraded:show: 2 times}.
translations.zhs: 在你的回合开始时，触发你最右侧的一个充能球的被动能力{IfUpgraded:show:2次}。
translations.deu: Löse zu Beginn deines Zuges die passive Fähigkeit deines vordersten Orbs{IfUpgraded:show: 2 Mal} aus.
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu turno, activas la habilidad pasiva de tu orbe del extremo derecho {IfUpgraded:show: 2 veces}.
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, déclenchez la capacité passive de votre Orbe le plus à droite{IfUpgraded:show: 2 fois}.
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo turno, attivi l'abilità passiva del tuo primo Globo a destra{IfUpgraded:show: 2 volte}.
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、右端にあるオーブの自動効果を{IfUpgraded:show:2回}発動する。
translations.kor:
내 턴 시작 시, 가장
오른쪽의 구체의 지속
능력을 {IfUpgraded:show:2번 }발동시킵니다.
translations.pol: Na początku tury aktywuj umiejętność bierną pierwszej Sfery{IfUpgraded:show: dwukrotnie}.
translations.ptb: No início do seu turno, ative a habilidade passiva da sua Orbe mais à direita{IfUpgraded:show: 2 vezes}.
translations.rus: Активирует пассивный эффект правой сферы в начале хода{IfUpgraded:show: 2 раза}.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu turno, activa la habilidad pasiva del Orbe situado más a la derecha{IfUpgraded:show: 2 veces}.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น ผลต่อเนื่องของลูกแก้วลูกขวาสุดจะทำงาน{IfUpgraded:show: อีก 2 ครั้ง}
translations.tur: Turunun başında en sağdaki Küre'nin pasif yeteneğini {IfUpgraded:show:2 kez }aktifleştir.

name: Machine Learning
description: At the start of your turn, draw 1 additional card.

translations.tha: แมชชีนเลิร์นนิ่ง

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, draw {Cards:diff()} additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
translations.zhs: 在你的回合开始时，额外抽{Cards:diff()}张牌。
translations.deu: Ziehe immer zu Beginn deines Zuges {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten} mehr.
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu turno, robas {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionales}.
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, piochez {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carte supplémentaire|cartes supplémentaires}.
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo turno, peschi {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta extra|carte extra}.
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、追加でカードを{Cards:diff()}枚引く。
translations.kor:
내 턴 시작 시, 카드를
추가로 {Cards:diff()}장 뽑습니다.
translations.ptb: No início do seu turno, compre {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionais}.
translations.rus: Вы добираете еще {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт} в начале хода.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu turno, roba {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionales}.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น จั่วการ์ดเพิ่ม {Cards:diff()} ใบ

name: Modded
description:
Gain 1 Orb Slot.
Draw 1 card. Increase this card's cost by 1.

translations.eng:
Gain {Repeat:diff()} Orb {Repeat:plural:Slot|Slots}.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}. Increase this card's cost by 1.
translations.zhs:
获得{Repeat:diff()}个充能球栏位。
抽{Cards:diff()}张牌。这张牌的耗能加1。
translations.deu:
Erhalte {Repeat:diff()} Orb-{Repeat:plural:Slot|Slots}.
Ziehe {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten}. Erhöhe die Kosten dieser Karte um 1.
translations.esp:
Obtienes {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:espacio|espacios} de orbe.
Robas {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}. Aumenta el costo de esta carta en 1.
translations.fra:
Gagnez {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:Emplacement d'Orbe|Emplacements d'Orbe}.
Piochez {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carte|cartes}. Augmentez le coût de cette carte de 1.
translations.ita:
Ottieni {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:spazio Globi|spazi Globi}.
Peschi {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|carte}. Aumenti il costo di questa carta di 1.
translations.jpn:
オーブスロットを{Repeat:diff()}個得る。
カードを{Cards:diff()}枚引く。このカードのコストが1増加する。
translations.kor:
구체 슬롯을 {Repeat:diff()}개 얻습니다.
카드를 {Cards:diff()}장 뽑습니다.
이 카드의 비용이
1 증가합니다.
translations.pol:
Zyskaj {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:miejscę na Sferę|miejsca na Sferę}.
Dobierz {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart}. Zwiększ koszt tej karty o 1.
translations.ptb:
Receba {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:Espaço|Espaços} de Orbe.
Compre {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}. Aumente o custo desta carta em 1.
translations.rus:
Дает {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural(ru):слот|слота|слотов}.
Вы добираете {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт}. Стоимость повышается на 1.
translations.spa:
Gana {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:Espacio|Espacios} de Orbe.
Roba {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}. Aumenta el coste de esta carta en 1.
translations.tha:
ได้รับช่องเก็บลูกแก้ว {Repeat:diff()} ช่อง
จั่วการ์ด {Cards:diff()} ใบ เพิ่มค่าร่ายของการ์ดนี้ 1
translations.tur:
{Repeat:diff()} Küre {Repeat:plural:Yuvası|Yuvası} elde et.
{Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:kart|kart} çek. Bu kartın maliyetini 1 artır.

Add a [gold]Burn[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].

translations.jpn:

[gold]火傷[/gold]を1枚[gold]捨て札[/gold]に加える。
translations.pol:

Dodaj [gold]Poparzenie[/gold] do [gold]stosu kart odrzuconych[/gold].

name: Reboot
description:
Shuffle ALL your cards into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Draw 4 cards.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.tha: เปิดเครื่องใหม่

translations.eng:
Shuffle ALL your cards into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
translations.zhs:
将你的所有未消耗的卡牌重新洗牌放入[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]。
抽{Cards:diff()}张牌。
translations.deu:
Mische ALLE deine Karten in deinen [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold].
Ziehe {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten}.
translations.esp:
Mezclas TODAS las cartas en el [gold]mazo de robo[/gold].
Robas {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.fra:
Mélangez TOUTES vos cartes dans votre [gold]Pioche[/gold].
Piochez {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carte|cartes}.
translations.ita:
Mischi TUTTE le carte nel tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold].
Peschi {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|carte}.
translations.jpn:
すべてのカードを[gold]山札[/gold]に混ぜてシャッフルする。
カードを{Cards:diff()}枚引く。
translations.kor:
모든 카드를 [gold]뽑을 카드[/gold]
[gold]더미[/gold]에 섞어 넣습니다.
카드를 {Cards:diff()}장 뽑습니다.
translations.pol:
Wtasuj WSZYSTKIE swoje karty do [gold]stosu kart rozgrywających[/gold].
Dobierz {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart}.
translations.ptb:
Embaralhe TODAS as suas cartas na sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold].
Compre {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.rus:
ВСЕ карты замешиваются в [gold]стопку добора[/gold].
Вы добираете {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт}.
translations.spa:
Baraja TODAS tus cartas en tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold].
Roba {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.tha:
สับการ์ดทั้งหมดของคุณเข้า[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]
จั่วการ์ด {Cards:diff()} ใบ

name: Rocket Punch
description:
Deal 13 damage.
Draw 1 card.
Whenever you create a Status, reduce this card's cost to 0 [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/defect_energy_icon.png[/img] until played.

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Whenever you create a Status, reduce this card's cost to 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} until played.
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
抽{Cards:diff()}张牌。
每当你生成状态牌时，此牌的耗能将在下一次打出前降为0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Ziehe {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten}.
Immer wenn du einen Status erzeugst, senke die Kosten dieser Karte auf 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, bis du sie spielst.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Robas {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
Al crear una carta de estado, se reduce el costo de esta carta a 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} hasta que se juegue.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Piochez {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carte|cartes}.
Lorsque vous créez une carte Statut, réduisez le coût de cette carte à 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} jusqu'à ce qu'elle soit jouée.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Peschi {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|carte}.
Ogni volta che crei una carta Stato, riduci il costo di questa carta a 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} finché non viene giocata.
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
カードを{Cards:diff()}枚引く。
状態異常を作成するたび、プレイするまでこのカードのコストは0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
카드를 {Cards:diff()}장 뽑습니다.
상태이상 카드를 생성 시,
이 카드의 비용이 사용하기
전까지 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}으로 감소합니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Dobierz {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart}.
Kiedykolwiek stworzysz kartę Stanu, zredukuj koszt tej karty do 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} aż do zagrania.
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
Compre {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
Quando você criar uma carta de Condição, reduza o custo desta carta para 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} até que seja jogada.
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Вы добираете {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт}.
Стоимость понижается до 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} на одно разыгрывание, когда вы создаете Статус.
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Roba {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
Cuando crees una carta de Estado, reduce el coste de esta carta a 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} hasta que se juegue.
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
{Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:kart|kart} çek.
Her Durum kartı oluşturduğunda bu kartın maliyeti, oynanana kadar 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} olur.

Immer wenn du einen Status erzeugst, senke die Kosten dieser Karte auf 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, bis du sie spielst.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Robas {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
Al crear una carta de estado, se reduce el costo de esta carta a 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} hasta que se juegue.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Piochez {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carte|cartes}.
Lorsque vous créez une carte Statut, réduisez le coût de cette carte à 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} jusqu'à ce qu'elle soit jouée.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Peschi {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|carte}.
Ogni volta che crei una carta Stato, riduci il costo di questa carta a 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} finché non viene giocata.
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
カードを{Cards:diff()}枚引く。
状態異常を作成するたび、プレイするまでこのカードのコストは0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
카드를 {Cards:diff()}장 뽑습니다.
상태이상 카드를 생성 시,
이 카드의 비용이 사용하기
전까지 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}으로 감소합니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Dobierz {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart}.
Kiedykolwiek stworzysz kartę Stanu, zredukuj koszt tej karty do 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} aż do zagrania.
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
Compre {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
Quando você criar uma carta de Condição, reduza o custo desta carta para 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} até que seja jogada.
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Вы добираете {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт}.
Стоимость понижается до 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} на одно разыгрывание, когда вы создаете Статус.
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Roba {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
Cuando crees una carta de Estado, reduce el coste de esta carta a 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} hasta que se juegue.
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
{Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:kart|kart} çek.
Her Durum kartı oluşturduğunda bu kartın maliyeti, oynanana kadar 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} olur.

description:

Draw 4 cards.
Discard all cards drawn this way that do not cost 0 [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/defect_energy_icon.png[/img].

translations.tha: กรีดและสืบค้น

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Discard all cards drawn this way that do not cost 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
抽{Cards:diff()}张牌。
丢弃抽到的牌中耗能不为0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}的牌。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Ziehe {Cards:diff()} Karten.
Wirf alle so gezogenen Karten ab, die nicht 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} kosten.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Robas {Cards:diff()} cartas.
Descartas todas las cartas que robaste de esta forma de costo mayor a 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Piochez {Cards:diff()} cartes.
Défaussez toutes les cartes piochées ainsi qui ne coûtent pas 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Peschi {Cards:diff()} carte.
Scarti tutte le carte che hai pescato in questo modo di costo maggiore a 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.

{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
カードを{Cards:diff()}枚引く。
この方法で引いたカードのうち、コストが0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}でないものを捨てる。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
카드를 {Cards:diff()}장 뽑습니다.
뽑은 카드 중 비용이
0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}이 아닌 모든
카드를 버립니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Dobierz {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart}.

translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
Compre {Cards:diff()} cartas.
Descarte todas as cartas compradas desta maneira que não custem 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Вы добираете {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт}.
Вы сбрасываете все добранные карты стоимостью более 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.

translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
{Cards:diff()} kart çek.
Bu yolla çekilip maliyeti 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} olmayan tüm kartları elinden çıkar.

description:

[gold]Evoke[/gold] all of your Orbs.

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Evoke[/gold] all of your Orbs.
translations.zhs:
对所有敌人造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
[gold]激发[/gold]所有充能球。
translations.deu:
Füge ALLEN Gegnern {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
[gold]Entlade[/gold] alle deine Orbs.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
[gold]Descargas[/gold] todos tus orbes.
translations.fra:

[gold]Activez[/gold] tous vos Orbes.

[gold]Evochi[/gold] tutti i tuoi Globi.
translations.jpn:
すべての敵に{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
すべてのオーブを[gold]解放[/gold]する。
translations.kor:
모든 적에게
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
모든 구체를 [gold]발현[/gold]합니다.

[gold]Evoque[/gold] todas as suas Orbes.
translations.rus:

[gold]Разряжает[/gold] все сферы.

name: Smokestack+
description: Whenever you create a Status, deal 7 damage to ALL enemies.

translations.eng: Whenever you create a Status, deal {SmokestackPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 每当你生成一张状态牌时，对所有敌人造成{SmokestackPower:diff()}点伤害。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du einen Status erzeugst, füge ALLEN Gegnern {SmokestackPower:diff()} Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Al crear una carta de estado, infliges {SmokestackPower:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous créez un Statut, infligez {SmokestackPower:diff()} dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che crei una carta Stato, infliggi {SmokestackPower:diff()} di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: 状態異常を作成するたび、すべての敵に{SmokestackPower:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.kor:
상태이상 카드를 생성할
때마다, 모든 적에게
피해를 {SmokestackPower:diff()} 줍니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek stworzysz kartę Stanu, zadaj {SmokestackPower:diff()} pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você criar uma carta de Condição, cause {SmokestackPower:diff()} de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus: Наносит {SmokestackPower:diff()} урона ВСЕМ врагам, когда вы создаете Статус.
translations.spa: Cuando crees una carta de Estado, inflige {SmokestackPower:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณสร้างการ์ดสถานะ สร้างความเสียหาย {SmokestackPower:diff()} ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur: Her Durum kartı oluşturduğunda TÜM düşmanlara {SmokestackPower:diff()} hasar ver.

name: Storm
description: Whenever you play a Power, [gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Lightning[/gold].

translations.tha: มรสุม

translations.zhs: 每当你打出一张能力牌时，[gold]生成[/gold]{StormPower:diff()}个[gold]闪电[/gold]充能球。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du eine Macht spielst, [gold]Erschaffe[/gold] {StormPower:diff()} [gold]{StormPower:plural:Blitz|Blitze}[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous jouez un Pouvoir, [gold]Canalisez[/gold] {StormPower:diff()} [gold]{StormPower:plural:Orbe kéraunique|Orbes kérauniques}[/gold].
translations.ita: [gold]Elettroglobi[/gold] [gold]canalizzati[/gold] ogni volta che giochi una carta Potere: {StormPower:diff()}.
translations.jpn: パワーをプレイするたび、[gold]ライトニング[/gold]{StormPower:diff()}を[gold]生成[/gold]する。
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar um Poder, [gold]Canalize[/gold] {StormPower:diff()} [gold]Relâmpago[/gold].
translations.rus: [gold]Заряжает[/gold] {StormPower:diff()} [gold]{StormPower:plural(ru):сферу молнии|сферы молнии|сфер молнии}[/gold], когда вы разыгрываете Талант.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเล่นการ์ดพลัง [gold]ปลุกเสก[/gold] {StormPower:diff()} [gold]สายฟ้า[/gold]

description: Whenever you play a Power, gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/defect_energy_icon.png[/img].

translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi una carta Potere, ottieni {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.

name: Sunder
description:
Deal 24 damage.
If this kills an enemy, gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/defect_energy_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/defect_energy_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/defect_energy_icon.png[/img].

translations.tha: มหาวิปโยค

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this kills an enemy, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
如果这张牌击杀了敌人，则获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Falls der Gegner dadurch stirbt, erhalte {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Si esto mata a un enemigo, obtienes {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Si ceci tue un ennemi, gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Se questa carta uccide un nemico, ottieni {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
これで敵を倒した時、{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
이 카드로 적을 처치 시, {Energy:energyIcons()}을 얻습니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Jeżeli to zabije przeciwnika, zyskaj {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
Se esta carta derrotar um inimigo, receba {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Дает {Energy:energyIcons()}, если убивает врага.
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Si esto mata a un enemigo, gana {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
ถ้าฆ่าศัตรูได้ ได้รับ {Energy:energyIcons()}
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
Eğer bu kart bir düşmanı öldürürse {Energy:energyIcons()} elde et.

name: Sweeping Beam
description:
Deal 6 damage to ALL enemies.
Draw 1 card.

translations.tha: กวาดลำแสง

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
translations.zhs:
对所有敌人造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
抽{Cards:diff()}张牌。
translations.deu:
Füge ALLEN Gegnern {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Ziehe {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten}.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
Robas {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
Piochez {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carte|cartes}.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
Peschi {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|carte}.
translations.jpn:
すべての敵に{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
カードを{Cards:diff()}枚引く。
translations.kor:
모든 적에게
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
카드를 {Cards:diff()}장 뽑습니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
Dobierz {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart}.
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
Compre {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона ВСЕМ врагам.
Вы добираете {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт}.
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
Roba {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()} ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
จั่วการ์ด {Cards:diff()} ใบ

name: Synchronize
description:
Gain 2 [gold]Focus[/gold] this turn for each unique Orb you have.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.eng:
Gain {CalculationExtra:diff()} [gold]Focus[/gold] this turn for each unique Orb you have.{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedFocus:diff()} [gold]Focus[/gold])|}
translations.zhs:
你每有一种不同的充能球，就在本回合获得{CalculationExtra:diff()}点[gold]集中[/gold]。{InCombat:
（获得{CalculatedFocus:diff()}点[gold]集中[/gold]）|}
translations.deu:
Erhalte für jeden unterschiedlichen Orb {CalculationExtra:diff()} [gold]Fokus[/gold] in diesem Zug.{InCombat:
({CalculatedFocus:diff()} [gold]Fokus[/gold])|}
translations.esp:
Obtienes {CalculationExtra:diff()} de [gold]concentración[/gold] en este turno por cada orbe único que tengas.{InCombat:
(Obtienes {CalculatedFocus:diff()} de [gold]concentración[/gold])|}
translations.fra:
Gagnez {CalculationExtra:diff()} de [gold]Focalisation[/gold] jusqu'à la fin du tour pour chaque Orbe unique que vous avez.{InCombat:
(Gagnez {CalculatedFocus:diff()} de [gold]Focalisation[/gold])|}
translations.ita:
Ottieni {CalculationExtra:diff()} di [gold]Focus[/gold] in questo turno per ogni Globo unico che possiedi.{InCombat:
(Ottieni {CalculatedFocus:diff()} di [gold]Focus[/gold])|}
translations.jpn:
ターン終了時まで生成中のオーブ1種類につき、[gold]集中力[/gold]{CalculationExtra:diff()}を得る。{InCombat:
([gold]集中力[/gold]{CalculatedFocus:diff()}を得る。)|}
translations.kor:
영창된 구체의 종류
하나당 이번 턴에
[gold]밀집[/gold]을 {CalculationExtra:diff()} 얻습니다.{InCombat:
([gold]밀집[/gold]을 {CalculatedFocus:diff()} 얻습니다)|}
translations.pol:
W tej turze zyskaj {CalculationExtra:diff()} pkt. [gold]Skupienia[/gold] za każdy posiadany rodzaj Sfery.{InCombat:
(Zyskaj {CalculatedFocus:diff()} pkt. [gold]Skupienia[/gold])|}
translations.ptb:
Receba {CalculationExtra:diff()} de [gold]Foco[/gold] neste turno por cada tipo de Orbe que você possuir.{InCombat:
(Receba {CalculatedFocus:diff()} de [gold]Foco[/gold])|}
translations.rus:
Дает {CalculationExtra:diff()} [gold]фокуса[/gold] на ход за каждую уникальную заряженную сферу.{InCombat:
(Дает {CalculatedFocus:diff()} [gold]фокуса[/gold])|}
translations.spa:
Gana {CalculationExtra:diff()} de [gold]Concentración[/gold] este turno por cada Orbe único que tengas.{InCombat:
(Gana {CalculatedFocus:diff()} de [gold]Concentración[/gold]).|}
translations.tha:
ได้รับ {CalculationExtra:diff()} [gold]โฟกัส[/gold]ในเทิร์นนี้ตามจำนวนลูกแก้วไม่ซ้ำธาตุที่คุณมี{InCombat:
(ได้รับ {CalculatedFocus:diff()} [gold]โฟกัส[/gold])|}
translations.tur:
Sahip olduğun her eşsiz Küre için bu turluk {CalculationExtra:diff()} [gold]Odak[/gold] elde et.{InCombat:
({CalculatedFocus:diff()} [gold]Odak[/gold] elde et)|}

translations.zhs:
你每有一种不同的充能球，就在本回合获得{CalculationExtra:diff()}点[gold]集中[/gold]。{InCombat:
（获得{CalculatedFocus:diff()}点[gold]集中[/gold]）|}
translations.deu:
Erhalte für jeden unterschiedlichen Orb {CalculationExtra:diff()} [gold]Fokus[/gold] in diesem Zug.{InCombat:
({CalculatedFocus:diff()} [gold]Fokus[/gold])|}
translations.esp:
Obtienes {CalculationExtra:diff()} de [gold]concentración[/gold] en este turno por cada orbe único que tengas.{InCombat:
(Obtienes {CalculatedFocus:diff()} de [gold]concentración[/gold])|}
translations.fra:
Gagnez {CalculationExtra:diff()} de [gold]Focalisation[/gold] jusqu'à la fin du tour pour chaque Orbe unique que vous avez.{InCombat:
(Gagnez {CalculatedFocus:diff()} de [gold]Focalisation[/gold])|}
translations.ita:
Ottieni {CalculationExtra:diff()} di [gold]Focus[/gold] in questo turno per ogni Globo unico che possiedi.{InCombat:
(Ottieni {CalculatedFocus:diff()} di [gold]Focus[/gold])|}
translations.jpn:
ターン終了時まで生成中のオーブ1種類につき、[gold]集中力[/gold]{CalculationExtra:diff()}を得る。{InCombat:
([gold]集中力[/gold]{CalculatedFocus:diff()}を得る。)|}
translations.kor:
영창된 구체의 종류
하나당 이번 턴에
[gold]밀집[/gold]을 {CalculationExtra:diff()} 얻습니다.{InCombat:
([gold]밀집[/gold]을 {CalculatedFocus:diff()} 얻습니다)|}
translations.pol:
W tej turze zyskaj {CalculationExtra:diff()} pkt. [gold]Skupienia[/gold] za każdy posiadany rodzaj Sfery.{InCombat:
(Zyskaj {CalculatedFocus:diff()} pkt. [gold]Skupienia[/gold])|}
translations.ptb:
Receba {CalculationExtra:diff()} de [gold]Foco[/gold] neste turno por cada tipo de Orbe que você possuir.{InCombat:
(Receba {CalculatedFocus:diff()} de [gold]Foco[/gold])|}
translations.rus:
Дает {CalculationExtra:diff()} [gold]фокуса[/gold] на ход за каждую уникальную заряженную сферу.{InCombat:
(Дает {CalculatedFocus:diff()} [gold]фокуса[/gold])|}
translations.spa:
Gana {CalculationExtra:diff()} de [gold]Concentración[/gold] este turno por cada Orbe único que tengas.{InCombat:
(Gana {CalculatedFocus:diff()} de [gold]Concentración[/gold]).|}
translations.tha:
ได้รับ {CalculationExtra:diff()} [gold]โฟกัส[/gold]ในเทิร์นนี้ตามจำนวนลูกแก้วไม่ซ้ำธาตุที่คุณมี{InCombat:
(ได้รับ {CalculatedFocus:diff()} [gold]โฟกัส[/gold])|}
translations.tur:
Sahip olduğun her eşsiz Küre için bu turluk {CalculationExtra:diff()} [gold]Odak[/gold] elde et.{InCombat:
({CalculatedFocus:diff()} [gold]Odak[/gold] elde et)|}

name: Synthesis
description:
Deal 12 damage.
The next Power you play costs 0 [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/defect_energy_icon.png[/img].

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next Power you play costs 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
你打出的下一张能力牌耗能变为0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Die nächste Macht, die du spielst, kostet 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
El próximo poder que juegues costará 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Le prochain Pouvoir que vous jouez coûte 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Il costo della carta Potere successiva che giochi è pari a 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
次にプレイするパワーのコストが0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
다음에 사용하는
파워 카드의 비용이
0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}이 됩니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Następna Moc kosztuje 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
O próximo Poder que você jogar custa 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
El siguiente Poder que juegues cuesta 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
การ์ดพลังใบถัดไปมีค่าร่าย 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
Sonraki oynayacağın Güç kartının maliyeti 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} olur.

description: [gold]Channel[/gold] X [gold]Lightning[/gold].

translations.tha: อสนีบาต
[gold]ปลุกเสก[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} [gold]สายฟ้า[/gold]

name: Tempest+
description: [gold]Channel[/gold] X+1 [gold]Lightning[/gold].

translations.tha: อสนีบาต
[gold]ปลุกเสก[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} [gold]สายฟ้า[/gold]

name: Tesla Coil
description:
Deal 3 damage.
Trigger all [gold]Lightning[/gold] against the enemy.

translations.tha: ขดลวดเทสลา

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Trigger all [gold]Lightning[/gold] against the enemy.
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
对该敌人触发你的所有[gold]闪电[/gold]充能球的被动。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Löse alle [gold]Blitze[/gold] gegen diesen Gegner aus.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Activas todos los orbes de [gold]electricidad[/gold] contra el enemigo.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Déclenchez la capacité passive de tous vos [gold]Orbes kérauniques[/gold] sur l'ennemi.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Attivi ogni [gold]Elettroglobo[/gold] contro il nemico.
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
敵に対し、すべての[gold]ライトニング[/gold]の自動効果を発動する。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
대상 적을 상대로
모든 [gold]전기[/gold]를 발동시킵니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Aktywuj wszystkie [gold]Sfery Gromu[/gold] na przeciwniku.
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
Ative todos os [gold]Relâmpagos[/gold] contra o inimigo.
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Активирует пассивный эффект всех [gold]сфер молнии[/gold] против врага.
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Activa todos los [gold]Relámpagos[/gold] contra el enemigo.
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
ผลต่อเนื่องของ[gold]สายฟ้า[/gold]ทั้งหมดทำงานใส่ศัตรูตัวนี้
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
Tüm [gold]Yıldırım[/gold] Kürelerini düşmana hasar verdirt.

name: Thunder
description: Whenever you [gold]Evoke Lightning[/gold], deal 6 damage to each enemy hit.

translations.tha: ฟ้าคะนอง

translations.eng: Whenever you [gold]Evoke Lightning[/gold], deal {ThunderPower:diff()} damage to each enemy hit.
translations.zhs: 每当你[gold]激发闪电[/gold]充能球时，对被命中的敌人造成{ThunderPower:diff()}点伤害。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du einen [gold]Blitz Entlädst[/gold], füge dem getroffenen Gegner {ThunderPower:diff()} Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Al [gold]descargar electricidad[/gold], infliges {ThunderPower:diff()} de daño a cada enemigo que golpee.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous [gold]Activez[/gold] vos [gold]Orbes kérauniques[/gold], infligez {ThunderPower:diff()} dégâts à chaque ennemi touché.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che [gold]evochi un Elettroglobo[/gold], infliggi {ThunderPower:diff()} di danno a ogni nemico colpito.
translations.jpn: [gold]ライトニングを解放[/gold]するたび、命中した各敵に{ThunderPower:diff()}ダメージを与える。
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek [gold]Wyładujesz Sferę Gromu[/gold], zadaj {ThunderPower:diff()} pkt. obrażeń każdemu trafionemu przeciwnikowi.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você [gold]Evocar Relâmpago[/gold], cause {ThunderPower:diff()} de dano a cada inimigo golpeado.
translations.rus: Наносит {ThunderPower:diff()} урона каждому врагу, по которому попадает [gold]разряженная молния[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando [gold]Descargues Relámpago[/gold], inflige {ThunderPower:diff()} de daño a cada enemigo golpeado.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณ[gold]ปล่อยพลังสายฟ้า[/gold] สร้างความเสียหาย {ThunderPower:diff()} ใส่ศัตรูแต่ละตัวที่ถูกสายฟ้าโจมตี
translations.tur: Her [gold]Yıldırım Tetiklediğinde[/gold] hasar alan her düşmana ayrıca {ThunderPower:diff()} hasar ver.

name: Trash to Treasure
description: Whenever you create a Status, [gold]Channel[/gold] 1 random Orb.

translations.eng: Whenever you create a Status, [gold]Channel[/gold] 1 random Orb.
translations.zhs: 每当你生成状态牌的时候，随机[gold]生成[/gold]一个充能球。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du einen Status erzeugst, [gold]Erschaffe[/gold] 1 zufälligen Orb.
translations.esp: Al crear una carta de estado, [gold]canalizas[/gold] 1 orbe al azar.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous créez une carte Statut, [gold]Canalisez[/gold] 1 Orbe aléatoire.
translations.ita: Globi causali [gold]canalizzati[/gold] ogni volta che crei una carta Stato: 1.
translations.jpn: 状態異常を作成するたび、ランダムなオーブを1つ[gold]生成[/gold]する。
translations.kor:
상태이상 카드를
생성할 때마다, 무작위
구체를 1번 [gold]영창[/gold]합니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek stworzysz kartę Stanu, [gold]Załaduj[/gold] 1 losową Sferę.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você criar uma carta de Condição, [gold]Canalize[/gold] 1 Orbe aleatória.
translations.rus: [gold]Заряжает[/gold] 1 случайную сферу, когда вы создаете Статус.
translations.spa: Cuando crees una carta de Estado, [gold]Invoca[/gold] 1 Orbe aleatorio.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณสร้างการ์ดสถานะ [gold]ปลุกเสก[/gold]ลูกแก้ว 1 ลูกแบบสุ่ม
translations.tur: Her Durum kartı oluşturduğunda rastgele 1 Küre [gold]Oluştur[/gold].

[gold]Innate[/gold].

name: TURBO
description:
Gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/defect_energy_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/defect_energy_icon.png[/img].
Add a [gold]Void[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].

translations.tha: เทอร์โบ

translations.eng:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Add a [gold]Void[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
translations.zhs:
获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。
将一张[gold]虚空[/gold]加入你的[gold]弃牌堆[/gold]。
translations.esp:
Obtienes {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Agregas [gold]Vacío[/gold] a la [gold]pila de descarte[/gold].
translations.ita:
Ottieni {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Aggiungi una carta [gold]Vuoto[/gold] alla tua [gold]pila degli scarti[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。
[gold]虚無[/gold]を1枚[gold]捨て札[/gold]に加える。
translations.pol:
Zyskaj {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Dodaj a [gold]Pustkę[/gold] do [gold]stosu kart odrzuconych[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Receba {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Adicione um [gold]Vácuo[/gold] na sua [gold]Pilha de Descarte[/gold].
translations.spa:
Gana {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Añade un [gold]Vacío[/gold] a tu [gold]Pila de descarte[/gold].
translations.tha:
ได้รับ {Energy:energyIcons()}
เพิ่ม[gold]ความว่างเปล่า[/gold] 1 ใบเข้า[gold]กองทิ้ง[/gold]

Aggiungi una carta [gold]Vuoto[/gold] alla tua [gold]pila degli scarti[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。
[gold]虚無[/gold]を1枚[gold]捨て札[/gold]に加える。
translations.pol:
Zyskaj {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Dodaj a [gold]Pustkę[/gold] do [gold]stosu kart odrzuconych[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Receba {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Adicione um [gold]Vácuo[/gold] na sua [gold]Pilha de Descarte[/gold].
translations.spa:
Gana {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Añade un [gold]Vacío[/gold] a tu [gold]Pila de descarte[/gold].
translations.tha:
ได้รับ {Energy:energyIcons()}
เพิ่ม[gold]ความว่างเปล่า[/gold] 1 ใบเข้า[gold]กองทิ้ง[/gold]

name: Uproar
description:
Deal 5 damage twice.
Play a random Attack from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Play a random Attack from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害两次。
随机打出你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]中的1张攻击牌。
translations.deu:
Füge zweimal {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Spiele einen zufälligen Angriff aus deinem [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold].
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño dos veces.
Juegas una carta de ataque al azar del [gold]mazo de robo[/gold].
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts 2 fois.
Jouez une Attaque aléatoire depuis votre [gold]Pioche[/gold].
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno due volte.
Gioca una carta Attacco casuale dal tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを2回与える。
[gold]山札[/gold]からランダムなアタックを1枚プレイする。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()}만큼 2번 줍니다.
[gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold]에서
무작위 공격 카드를
1장 사용합니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń dwukrotnie.
Zagraj losowy Atak ze [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano duas vezes.
Jogue um Ataque aleatório da sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold].
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона 2 раза.
Вы разыгрываете случайную Атаку из [gold]стопки добора[/gold].
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño dos veces.
Juega un Ataque aleatorio de tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold].
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()} จำนวน 2 ครั้ง
เล่นการ์ดโจมตี 1 ใบแบบสุ่มจาก[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]
translations.tur:
İki kez {Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
[gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'nden rastgele bir Saldırı oyna.

name: Voltaic
description:
[gold]Channel Lightning[/gold] equal to the [gold]Lightning[/gold] already [gold]Channeled[/gold] this combat.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.eng:
[gold]Channel Lightning[/gold] equal to the [gold]Lightning[/gold] already [gold]Channeled[/gold] this combat.{InCombat:
([gold]Channel[/gold] {CalculatedChannels:diff()} [gold]Lightning[/gold])|}
translations.zhs:
[gold]生成[/gold]等量于你在这场战斗中[gold]生成过[/gold]的[gold]闪电[/gold]充能球数量的[gold]闪电[/gold]充能球。{InCombat:
（[gold]生成[/gold]{CalculatedChannels:diff()}个[gold]闪电[/gold]充能球）|}
translations.deu:
[gold]Erschaffe Blitze[/gold] für jeden [gold]Blitz[/gold], den du in diesem Kampf bereits [gold]Erschaffen[/gold] hast.{InCombat:
([gold]Erschaffe[/gold] {CalculatedChannels:diff()} [gold]Blitze[/gold])|}
translations.esp:
[gold]Canalizas electricidad[/gold] por un valor equivalente a la cantidad de [gold]electricidad[/gold] que hayas [gold]canalizado[/gold] en este combate.{InCombat:
([gold]Canalizas[/gold] {CalculatedChannels:diff()} de [gold]electricidad[/gold])|}
translations.fra:
[gold]Canalisez[/gold] un nombre d'[gold]Orbes kérauniques[/gold] égal au nombre d'[gold]Orbes kérauniques[/gold] que vous avez déjà [gold]Canalisés[/gold] pendant ce combat.{InCombat:
([gold]Canalisez[/gold] {CalculatedChannels:diff()} {CalculatedChannels:plural:[gold]Orbe kéraunique[/gold]|[gold]Orbes kérauniques[/gold]})|}
translations.ita:
[gold]Canalizzi Elettroglobi[/gold] pari agli [gold]Elettroglobi[/gold] già [gold]canalizzati[/gold] in questo combattimento.{InCombat:
([gold]Elettroglobi[/gold] [gold]canalizzati[/gold]: {CalculatedChannels:diff()}|}.
translations.jpn:
この戦闘中に[gold]生成[/gold]した[gold]ライトニング[/gold]の数に等しい[gold]ライトニング[/gold]を[gold]生成[/gold]する。{InCombat:
([gold]ライトニング[/gold]{CalculatedChannels:diff()}を[gold]生成[/gold]する)|}
translations.pol:
[gold]Załaduj Sferę Gromu[/gold] za każdą [gold]Sferę Gromu Załadowaną[/gold] w tej walce.{InCombat:
([gold]Załaduj[/gold] {CalculatedChannels:diff()} [gold]{CalculatedChannels:plural:Sferę|Sfery|Sfer} Gromu[/gold])|}
translations.ptb:
[gold]Canalize Relâmpago[/gold] equivalente à quantidade de [gold]Relâmpago[/gold] já [gold]Canalizada[/gold] neste combate.{InCombat:
([gold]Canalize[/gold] {CalculatedChannels:diff()} [gold]Relâmpago[/gold])|}
translations.rus:
[gold]Заряжает[/gold] столько [gold]сфер молнии[/gold], сколько уже было заряжено за бой.{InCombat:
([gold]Заряжает[/gold] {CalculatedChannels:diff()} [gold]{CalculatedChannels:plural(ru):сферу молнии|сферы молнии|сфер молнии}[/gold])|}
translations.spa:
[gold]Invoca X Relámpago[/gold], donde X es la cantidad de [gold]Relámpago[/gold] que hayas [gold]Invocado[/gold] durante este combate.{InCombat:
([gold]Invoca[/gold] {CalculatedChannels:diff()} [gold]Relámpago[/gold]).|}
translations.tha:
[gold]ปลุกเสกสายฟ้า[/gold]ตามจำนวน[gold]สายฟ้า[/gold]ที่เคยถูก[gold]ปลุกเสก[/gold]ในการต่อสู้นี้{InCombat:
([gold]ปลุกเสก[/gold] {CalculatedChannels:diff()} [gold]สายฟ้า[/gold])|}

name: White Noise
description:
Add a random Power into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.tha: คลื่นรบกวนเชิงบวก

translations.eng: Add a random Power into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
translations.zhs: 将一张随机能力牌加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。这张牌在本回合内免费打出。
translations.deu: Erhalte eine zufällige Macht auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold]. Sie ist in diesem Zug kostenlos spielbar.
translations.esp: Agregas un poder al azar a tu [gold]mano[/gold]. Durante este turno, puedes jugarla sin costo.
translations.fra: Ajoutez un Pouvoir aléatoire à votre [gold]Main[/gold]. Il coûte [blue]0[/blue] ce tour.
translations.ita: Aggiungi una carta Potere casuale alla tua [gold]mano[/gold]. In questo turno puoi giocarla senza alcun costo.
translations.jpn: ランダムなパワーを1枚[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。このターン、それはコストを支払わずにプレイできる。
translations.kor:
무작위 파워 카드를
1장 [gold]손[/gold]으로 가져옵니다.
이번 턴 동안 그 카드를
비용 없이 사용할 수 있습니다.
translations.pol: Dodaj losową Moc do [gold]ręki[/gold]. W tej turze jest darmowa.
translations.ptb: Adicione um Poder aleatório na sua [gold]Mão[/gold]. Ele não tem custo neste turno.
translations.rus: Добавляет в [gold]руку[/gold] случайный Талант. В этом ходу он бесплатный.
translations.spa: Añade un Poder aleatorio a tu [gold]Mano[/gold]. Puedes jugarlo gratis este turno.
translations.tha: เพิ่มการ์ดพลัง 1 ใบแบบสุ่มใส่[gold]มือ[/gold] มันเล่นฟรีในเทิร์นนี้
translations.tur: [gold]El[/gold]'ine rastgele bir Güç kartı ekle. Bu tur oynaması ücretsiz olur.
