name: Maul
description:
Deal 5 damage twice.
Increase the damage of ALL Maul cards by 1 this combat.

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Increase the damage of ALL Maul cards by {Increase:diff()} this combat.
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害两次。
在这场战斗中，将所有“撕咬”牌的伤害增加{Increase:diff()}。
translations.deu:
Füge zweimal {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Erhöhe den Schaden ALLER Zerfleischen-Karten für diesen Kampf um {Increase:diff()}.
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño dos veces.
Aumenta el daño de TODAS las cartas [gold]Devorar[/gold] en {Increase:diff()} durante este combate.
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts 2 fois.
Augmentez les dégâts de TOUTES les cartes Mutilation de {Increase:diff()} jusqu'à la fin du combat.
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno due volte.
Aumenti il danno di tutte le carte Strazio di {Increase:diff()} in questo combattimento.
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを2回与える。
この戦闘中、すべての引き裂きのダメージが{Increase:diff()}増加する。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()}만큼 2번 줍니다.
이번 전투 동안
모든 할퀴기 카드의
피해량이 {Increase:diff()} 증가합니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń dwukrotnie.
Zwiększ obrażenia zadawane przez WSZYSTKIE Rozwalenia w tej walce o {Increase:diff()} pkt.
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano duas vezes.
Aumenta o dano de TODAS as cartas de Dilacerar {Increase:diff()} neste combate.
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона 2 раза.
Повышает урон ВСЕХ «Побоев» на {Increase:diff()} до конца боя.
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño dos veces.
Aumenta el daño de TODAS las cartas de Vapulear en {Increase:diff()} durante este combate.
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาน {Damage:diff()} จำนวน 2 ครั้ง
การ์ด Maul ทั้งหมดสร้างความเสียหายเพิ่ม {Increase:diff()} ในการต่อสู้นี้
translations.tur:
İki kez {Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
Bu savaşta TÜM Deş kartlarının hasarını {Increase:diff()} artır.

{Damage:diff()}ダメージを2回与える。
この戦闘中、すべての引き裂きのダメージが{Increase:diff()}増加する。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()}만큼 2번 줍니다.
이번 전투 동안
모든 할퀴기 카드의
피해량이 {Increase:diff()} 증가합니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń dwukrotnie.
Zwiększ obrażenia zadawane przez WSZYSTKIE Rozwalenia w tej walce o {Increase:diff()} pkt.
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano duas vezes.
Aumenta o dano de TODAS as cartas de Dilacerar {Increase:diff()} neste combate.
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона 2 раза.
Повышает урон ВСЕХ «Побоев» на {Increase:diff()} до конца боя.
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño dos veces.
Aumenta el daño de TODAS las cartas de Vapulear en {Increase:diff()} durante este combate.
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาน {Damage:diff()} จำนวน 2 ครั้ง
การ์ด Maul ทั้งหมดสร้างความเสียหายเพิ่ม {Increase:diff()} ในการต่อสู้นี้
translations.tur:
İki kez {Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
Bu savaşta TÜM Deş kartlarının hasarını {Increase:diff()} artır.

name: Metamorphosis
description:
Add 3 random Attacks into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. They're free to play this combat.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.tha: แปรร่างเปลี่ยนรูป

translations.eng: Add {Cards:diff()} random Attacks into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. They're free to play this combat.
translations.zhs: 在你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]中加入{Cards:diff()}张随机攻击牌。它们在本场战斗中可以被免费打出。
translations.deu: Erhalte {Cards:diff()} zufällige Angriffe in deinen [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold]. Sie ist in diesem Kampf kostenlos spielbar.
translations.esp: Agregas {Cards:diff()} cartas de ataque al azar al [gold]mazo de robo[/gold]. Podrás jugarlas sin costo en este combate.
translations.fra: Ajoutez {Cards:diff()} Attaques à votre [gold]Pioche[/gold]. Elles coûtent [blue]0[/blue] jusqu'à la fin du combat.
translations.ita: Aggiungi {Cards:diff()} carte Attacco casuali nel tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold]. In questo combattimento puoi giocarle senza nessun costo.
translations.jpn: ランダムなアタックを{Cards:diff()}枚[gold]山札[/gold]に加える。この戦闘中、それらはコストを支払わずにプレイできる。
translations.kor:
[gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold]에
무작위 공격 카드를
{Cards:diff()}장 추가합니다.
이번 전투 동안 그 카드들을
비용 없이 사용할 수 있습니다.
translations.pol: Dodaj {Cards:diff()} losowe bezbarwne karty do [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold]. W tej walce są darmowe.
translations.ptb: Adicione {Cards:diff()} Ataques aleatórios na sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold]. Eles não possuem custo neste combate.
translations.rus: Добавляет {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural(ru):случайную Атаку|случайные Атаки|случайных Атак} в [gold]стопку добора[/gold]. В этом бою они бесплатные.
translations.spa: Añade {Cards:diff()} Ataques aleatorios a tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold]. Puedes jugarlos gratis durante este combate.
translations.tha: เพิ่มการ์ดโจมตี {Cards:diff()} ใบแบบสุ่มเข้า[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold] มันเล่นฟรีในการตอนสู้นี้
translations.tur: [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'ne rastgele {Cards:diff()} Saldırı kartı ekle. Bu savaş boyunca oynanışları ücretsiz olur.

name: Neow's Fury
description:
Deal 10 damage.
Put 2 random cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put {Cards:plural:a random card|{:diff()} random cards} from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
将你[gold]弃牌堆[/gold]中的{Cards:diff()}张随机牌放入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Nimm {Cards:plural:eine zufällige Karte|{:diff()} zufällige Karten} aus deinem [gold]Abwurfstapel[/gold] auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Colocas {Cards:plural:una carta|{:diff()} cartas} de tu [gold]pila de descarte[/gold] al azar en tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Placez {Cards:plural:une carte aléatoire|{:diff()} cartes aléatoires} de votre [gold]Défausse[/gold] dans votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Metti {Cards:plural:una carta casuale|{:diff()} carte casuali} dalla tua [gold]pila degli scarti[/gold] nella tua [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
[gold]捨て札[/gold]からランダムなカードを{Cards:diff()}枚[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
[gold]버린 카드 더미[/gold]에서
무작위 카드를 {Cards:choose(1):1장|{:diff()}장}
[gold]손[/gold]으로 가져옵니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Przenieś {Cards:plural:losową kartę|{:diff()} losowe karty|{:diff()} losowych kart} ze [gold]stosu kart odrzuconych[/gold] do [gold]ręki[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
Coloque {Cards:plural:uma carta aleatória|{:diff()} cartas aleatórias} da sua [gold]Pilha de Descarte[/gold] na sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Вы берете {Cards:plural(ru):случайную карту|{:diff()} случайные карты|{:diff()} случайных карт} из [gold]стопки сброса[/gold].
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Coloca {Cards:plural:una carta aleatoria|{:diff()} cartas aleatorias} de tu [gold]Pila de descarte[/gold] en tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
นำการ์ด {Cards:choose(1):1|{:diff()}} ใบแบบสุ่มจาก[gold]กองทิ้ง[/gold]ขึ้น[gold]มือ[/gold]
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
[gold]Atık Destesi[/gold]'nden {Cards:plural:rastgele bir kartı|rastgele {:diff()} kartı} [gold]El[/gold]'ine koy.

description: Deal 2 damage 3 times.

name: Peck+
description: Deal 2 damage 4 times.

translations.tha: สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()} จำนวน {Repeat:diff()} ครั้ง

name: Rebound
description:
Deal 9 damage.
Put the next card you play this turn on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

translations.tha: ดีดกลับ

translations.eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put the next card you play this turn on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
translations.zhs:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
将你在本回合打出的下一张牌放置到你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]顶部。
translations.deu:
Füge {Damage:diff()} Schaden zu.
Lege die nächste Karte, die du in diesem Zug spielst, auf deinen [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold].
translations.esp:
Infliges {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Colocas la próxima carta que juegues en este turno en la parte superior del [gold]mazo de robo[/gold].
translations.fra:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
La prochaine carte que vous jouez ce tour est placée sur le dessus de votre [gold]Pioche[/gold].
translations.ita:
Infliggi {Damage:diff()} di danno.
Metti la carta successiva che giochi in questo turno in cima al tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold].
translations.jpn:
{Damage:diff()}ダメージを与える。
このターン、次にプレイするカードを[gold]山札[/gold]の一番上に置く。
translations.kor:
피해를 {Damage:diff()} 줍니다.
이번 턴에 다음으로
사용하는 카드를
[gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold]
맨 위에 놓습니다.
translations.pol:
Zadaj {Damage:diff()} pkt. obrażeń.
Umieść następną kartę zagraną w tej turze na szczycie [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold].
translations.ptb:
Cause {Damage:diff()} de dano.
Coloque a próxima carta que você jogar neste turno no topo da sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold].
translations.rus:
Наносит {Damage:diff()} урона.
Следующая разыгранная в этом ходу карта кладется на верх [gold]стопки добора[/gold].
translations.spa:
Inflige {Damage:diff()} de daño.
Coloca la siguiente carta que juegues este turno en la parte superior de tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold].
translations.tha:
สร้างความเสียหาย {Damage:diff()}
นำการ์ดที่คุณเล่นใบต่อไปกลับไปวางไว้บนสุดของ[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]
translations.tur:
{Damage:diff()} hasar ver.
Bu tur sonraki oynayacağın kartı [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'nin en üstüne koy.

description:
Gain 15 [gold]Block[/gold].
Next turn, draw 2 cards and gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

translations.eng:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Next turn, draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.zhs:
获得{Block:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
下个回合，抽{Cards:diff()}张牌并获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。
translations.deu:
Erhalte {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Ziehe zu Beginn deines nächsten Zuges {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten} und erhalte {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.esp:
Obtienes {Block:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
Robas {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} y obtienes {Energy:energyIcons()} al comienzo de tu próximo turno.
translations.fra:
Gagnez {Block:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
Au prochain tour, piochez {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carte|cartes} et gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.ita:
Ottieni {Block:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
Il prossimo turno, peschi {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|carte} e ottieni {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.jpn:
{Block:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
次のターン、カードを{Cards:diff()}枚引き、{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。
translations.kor:
[gold]방어도[/gold]를 {Block:diff()} 얻습니다.
다음 턴에,
카드를 {Cards:diff()}장 뽑고
{Energy:energyIcons()}를 얻습니다.
translations.pol:
Zyskaj {Block:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
W następnej turze dobierz {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart} i zyskaj {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.ptb:
Receba {Block:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
No próximo turno, compre {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} e receba {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.rus:
Дает {Block:diff()} [gold]защиты[/gold].

name: Stack
description: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the number of cards in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].

translations.tha: ทับซ้อน

translations.eng:
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the number of cards in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: +{CalculationBase}|}.{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold])|}
translations.zhs:
获得等量于与你当前[gold]弃牌堆[/gold]中牌数{IfUpgraded:show:+{CalculationBase}|}的[gold]格挡[/gold]值。{InCombat:
（获得{CalculatedBlock:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]）|}
translations.deu:
Erhalte [gold]Block[/gold] in Höhe der Kartenzahl in deinem [gold]Abwurfstapel[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: +{CalculationBase}|}.{InCombat:
({CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold])|}
translations.esp:
Obtienes [gold]bloqueo[/gold] por un valor equivalente a la cantidad de cartas en la [gold]pila de descarte[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: +{CalculationBase}|}.{InCombat:
(Obtienes {CalculatedBlock:diff()} de [gold]bloqueo[/gold])|}
translations.fra:
Gagnez un montant d'[gold]Armure[/gold] égal au nombre de cartes dans votre [gold]Défausse[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: +{CalculationBase}|}.{InCombat:
(Gagnez {CalculatedBlock:diff()} d'[gold]Armure[/gold])|}
translations.ita:
Ottieni [gold]Blocco[/gold] pari al numero di carte nella tua [gold]pila degli scarti[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: +{CalculationBase}|}.{InCombat:
(Ottieni {CalculatedBlock:diff()} di [gold]Blocco[/gold])|}
translations.jpn:
[gold]捨て札[/gold]の枚数{IfUpgraded:show: +{CalculationBase}|}に等しい[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。{InCombat:
({CalculatedBlock:diff()}[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る)|}
translations.kor:
[gold]버린 카드 더미[/gold]에 있는
카드의 수{IfUpgraded:show: +{CalculationBase}|}만큼
[gold]방어도[/gold]를 얻습니다.{InCombat:
([gold]방어도[/gold]를 {CalculatedBlock:diff()} 얻습니다)|}
translations.pol:
Zyskaj [gold]Blok[/gold] równy liczbie kart na [gold]stosie kart odrzuconych[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: +{CalculationBase} pkt.|}.{InCombat:
(Zyskaj {CalculatedBlock:diff()} pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold])|}
translations.ptb:
Receba [gold]Proteção[/gold] equivalente à quantidade de cartas na sua [gold]Pilha de Descarte[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: +{CalculationBase}|}.{InCombat:
(Receba {CalculatedBlock:diff()} de [gold]Proteção[/gold])|}
translations.rus:
Дает [gold]защиту[/gold], равную количеству карт в [gold]стопке сброса[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: +{CalculationBase}|}.{InCombat:
(Дает {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]защиты[/gold])|}
translations.spa:
Gana [gold]Bloqueo[/gold] igual al número de cartas en tu [gold]Pila de descarte[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: +{CalculationBase}|}.{InCombat:
(Gana {CalculatedBlock:diff()} de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold])|}
translations.tha:
ได้รับ[gold]บล็อก[/gold]ตามจำนวนการ์ดใน[gold]กองทิ้ง[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: +{CalculationBase}|}{InCombat:
